Chapter 827 - The Secret Of Life

Chapter 827: The secret of life

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

Ping Yang woke up.

Although the process was a bit complicated, and he landed on the ground face first, he finally awoke. Based on the plan, as long as he unsealed the others, it would be fine. However, when he tried to do so, an unexpected problem arose. To be precise, it should be his unsealing failed.

“What happened?” Su Hao asked nervously.

“I can’t do it.” Ping Yang shook his head unwillingly. Having a feel again, he could only end up smiling bitterly, “The reason they’re sealed in the first place was because of Kingdom of Heaven collapsing and the emergence of external forces, that was why I could use my Space Force. The truth is there is no such Space Force in Kingdom of Heaven. Naturally, I can’t unseal them.”

Space Force…

Su Hao paused for a second.

Only then did he recall the reason he defeated Ping Yang in the first place was by taking advantage of this fact. He would never have imagined…

“Then how can we have Space Force here?” Su Hao asked, “Circular World can connect with the outer world. If I activate Circular World, can you bring the Space Force inside here?”

“Nope.” Ping Yang instantly rejected, “Kingdom of Heaven is a world of its own. If one is to use the Space Force here, it needs to have its own space rules.”

“Space rules!” Su Hao was stunned for a second. Rules, this single world isn’t something to be used casually.

“Yes, rules.” Ping Yang spread out his hands, “Only with the emergence of rules can they represent the formation of a world. Space Force is no exception. Only with the appearance of space rules can Kingdom of Heaven have Space Force.”

“Space rules, huh?” Su Hao locked his eyebrows.

As expected, when it comes to rules, things won’t be easy. To consolidate Rule Force in Kingdom of Heaven, plus the never seen before space rules…

“You have left a huge problem for me.” Su Hao smiled bitterly.

“I believe you will have a solution.” Ping Yang said calmly.

Rule Force is a part of the world. No matter what world it is, the concept is the same. Every powerful world esper will have his Rule Force. As for Kingdom of Heaven, for it to be a true world, one needs to incorporate all Rule Forces, turning an illusion into reality.

Inside Kingdom of Heaven, snow fell, and rain poured.

Although it looked realistic, everyone knew that it was Su Hao using energy to create such scenes. After completing the deduction of Kingdom of Heaven, everything in Kingdom of Heaven proceeded in an orderly manner. The surrounding ecology would work in a way that he had previously deduced. They weren’t real but surpassed real ecosystems.

Su Hao used Illusion Reality to forge a new world.

Alas, a fake will always be a fake.

Without awakening everyone, Su Hao was a little disappointed. Fortunately, he had long prepared his heart for this. Although he didn’t know how to get space rules and integrate into Kingdom of Heaven, since there is hope, then there will be a chance to achieve it.

Su Hao left Kingdom of Heaven. Looking at the quiet sea of consciousness, Su Hao frowned slightly.

“I still have this feeling that something is amiss.”

“What is it that I missed?” Su Hao muttered. Seemingly to have thought of something, his eyes suddenly lit up.

Smart computer!

His gaze swept across somewhere in Kingdom of Heaven. Countless computers were already on standby, but they were hardly running because they lacked the most essential part, the smart computer! This smart computer that was destroyed along with Kingdom of Heaven is the true core of life.

Sun Yaohui!

“Life… can that be completed?” Su Hao looked at Kingdom of Heaven.

When Kingdom of Heaven was revived, only the core, smart computer wasn’t revived. That included those residents of Kingdom of Heaven. Regarding the revival of life, it was something mystical. Su Hao wasn’t sure that he could complete it or whether the ones revived would be the same person.

“Well, let’s give it a try.” Su Hao gently pointed, “Sun Yaohui, realization!”

Boom!

Energy once again surged.

Su Hao’s goal this time to recreate a life!

Boom!

Kingdom of Heaven trembled. At the smart computer, a dazzling light flashed. Under Su Hao’s unbelievable look, the smart computer was restored to its full operation.

“Success!” Even Su Hao was shocked.

This is the might of a grade S talent? It could even recover a dead life? Su Hao couldn’t control his excitement. If this is the case, then Shi Mingxuan and the others…

Su Hao excitedly ran the smart computer, but soon he turned cold.

The core of the smart computer had indeed returned, but the previous data was all gone. Currently, it didn’t have any wisdom. It still qualified as a computer core, but as a human being, it is at the level of an idiot. The plan to revive the dead failed. Even in Kingdom of Heaven, it’s still impossible.

A grade S talent can restore lives, but it can’t restore their intelligence and memory. This also meant that even if Su Hao is to revive them in Kingdom of Heaven, those people would have nothing to do with the ones in the past. In fact, that might actually lead to some terrible consequences due to an imperfect revival.

“Is this the mystery of life?”

A sigh could be heard.

Su Hao left Kingdom of Heaven. It is not possible now, but that doesn’t mean that he can’t achieve it in the future. He believed that he would be able to do so one day.

Back in the real world, the energy in the warehouse was trembling.

The resources in Energy Warehouse A kept decreasing at a terrifying speed. However, in order to prevent a past incident from occurring, Su Hao purposely blocked the alarm from triggering. It’s not difficult for the current him to do so now that his origin ability had recovered, and his hacking ability has returned to its peak.

“Finally, everything is complete.” Su Hao was excited.

With a single breakthrough, his Potential Release had reached the domain realm, and his Model Analysis also returned. Although it’s not like any ordinary esper’s domain due to his unique physical talent, the appearance of a new origin ability carried a higher significance than the domain itself. Coupled with the return of the mysterious card and Ping Yang’s awakening…

This breakthrough was a perfect one.

Everything proceeded according to his plans. With this single breakthrough, his strength skyrocketed!

Before the breakthrough, he was at the same strength as an absolute domain esper. After this breakthrough, coupled with the return of Model Analysis and origin techniques such as Mountain Breaker, Water Split, Illusion Reality, etc., those definitely boosted his combat strength by a large margin!

Besides that, his own physical fitness’s improvement is even more terrifying!

The transformation from 4,999 to 6,001 points; his power had increased by unknown fold. Before the breakthrough, Su Hao was well aware of this fact. With his current strength, no one could compete with him within the domain realm! Now that he had finished his breakthrough, he truly reached the invincible status within the same realm!

Peak domain realm?

Su Hao smirked.

If he’s to encounter a peak domain esper again, with the help of various origin techniques, he could eradicate the enemy with a single punch! This is the self-confidence he has currently!

Although Realization isn’t a talent for combat…

This is just the result of the breakthrough. Although this breakthrough had brought a change of strength to Su Hao, is that the end?

No!

If it’s just a simple breakthrough, he didn’t need to return to the Tian family! What he needs is more than this. 4,999 points to 6,000 points already made Su Hao work so hard. What about 6,000 points to 9,999 points then? What about stepping into the bottleneck of the world realm?

Not only that, Su Hao knew that now with the return of Model Analysis, it’s impossible for him to use all his energy for physical reinforcement like before. Thus, the duration of the next breakthrough would definitely increase. If he wishes to improve his strength, he would need an even more horrifying amount of energy.

Right now, the Tian family was still the best choice.

This was why Su Hao returned.

Absorbing energy once in Origin Ability Association and the Bai family, now Su Hao had made a breakthrough into the domain realm. This time, he entered the Tian family’s Energy Warehouse A to improve even more after the breakthrough! The resurrection of Kingdom of Heaven and the temporary world model had consumed 10% of the resources here.

For Energy Warehouse A, 10% is massive.

“It’s indeed a large amount.”

Su Hao stood up and looked at the endless energy ocean around him. Although it cost 10% of the energy ocean around him, it still surprised him.

“Energy ocean…” Su Hao looked at the ocean as he fell into deep thought.

Since the Tian family sent him in, with his current skill level of hacking, if he wants to block any information from leaking outside and absorb every bit of energy here, it’s just a snap of his fingers. However, for him, the problem isn’t about how to absorb the energy, but how to leave the Tian family safely after finished absorbing everything.

How could he achieve it?

To quietly absorb the energy here and empty out the warehouse, and then decisively leave the Tian family… As long as he could leave here silently, even if the Tian family is to discover the problem in the future, it would have no relation with Su Hao at all. To look at it from a security perspective, without a doubt, this is the best method with a success rate of 90%.

However, is that really the best?

Su Hao frowned.

For example, today, even if Energy Warehouse A is to be plundered empty by him, that won’t stop their determination to continue the war. With more than ten world espers in their hands, they are truly unmatched. If one Energy Warehouse A is to disappear, then they would just plunder more energy resources.

Now, there were only seven families left in the top ten families.

A war of two versus six had now turned into two versus five. The family alliance was now in chaos. If Su Hao is to leave the Tian family now, that would be unwise. Basically, all he could do was to stop now and then continue to wander the horizon, searching for more abundant energy resources.

That plan can’t be done.

Su Hao decisively scrapped that plan. Of course, more importantly, if he is to leave the Tian family, won’t the remaining resources in other energy warehouses be irrelevant to him?

That’s a lot of resources!

Su Hao felt that he needed to contribute to this war between the top ten families. He needs to plunder all resources in the Tian family so that they couldn’t succeed after the war. This would result in them having no future. This was something he needed to do as the Su family’s Clan Head. I do this for the Su family and not for myself.

To think of it in such a way, Su Hao felt that he is such a great person.

The Tian family would have never thought that in their nest, there would be such a person who would look at the pot while eating rice in a bowl. While absorbing energy in Energy Warehouse A, he already had the idea of plundering resources from the other energy warehouses…

“Let’s absorb the energy here, and then search for an opportunity to enter the other energy warehouses.”

Su Hao made a decision.

The smart computer was making a comprehensive deduction, while countless thoughts flew within his sea of consciousness. Suddenly, Su Hao had a new plan.

“If this is the case, even if the Tian family wants to blame someone, they would be unwilling, huh?” Su Hao’s mouth raised to form a smile.

Chapter 833 - I Want The Authority To Command!

Chapter 833: I want the authority to command!

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“You’re that Lin Hu?!” Su Zhengwen looked at Su Hao at a loss.

Su Hao shrugged his shoulder.

He had already explained it, but Su Zhengwen was still looking at him with an unbelievable gaze. His mouth opened so wide that one could stuff it with a duck egg.

“Hold on…”

Su Zhengwen only managed to recover himself after quite some time, “So that Lin Hu, who has been the hot topic recently among the top families, is you?”

“Well, if it’s the person who destroyed the Bai family, then it should be.” Su Hao spread out his hands.

Su Zhengwen: “…”

“Wait, let me sort this out.”

Su Zhengwen needed several minutes before finally being able to digest the fact that Su Hao is Lin Hu. When he heard of Su Hao’s false breakthrough by absorbing all the resources in the Tian family’s energy warehouse, he couldn’t help but bitterly smile, “You brat.”

“This is why I say you all don’t have to worry about the other battlefield.” Su Hao just casually continued, “With me here, there won’t be any problems. You guys just need to concentrate all your strength to fight against the Tian family’s world espers.”

“Alright.” Su Zhengwen sighed in relief while revealing a reassuring look, “If so, then we can consider having an additional fraction of success.”

“How big is the fraction?” Su Hao asked.

“50-50.” Su Zhengwen frankly said, “Although we’re prepared, the Tian family’s plan is too massive. Even with all five families joining hands, we only have a 50% chance of winning.”

Having said here, Su Zhengwen sighed, “If we’re to join hands with the Bai family, these things won’t happen.”

Although that is true…

Alas, he just said with empty words.

The Tian family has their strength, and the Zhang family is formidable; with both families joining hands, they’re even more powerful! However, it still won’t be sufficient to wipe out all the other families. However, to only act after a decade, the Tian family had long anticipated that the other families would never be united! This is why they managed to wipe out two families in one night.

Will the remaining six families be united?

Ridiculous!

They would only blame the annihilation of two families on the Tian family’s surprise attack. No one would believe that the Tian family has the ability to overpower the other families. Even if they’re to form an alliance, their cooperation would be limited. It wasn’t until the Bai family destruction that the terror of the Tian family penetrated their minds.

Under an urgent battle, all five families united.

However, it’s too late!

Even though they tried their best, they were still losing. Even with Su Hao’s help on the other battlefield allowing them to focus entirely on the battle among world espers, their chance of winning isn’t high.

“As for the other 50%, we can only desperately fight for it.”

Instead, Su Zhengwen didn’t sound discouraged, “Even if I have to die, I will drag the Tian family down!”

Su Hao squinted his eyes.

The smart computer began to deduce at max speed. He was supposed to be a nobody in this war. The battle of world espers, is that a stage he can participate? However, the interesting part is that after understanding the situation in the Tian family, the one who is enough to shake off the Tian family and the Su family is none other than him alone!

“Interesting.” Su Hao suddenly murmured to himself.

“What?” Su Zhengwen raised his head.

“Nothing.” Su Hao shook his head slightly. However, his eyes were lit up, “Brother Su, this family alliance, will the Su family be commanding?”

“Yes!” Su Zhengwen nodded.

“Now, who’s the one taking charge?” Su Hao asked.

“Me and Aota. As for negotiating with the other families, my dad, I mean Big Elder is responsible for that. He’s not strong, but no one can match his experience.” Su Zhengwen said.

“Great.” Su Hao nodded a bit. A smile suddenly formed at the corner of his mouth. It was filled with strong self-confidence, “How about giving me the authority to command the battle among world espers?”

“What?!” Su Zhengwen’s pupils suddenly widened as he looked at Su Hao in disbelief.

Su Hao, this pseudo world esper, is actually planning to command a battle that is enough to change the entire situation of the Federation? He thought he had heard incorrectly! However, looking at the confident look on Su Hao’s face, he believed that what this guy said is true. This little madman, what is he trying to do?

“Are you confident?” Su Zhengwen stared at Su Hao tenaciously. Su Hao just smiled indifferently and replied, “100%!”

Boom!

A lightning bolt struck across the sky.

Who would have thought that this man, who used to struggle while being a cripple in the Su family, had reached to such a level?

Can they believe him?

It’s not about trusting his character but his ability!

The ability to reverse the situation!

Confronting Su Hao for a moment, and thinking of what Su Hao had achieved in the past, Su Zhengwen ended up making a crazy decision that he wouldn’t even believe. “Alright! From today onward, the authority to command five families union will be entrusted to you! Every command of yours, I will help you to carry them out.”

“We will definitely win.” Su Hao looked at the result of the smart computer’s deduction and smiled indifferently.

Originally, he was a little worried.

However, with the information coming from the Tian family, the Su family, and the information he obtained that others were unaware of, Su Hao suddenly had this strange understanding. It was such a magical feeling as if at this moment, the entire world is under his control.

It has nothing to do with strength but confidence.

Su family, Tian family, Bai family, Federation…

Su Hao was well aware of too many things that others were unaware of. When all the information is combined, under the deduction of the smart computer, the situation of the entire Federation was super clear! It was as if all the movement of every force is within his grasp.

This is the importance of information.

This battle, he will win!

Inside Kingdom of Heaven, Ping Yang was lying on the beach comfortably. Bathing in the sunlight, he moaned in pleasure until Su Hao’s figure suddenly appeared and scared the hell out of him.

“Damn it, you peeping tom.”

“…”

Su Hao sneered, “Your entire body is created by this daddy. What’s there for me to peep at?”

“Uh…” Ping Yang twitched his mouth, “You’re here for what?”

“Help me wake someone up.” Su Hao calmly said.

“Wake someone up?” Ping Yang’s eyes widened out of sudden, “There is no space rule here. It’s impossible to do so. Don’t I said it previously?”

“A force awakening.” Su Hao said coldly.

“What?” Ping Yang almost jumped up, “To forcefully wake one up? Do you know what is a forced awakening? That’s not an awakening. That’s killing him! Without space force, if I do so, the photo will be destroyed directly, and the sleeping person will die! Do you know that?”

“I know.” Su Hao was as calm as ever, “It’s just a rebirth after death. I will save him again.”

Ping Yang’s bad temper soon calmed down.

“Is it something happening in reality?”

“En.” Su Hao nodded, “The top ten families are fighting. Both the Tian and Zhang families are sweeping the other families. Now is the time for the decisive battle. I am now the leader of the five families union. However, I am only able to deduce up to a crucial point. There is still a bit missing, which is why I need some news.”

“News that is enough to turn the tide.”

“Who?” Ping Yang raised his head.

“Zuo Xiaoyou!” Su Hao was so calm that it could make one’s hair stand up.

Ping Yang was well aware that once the smart computer returned, Su Hao would once again forcibly control his negative emotions. During the times when he should be calm, he would never hesitate.

“Alright.” Ping Yang nodded.

Inside Kingdom of Heaven, the photo representing Zuo Xiaoyou suddenly floated in the air. Under Ping Yang’s control, it suddenly turned into dust. The smart computer was working very hard to analyse the particles.

“It’s here.” Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

The most important information was finally in his hand.

After having the information from the Su family, Tian family, and Bai family, Su Hao received yet another useful piece of information from a powerful force, the Federation!

“This battle… Finally, it begins.” Su Hao muttered to himself.

***

Somewhere in the Federation.

A young man was playing a game in an internet cafe. The new virtual reality game made him so immersed in it as he happily enjoyed the game. At this moment, when he killed a monster, that young man suddenly went stiff as he returned to reality without hesitation.

“Warning: Topaz found.”

“Plan A starts.”

“Warning: Transmitting topaz message.”

“Plan B starts.”

“…”

A series of messages could be heard.

That young man was moving so fast on the virtual screen as he spread the mission information all over the Federation. Those who received the information turned solemn.

“Why is it at this moment?”

“This is too messy!”

“Haha, isn’t it right to be at this moment? I have waited for this day for too long. Even without mission, I want to get involved too. After all, this is the best opportunity for us.”

“Is there any movement over the berserk beasts’ side?”

“Nope, it’s as quiet as ever. We can’t see their situation, and neither can them. However, the frequency in the beast battlefield is a bit higher than usual.”

“Then, that’s great.”

“Let them prepare!”

“Relay the mission’s instructions.”

At the same time, somewhere near a mountain surrounded by water…

Beside the mountain was a beautiful city. It’s very small, but it has everything. If there is a visitor here, one would be terrified to find out that those who reside here are simply unimaginable. Above the city wall, two people, one young and one old seemed to be exchanging a conversation.

“Is it him?”

“En.”

“We need to take action now?”

“En.”

“We mustn’t reveal our identity.”

“We just need to hide our identity. Just his subordinates alone, this battle is enough to affect the Federation. If we don’t take action, we might not even be able to stay here comfortably.”

“Alright.”

At the same time.

Tian family.

Tian Gang also issued layers of command. The Tian family’s old ancestors even greeted the return of several world espers who had not appeared before. The powerful auras of world espers made everyone feel scared. The Tian family once again increased their strength with some assistance. Before this battle begins, it is already full of mystery.

Except…

No one noticed.

A few hours before this battle was about to start, at the most critical moment, a dark shadow slipped through quietly into the energy warehouse. As for the energy warehouse’ monitoring system, there seemed to be no changes…

Chapter 840 - Who Is The Biggest Beneficiary?

Chapter 840: Who is the biggest beneficiary?

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

The world was about to be unified!

At least on the surface.

There is no doubt that after today, the federal government is going to clean things up. In the past, those guys who depended on the top ten families to commit crimes, they most likely won’t be able to escape anymore. With the Su family’s old ancestor’s help, Su Hao was able to witness that battle, that amazing action of the Federation.

When everyone left the Su family’s residence, Su Hao still hadn’t come back to his senses.

How could it be like this?

This is simply amazing!

Inexplicably…

In his mind, Su Hao suddenly recalled the first sentence of Romance of the Three Kingdom’s first section, “In this vast world, things are constantly changing…”

“What are you thinking about?”

Su Hao shook his head to get rid of his messy thoughts.

Now, the problems weren’t about this, but that he didn’t deduce all these occurrences! Under the deduction of Illusion Reality, as long as there is a 0.001%, it will appear! However, no matter how he looked, this scene wasn’t present.

Is it because he’s too weak?

After all, this was the battle between world espers, and it was obviously not something he could participate in originally.

The deduced information to him was merely the probability of success. After all, there is a lot of information that he didn’t deduce in this battle. The stage of Rule Force isn’t something that he could penetrate. However, if so, why can’t the Tian family see this?

Here is where the problem arises!

Su Hao felt a chill.

At this time, he finally realized the problem. It was too smooth! Whether it’s spying on the Tian family or secretly scheming against them, everything went too smoothly! The Tian family, who was so out of reach in the past, seemed to have become a scarecrow that easily fell. With several of his plans, the Tian family didn’t even have the strength to fight back.

Is the Tian family really that weak?

Impossible!

He could deduce with his Illusion Reality and come up with plans by using the smart computer. Could the world espers of the Tian family really not sense the danger?

Impossible!

Then why weren’t they prepared at all?

Unless…

A more powerful character appeared!

He didn’t need to take action nor deal with the Tian family. All he did was to make sure the things the Tian family deduced could not see through Su Hao’s plan. Just like that, the entire Tian family would slowly walk into the pit dug by Su Hao, while being clueless!

Then, the game would end.

And this person is most likely from the federal government.

“A double-edged sword.” Su Hao bitterly smiled.

Using the Federation was a double-edged sword. He was using the federal government, while the federal government was using him too. Of course, this was a win-win situation. Su Hao used the federal government to eradicate this tumor, the Tian family, and the federal government used Su Hao for their world unification.

At least, that was it for now.

As for the Tian family’s territory…

Neither Su Hao nor Su family had an interest in it. Out of the top ten families, the Su family is the one with the smallest territory and develops in a unique manner. They rarely interact with the outside world.

This was also the only opportunity now!

“Withdraw!”

“Order all the Su family members to return to our residence!”

Su Hao resolutely gave his order, “All Su family disciples are to return at once. No matter what mission it is, immediately abort it! Return with an aircraft. The family will reimburse them. No matter which territory you’re at, you must not expose any affiliation with the Su family.”

“The highest level order, execute immediately!”

“Yes!” Big Elder suddenly stood up.

No matter how many questions he had, he looked calm right now. Since the order was issued, they had to execute it. Whether it was Su Hao’s previous performance or now, he deserved their respect.

All the elders left and immediately conveyed Su Hao’s order.

The atmosphere in the Su family suddenly became tense.

“Plus, the matters that happened today, we must never leak it to others, especially my identity. Once it is leaked out, the Su family is destined to face a huge disaster!”

“Yes!”

Yet another order was issued.

Only when everyone became busy, did Su Hao sigh in relief.

“What happened?” Su Zhengwen noticed his tense expression.

“The four major families have merged into the Federation. No, including the Zhang family, that should be five families.” Su Hao calmly said, but the content was extremely disturbing.

“Could they be…”

“Yes.” Su Hao said in a stern tone, “They finally can’t sit still. Although this time, it’s a war started by the Tian family, the driving factor behind it is still the federal government! In fact, I suspect that when this operation was planned, there were even some people from the federal government among the Tian family’s world espers.”

Su Zhengwen was stunned.

The one who started the war was actually the federal government?

In other words…

The man behind the scene is the federal government? The more Su Zhengwen thought of it, the more terrified he felt. In the end, he shook his head, “It shouldn’t be possible, right? Haven’t all the world espers of Tian family been exiled? Could they even willing to sacrifice their own men?”

“Why not?” Su Hao smirked.

“In this world, many people are willing to sacrifice themselves for some people or reason. Although it doesn’t make sense to us, from the perspective of the federal government, this is a major milestone in history!”

“As for some things, they always need to be sacrificed.”

“It’s either by force or voluntary.” Su Hao calmly said.

Hearing this, Su Zhengwen even felt a chill. These are world espers! How could they be sacrificed like that? If this is the case…

“This is why you recalled all the Su family’s disciples?” Su Zhengwen asked.

“Yes.” Su Hao nodded, “Since the Federation only wants to become a voice, then we will let them! No matter which territory, there must be no other voice!”

“The Su family disciples, all must return!”

“The Su family must not have any existence in any territory! Only in this way can the Su family stay out of this chaos.”

“So that’s the case.”

Only then did Su Zhengwen understand the meaning behind Su Hao’s order. This war had only just begun after the end of a giant battle!

“Could they take action on the Su family?” Su Zhengwen was a little restless.

“They won’t.” Su Hao shook his head, “There are many hidden forces in this world. Can the Federation eradicate them all? Shady organizations such as Piao Ling Organization are not in a small number, and did the government do anything to them? Impossible! As long as they don’t have territory or cause any trouble, these other forces could also survive.”

“Those are just small forces.” Su Zhengwen wasn’t stupid, “The Su family is such a huge force, the Federation will always be restless.”

“They can only resort to being assured.” Su Hao smiled, “With this powerful world esper, Lin Hu, Lin Hu’s friends, the Su family’s old ancestor, and the other world espers, the Federation dare not act rashly and offend such a terrifying force!”

“Plus, the Su family has always been isolating ourselves over this past decade. We are never involved in any power struggle, which reassures the Federation even more.”

“Thus, all disciples are to come back, and the most important thing is our attitude.”

Su Zhengwen nodded in silence.

“True, now the Federation still thinks that I am your friend, a powerful, heaven-defying character who enjoys playing games. With just pointing a finger, I can find several world espers. With the existence of “me”, the Federation would pay a massive price in dealing with the Su family!”

“Now, as the Federation just united the world, what they’re lacking is manpower and strength!”

“At this time, if we don’t go seek trouble with them, they would be secretly happy. Of course, if the Su family dares to challenge the Federation, they won’t be acting soft due to having to pay heavy prices. After all, the only chance for the Federation to unite the world would be gone!”

“So, this is now a game between the Su family and the Federation.”

“It’s just as simple as winning or losing.”

“If anyone accidentally touches the minefield, it would likely cause a war which shouldn’t have occurred, and both sides can’t escape from suffering huge losses!”

Su Hao analyzed sentence by sentence.

Hearing this, Su Zhengwen’s heart became alarmed. A war between world espers actually became so complex! Each time he converses with Su Hao, he feels that his IQ is low. Su Zhengwen suddenly felt that he belonged to those who were sold off and helped to calculate money for others.

Hold on…

Damn!

Could he have been “sold off” before?

“So, our next step…” Su Zhengwen pondered for a moment, “We just need to watch from the sideline?”

“Yes.” Su Hao nodded, “After all our disciples are back, we’re to isolate the Su family. In this short period of time, an all-around improvement in strength is sufficient. Anyway, the Su family is united as one, and we do not lack anything. As for outside contact, we will only show ourselves after having sufficient capital!”

“True.” Su Zhengwen was deeply convinced of Su Hao’s analysis.

“It takes a long time for the unification and to stabilize it. Another period of time is required. When the Federation finally has total control of the world…”

Su Hao’s eyes lit up, “That will be the moment when the Su family needs to take action!”

Su Zhengwen went silent.

“Of course, I only speculate this by considering the enemy as one with the greatest malicious intent.”

Su Hao smiled, “Perhaps after the unification, all power is used to fight against the beasts, clearing the beast battlefield for humanity and eradicating the beasts once and for all!”

“Do you believe it?” Su Zhengwen sneered.

“Nope, I don’t believe it.” Su Hao shrugged his shoulder.

One of humanity’s inferiorities, endless civil war. The berserk beasts had not been creating trouble for too long that people thought that this world is now peaceful. Unless the beasts decide to invade, the Federation would be restless after several years.

“Don’t worry too much.” Su Zhengwen laughed, “The secret of your internal strength isn’t bad. A few top-notch grade A talents have appeared. In our next battle, we can definitely surprise the enemy.”

“That is true.” Su Hao’s eyes were filled with strong expectations.

“But the only pitiful part was the resources for this victory.” Su Zhengwen was a little emotional, “At first, I thought I could use the Tian family’s resources to supplement ours, but never would I thought the Federation would snipe them away.”

“Uh…” Su Hao paused for a second, “There is something which I’m not sure whether I should say or not.”

“Just say it out.”

“Actually, the reward for destroying the Tian family, they had already paid us.”

“Oh? When?” Su Zhengwen was stunned.

“Before leaving the Tian family, I went to their energy warehouse for a walk.” Su Hao calmly said.

“…”

Su Zhengwen instantly went dumbstruck. After a long time did he regain his senses. He then patted Su Hao’s shoulder fiercely, “You’re still the most ruthless one!”

Chapter 844 - The Magical Creature

Chapter 844: The magical creature

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“What is this guy doing?!”

Su Hao closed a certain fool’s messages. Checking Li Xin’s location, a coordinate popped out, “Wait… Damn! This brat is outside the city?”

Su Hao was shocked, looking at the coordinate.

Li Xin was actually outside Huangliang City right now!

What’s he doing here?

Su Hao directly launched his 3D modeling and scanned around. Huangliang City couldn’t be modeled, but every action outside the city can be built in the temporary world model. Soon, Su Hao saw Li Xin, and his jaw almost fell.

“!!!”

“It’s actually true!” Su Hao’s eyes opened wide.

Swish!

His figure vanished.

Su Hao quickly sprinted out of the city.

He felt that each time Li Xin appears, he would bring him a surprise. Under Synchronous Payback, he could clearly see that behind Li Xin, a terrifying ferocious beast was chasing him with strong killing intent. Big dog? When he saw that ferocious beast, Su Hao really wanted to curse at Li Xin’s face for a second.

Big dog, your head!

That is obviously not a dog but a wolf! Does your dog at home look like that?!

You thought it was a husky?!

Although the distance was far, fortunately, Li Xin was running around Huangliang City. Su Hao hurried over from the other side of the city. If he were running in the opposite direction, even one hundred Su Hao’s wouldn’t be able to save him.

In three seconds, Su Hao was out of the city!

The distance from Li Xin was getting closer and closer. That big dog behind him, no, that ferocious beast was about to reach Li Xin as if it could bite him at any moment.

Three more seconds passed!

When Li Xin was just about to get bitten, Su Hao finally saw these two figures and quickly summoned his Shadowless God Needle without hesitation!

Swish!

Shadowless God Needle sped towards them.

The beast which was about to swallow Li Xin suddenly got startled. With its fur standing upright all over its body, it halted while staring at the Shadowless God Needle that appeared out of thin air.

A perfect boundary spirit!

It recognized it.

“Howl~!”

With a howl, it glared cautiously at Su Hao from a distance and finally fled quickly before Su Hao arrived. It was actually running even faster than during the chase earlier.

“Huh?”

Li Xin apparently didn’t notice the flashing silver needle. When he saw the wolf suddenly turn around and run away, he was stunned for a second before proudly declaring, “Hahahaha, it actually got scared of me and fled. A silly big dog, you actually dare to chase this young master. I dare you to come back, and I assure you that I won’t kill you.”

Slap!

Su Hao hit him with his palm in annoyance.

“Ouch, who dare to sneak attack this young master?!”

Li Xin raged. When he turned his head, he was shocked to see Su Hao, “Oh, Big Boss is here. Did you see that big, stupid dog get scared away by me?”

Su Hao recalled his Shadowless God Needle. How did this brat able to survive in this era of origin ability with such IQ?

“Huh?”

Li Xin finally saw it and then came to his senses, “So it was Big Boss who saved me. Hehe, well that big dog is pretty smart. It actually got scared away when we have an advantage in number.”

Su Hao: “…”

What did it have to do with more people?

“How did you trigger that thing?” Su Hao quickly shifted the topic. He felt that if he’s to continue such a conversation, his IQ will fall quickly.

“Oh, you mean that dog?” Li Xin scratched his head and then said in a bad mood, “Not sure. When I was looking for treasures, this damn big dog appeared out of nowhere and chased me. Too bad, it was not obedient. If it’s to stand there for me to hit for a bit, I can easily kill it in minutes… Just a damn big dog, and it dared to act this arrogant!”

Su Hao rolled his eyes.

Nonsense, who would stand there for you to hit?

However…

Something was amiss!

Since when was there a beast at the world realm in the Federation?

Su Hao suddenly realized this problem, and it’s a terrifying wolf! If he’s to measure with a beast’s standard, it should be an emperor rank beast. Its strength is unimaginable! Such a character, how could it appear in the Federation’s territory? Su Hao faintly felt that something was wrong. Could it be the berserk beasts had finally taken action?

“What treasure are you looking for?” Su Hao squinted his eyes.

“Nitai artifact.” Li Xin became excited again when he talked about it.

Su Hao wiped off his sweat. Such a change of emotion is really too quick. Just a second ago, he wasn’t happy, yet now he is excited.

“You’re searching for a Nitai artifact?”

“Yes, yes.” Li Xin sounded very excited, “They said that there is a powerful Nitai artifact here. I even bought a treasure detector. It has a needle that points to the direction of Nitai artifacts.”

Having said that, Li Xin actually pulled out a compass-like tool.

“Have a look, the pointer above will show the location of Nitai artifacts.” Li Xin was full of spirit as if he was playing with an interesting toy.

“En…” Su Hao looked at this obvious fake tool and then sighed, “Lead me to the place where you got chased.”

“Great!”

Li Xin was so lively, and there were not even any signs of him being chased by a world esper. Having seen this, Su Hao was speechless, “When you’re in danger, it’s not a good idea to use your communication device. Plus, you only had a few seconds of time! Next time, team up with someone or else who will save you?”

“Isn’t Big Boss here now?”

“I just happened to be nearby.”

“Haha, Big Boss, this is called the main character’s halo. Even if you’re not nearby, there will be others.”

“Nonsense! When you forward the message, don’t you notice that out of 200 people, 100 of them probably blocked you. As for the remaining 90 people, they are a thousand miles away from you. The remaining 10 contacts are invalid since they changed their number…”

“Huh? Someone changed the number?”

“That is not the key point!”

“Oh, Big Boss. What are you trying to say earlier then?”

“Forget about it. Just consider it as if I never mentioned anything.”

“…”

The west side of Huangliang City, when Li Xin took Su Hao to the place where he got chased, Su Hao felt like this was a deep pain in the ass.

He would have never imagined that Li Xin was actually digging the wall!

Yes!

He went and dug a hole out of the wall!

Less than 100 meters on the edge of the city wall, there was a giant pit dug by Li Xin. Su Hoa stared blankly at this pit, which was a few meters in depth, “Why did you dig a hole for?”

“To find Nitai artifact.”

Li Xin pointed at the pointer of the tool. His face flushed with excitement, “Look, this is the place where it points! This position must have a Nitai artifact. This is my very first treasure that I found since I embarked on a journey to gain experience! I need to find it since it has such a significant meaning to me.”

“Let me have a look.”

Su Hao held that fake tool.

Regrading treasure seeker, he had come across it before. The pointer would point the direction, while its reaction amplitude would indicate the approximate distance. However, it’s not something that this tool in his hand can compete with.

“How much did you bought this treasure finder for?”

“1 million star dollars. How is it? Cheap right? Big Boss, let me tell you, it was on a huge sale when I bought it, and I even got free gifts such as a kettle, mouse, and shoe insole…”

“…”

Su Hao looked at Li Xin’s excited expression and couldn’t bear to tell him that he got cheated. Also, what’s with that kettle, mouse, and insole?

Looking at the mall address engraved on the tool, Su Hao silently used his communication device to hack the store. All the goods in this black mall were suddenly all priced at one dollar, and the sales volume increased sharply. When they finally reacted to what happened, the mall won’t be far from bankruptcy…

Of course, they were clueless that the reason they were hacked was because they had cheated some random fool.

“Cheap.” Su Hao took the tool and changed its direction. The shaking pointer suddenly stopped. When Su Hao turned to aim at the city wall, the pointer began to shake madly again.

“How is it? There is something, right?” Li Xin asked excitedly.

“Is there really a Nitai artifact?” Su Hao pondered. Although it’s a counterfeit, the basic functions are still there. This crazy movement of the pointer indicated that there is definitely something wrong…

Wait!

Su Hao suddenly thought of something thrilling.

Nitai artifact…

Treasure detector…

Wolf…

Could it be?

Su Hao swallowed his saliva for a bit. Activating his energy scanning again, when he looked at the city, he felt a strong sense of being distanced and also a hint of hostility. Yes, the city was expressing hostility towards him.

That damn wolf…

It’s the city itself!

It’s this giant Nitai artifact!

The reason the treasure finder’s pointer moved was because it sensed this!

“Yeah, how could I forget about it.” Su Hao muttered to himself.

Being nurtured for twenty years, it already had a soul? Although there were still some hints of a semi-conscious state, there is no doubt that this city has a soul. It probably sensed that this fool Li Xin was disrupting its foundation that it couldn’t help but take action! What a magical era this is.

“Fill back the pit.” Su Hao instructed.

“But Big Boss, it’s a Nitai artifact.” Li Xin muttered.

“Fill it first, I’ll tell you later.” Su Hao said nonchalantly.

“Oh.” Li Xin nodded, and as his brutal strength erupted, he quickly filled the giant pit before they both left. Sure enough, Su Hao could feel that the hostility of the entire city towards him and Li Xin gradually disappearing.

As he expected…

This is a new soul.

Its mentality is so simple. If you’re good to me, I will be good to you. If you harm me, I will harm you.

This city actually did have a soul.

After Su Hao explained to Li Xin, Li Xin’s eyes opened wide. Obviously, with his IQ level, it’s difficult to understand the soul’s birth from a Nitai artifact’s 20 years of cultivation. However, Su Hao didn’t intend to explain that to him, “Two Nitai artifacts gave birth to it.”

“Wow, so awesome!”

Li Xin sighed, “Nitai artifact can really give birth to its child?”

“Of course, plants can even turn into beasts. Why can’t Nitai artifacts?”

“True.”

Su Hao’s words didn’t make sense at all, but that didn’t hinder Li Xin’s interest. It was his first to meet a Nitai artifact with life, and for it to be able to bear a child, that’s an amazing thing. From start to the end, he kept thinking about these in excitement. As for treasure hunting…

He had long forgotten about it.

“Is it really good to lie to him like that?”

In Kingdom of Heaven, Ping Yang really couldn’t stand it anymore.

“Why don’t you explain it to him?” Su Hao casually said.

“Pretend that I never mentioned anything.” Ping Yang decisively rejected.

chapters.title: Chapter 888 - Killing Intent; Trump Card Exposed!

Chapter 888 - Killing Intent; Trump Card Exposed!

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

Boom!

Boom!

The mirror image was struggling.

If not for his strong physical strength, he would have died a couple of times by now.

On the beach, Ping Yang was holding a cup of cola and some popcorn from who knows where and was enjoying the scene. In fact, he watched while chatting with Li Tiantian, "Hey, if one day Su Hao is to personally experience this, how great would that be? This is even better than those movies by many times."

How deep is his hatred?

Everyone wiped off their sweat.

Taihu Territory.

A silent storm was ongoing as the entire warship fell into a weird silence. In front of everyone, their respective mirror image stood there as each pair was immersed in battle. Twenty-eight people were all asleep, including Chen Ge, that defective product.

Swish!

A soft sound echoed.

One could then see the mirror image in front of Wan Cheng suddenly dissipate into countless light spots. The disappearing force that was floating in mid-air then seeped into Wan Cheng's body. The first battle was over! Wan Cheng slowly opened his eyes and inspected his own body in surprise. Obviously, destroying his own mirror image had greatly increased his strength. With Wan Cheng's awakening, many people woke up one after another.

Most of them were the new world espers who had their breakthrough earlier.

Their foundation wasn't solid enough. In actual combat, due to that reason, they were able to quickly progress until they could kill their opponent. On the contrary, it was those veterans who were caught in a fierce battle and still hadn't woken up.

"How is it?"

"My Rule Force increases by one fold!"

Everyone exclaimed in joy.

Just like the spiritual sea storm, this early blessing was simply amazing. Destroying oneself and their Rule Force would be doubled? Where could they find such a place but here? Everyone couldn't help but fail to hide their ecstasy. This mirror image isn't that hard. It's literally just giving them Rule Force for free.

At this moment, another soft sound rang.

Unexpectedly, the figure of a world esper suddenly collapsed. The mirror image opposite of him dissipated, but it turned into murderous intent and directly launched into his body.

"Pu~"

A sound softly rang in his eardrums.

That world esper's eyes widened. He seemed to have awakened instantly. Looking at this scene in disbelief, his pupils contracted before he fell to the ground.

A world esper died just like that.

"Master!"

A disciple who had just beheaded his mirror image looked at this scene in horror. That wasn't a stranger but his master! His master, who was invincible in his heart, just died like that? The joyful atmosphere suddenly vanished. This strange scene made everyone feel cold.

There were twenty-seven more...

"Pu~"

Another world esper fell to the ground.

There were still twenty-six left.

Everyone smiled bitterly and became nervous immediately. These seniors, they can't be all dead, right? This is too scary, what had actually happened?! Fortunately, what everyone was afraid of didn't happen. Soon, many powerful world espers woke up one after another, Wan Cheng's master, King of Fire, and so forth.

Those who managed to wake up, their strength had an abrupt increase!

However, when these espers woke up, their expression didn't look great. Obviously, their fight earlier with their own mirror image wasn't smooth sailing. When everyone was about to wake up, another soft sound rang, and another person died. That unwilling expression before death had such a deep impression.

"How many died?" King of Fire coldly asked.

"Three." King of Fire's disciple answered.

"Three huh? That's a normal thing." King of Fire's eyes swept across those who were still sleeping but halted because there were five of them. Just as he finished his words, three of them woke up, and the remaining two people were Su Hao and Chen Ge!

"Chen Ge!" King of Fire's forehead had its blue veins twitched.

Subconsciously, several veteran world espers looked at each other and seemed to think of something. The trial of Taihu Territory was now over. As long as everyone completes the trial, they can leave this place via another channel in the center region of the lake. However, whether this trial is completed or not, Chen Ge must not be allowed to recover his strength!

The current Chen Ge was weak, and he could still be dealt with.

However, once he had a breakthrough...

Everyone didn't forget what kind of character Chen Ge used to be. He was someone who followed Su Tiancheng and Su Wan to destroy the world!

They couldn't afford to allow such a man to regain his strength!

Otherwise, they couldn't imagine what he would do.

Everyone looked at each other and quickly made a decision. Before the spiritual sea storm, no one dared to do it, but that didn't mean that they wouldn't dare this time. This trial is literally over, and they could leave Taihu Territory immediately. Taking advantage of this opportunity would be perfect to kill Chen Ge.

"Huh, why is Su Hao in a battle too?" One man suddenly voiced out.

All the world espers were stunned for a moment. Only then did they realize it. Ya, Su Hao is just a domain esper, but why is he in a battle too? Could it be that he has Rule Force too?

"He's as strange as that Chen Ge."

Everyone's brows frowned slightly, "This kid is too terrifying, and he has a good relationship with Chen Ge. If he's to understand Rule Force and step into the world realm..."

Everyone began to tremble.

As for what kind of character this Wu Ming is, they were well aware of. He's too terrifying! With just the strength of the domain realm, he could toy around with them. Once he steps into the world realm...

Just a thought of it made them shiver.

Also, if they wanted to touch Chen Ge, they had to pass through him first!

Without knowing why, even though Wu Ming is just a domain esper, those few who had seen Wu Ming's means felt that this kid isn't that simple. This kid...

He must not be spared!

"Kill!"

A few veteran world espers had decided to take action immediately.

Boom!

Powerful Rule Forces erupted.

A stream of light blasted down onto Su Hao but was intercepted by someone. They looked and saw that the one who stopped the attack was none other than Wan Cheng.

"What're you doing?!"

Everyone raged.

"Wan Cheng, step back." Yan Tianyu also frowned slightly. Although he will never take action against Wu Ming and Chen Ge, he would definitely not join the fun either, "Come back."

"Sorry." Wan Cheng coldly said, "He saved me two times earlier. I can't let you touch him."

Thus, everyone remembered. Before during the times with the spiritual sea storm, Wu Ming had reminded many times to let everyone avoid danger. Wan Cheng's words made them feel ashamed. Plus, they also promise that they won't touch Wu Ming before this, right?

However, at that time, how would they know that Wu Ming was this scary!

"Wan Cheng, step aside." King of Fire sneered, "We're not hostile to you, but don't hinder us. You're still young and don't know what kind of a mad man that Chen Ge is!"

"I indeed don't know." Wan Cheng smirked, "However, I know what gratitude is!"

"You!"

Several people were triggered. King of Fire took a deep breath and then looked at Yan Tianyu, "Brother Yan, ask you disciple to step aside, or else if we injure him, that won't be great."

"Wan Cheng, come back." Yan Tianyu's tone had escalated into an angry tone.

"Absolutely not." Wan Cheng looked at his master seriously. Not to mention that he knew that this person is Su Hao, even if he didn't know, he would definitely not make it easy for those who try to harm his life's savior, "Master, sorry. If I am to close my eyes at this, I will feel guilty for the rest of my life."

"Are you really not going to step aside?" Yan Tianyu looked at him coldly.

"Absolutely not!" Wan Cheng gritted his teeth.

"Alright." Yan Tianyu smiled bitterly. With a helpless look he said, "With your character, sooner or later it will cause your death. Damn it, how did this daddy accept you as a disciple."

He said this, but Yan Tianyu still ended up silently standing beside Wan Cheng.

"King of Hell!" King of Fire's eyes were full of killing intent.

"It can't be helped. I only have one disciple." Yan Tianyu smiled bitterly, "If you want to fight, come then!"

"Master." Wan Cheng was grateful for his master's action.

"Alright, since you two want to die, then we will let you two die together." King of Fire finally raged. Several people looked at each other, a total of eight veteran world espers. How could they be afraid of Wan Cheng and Yan Tianyu? Just like that, a battle broke out.

The brilliant light ray coming from Rule Forces circulated.

Without any suspense, Wan Cheng and his master were suppressed almost instantly. They could only barely hold on. Those world espers, who just had a boost in strength a moment ago, revealed their great strength.

"Pftt-"

Wan Cheng vomited blood but still didn't retreat.

"I hope you didn't make the wrong choice, you brat." Yan Tianyu sighed and felt the strength flowing through his body, "It can't be that we will die here..."

One could see that those two could barely hold on anymore, but the mirror image in front of Su Hao suddenly dissipated and fused into Su Hao's body.

"This guy... he actually won?"

"He's not a world esper, so his opponent should be a domain esper too. This isn't surprising."

"Then, does that mean his domain realm strength doubled?"

"No matter how strong a domain esper is, it's still useless in front of a world esper. There is no need to worry."

"Kill him!" King of Fire sneered, "Never give him a chance. Otherwise, once he leaves here, I am afraid no one can escape from his machinations."

Regarding Wu Ming's terror, they had taken it for granted before this.

"Kill!"

Wan Cheng and Yan Tianyu finally couldn't hold it any longer and retreated to Su Hao's side. Wan Cheng looked at Su Hao with a wry smile, "That's all that I could do."

"Enough." Su Hao smiled coldly and gently extended his hand.

Buzz~

Countless flashes of light appeared.

Wave by wave of powerful aura emerged as a dense murderous intent covered everyone on the warship. Unknown numbers of silver needles appeared around the crowd, which caused those attacking to halt abruptly.

Even King of Fire was frightened that he stopped. He dared not take any action.

Everyone looked at this scene in disbelief. They were all world espers, and they naturally knew what the things in front of them were.

Fourth stage boundary spirit!

One hundred of them!

This is crazy!

King of Fire's eyes opened wide. Wan Cheng and Yan Tianyu were also stunned, "This... this... how is this possible?"

Wan Cheng thought that he had seen incorrectly.

He regarded Wu Ming as Su Hao, but if this person is a world esper, then it's impossible that it is Su Hao. How could Su Hao be a world esper?

Wan Cheng was at a complete loss. What was going on here?

Chapter 893 - 893 The Resurrection Of The Dead

893 The resurrection of the dead

“Is the battle really over like this?”

“What nonsense are you uttering? All the corpses are already…”

When King of Fire was about to say something, he suddenly heard an exclamation. When he looked up, he showed a very ugly look. He finally knew now what Su Hao was trying to say.

“Damn!”

Far away, shadows emerged. They were those three people who died earlier.

They…

They came back!

Everyone felt a shiver for a second. Although they knew that those three were corpses, they had fought side by side just minutes ago. One minute later, those three were resurrected and now stood as enemies. This strange situation really made one fearful. What was even more terrifying was those three’s power!

They had two breakthroughs plus a session of consolidation.

Their strength was far higher than before, coupled with the effect of the resurrection…

“One.” Su Hao said in a cold voice, “We only have one chance to make a move. Make a surprise attack now and never allow them any chance to fight back, or else…”

Their team might really get wiped out!

Needless to say, if there is one more fallen victim, he would be resurrected again. They were already exhausted and could barely deal with their own ‘people’ now.

“It must be an instant kill!”

The little boats approached, and King of Fire controlled the warship to ram into them for a sudden impact.

Bang!

A loud noise rang.

“Attack now!”

Boom!

Everyone erupted with their full strength.

Endless Rule Forces slammed down. Twenty-two of them exhausted all of their little remaining strength and bombarded those three.

Boom!

The air trembled.

The power of horrifying Rule Forces completely overwhelmed those three.

When the light from the explosion vanished, the crowd saw those three figures destroyed, and their ship overturned and sank to the bottom of the lake.

“It ended…”

“Haha, it ended.”

Everyone was ecstatic.

They didn’t die!

Everyone was alive!

At this time, all their strength had been exhausted. If there is another one, or even an additional casualty, their entire team would most likely be destroyed.

This terrifying, vicious cycle!

One mistake and an entire team would be wiped out. This victory was a hard-fought one.

“Everyone’s alive. That’s great.”

Su Hao took a sigh in relief.

His deductions and calculations can only be effective within a controllable range. Any errors that could lead to an infinite possibility mustn’t be allowed!

“Quickly recover.” Su Hao didn’t give them much time to breath, “Who knows what kind of obstacle we will face later.”

Everyone sat cross-legged and recovered their strength.

The flame warship steadily maintained itself at the same spot and didn’t move. At this time, they were afraid that an enemy might be attracted by any trace of wind. In fact, they didn’t even dare to speak.

Fortunately, although Taihu Territory is dangerous, the amount of Rule Forces here was beyond everyone’s imagination. After a while, everyone was back to their peak, and some even had a slight improvement. A tragic battle that almost annihilated the entire team brought valuable experience to everyone.

After everyone recovered, the flame warship slowly moved.

Crack~

Just taking a step, the crowd already heard a strange noise. They were startled that they quickly stopped, “Is another enemy coming?”

“It doesn’t seem to be the case.”

Everyone looked around, trying to detect any enemies.

Su Hao used his Synchronize Space and then saw the problem. Revealing a surprised look, he pointed gently to the bottom of the warship, “Look there.”

Everyone looked over the direction and then saw a piece of wreckage floating on the left side of the warship.

That was the wreckage of the little boats earlier.

“What is that?”

Everyone looked curiously.

“It seems that there is something in it that made the sound earlier.” Su Hao frowned slightly, “Let’s clean it up, or else the noise might cause something.”

Everyone nodded one after another.

They just wished to go home in peace now.

“Bring it up.”

Everyone carefully picked up the wreckage. Crack, the wreckage landed on the warship, and a sheet of gold paper floated.

“Paper?”

Everyone was stunned.

There is still a piece of paper from this wreckage? The golden paper looked strange, not to mention the magical force looming within the paper. This thing…

“Let me see.”

A courageous world esper reached out and grabbed it with his hand. The moment he caught the golden paper, he was stunned. Just when everyone thought that he had seen something bad, he revealed a look of ecstasy, “This is… this is the secret technique of a third grade boundary spirit!”

“What?”

Everyone’s eyes widened at once, “There is really a secret technique?”

“Of course, look!” That world esper said in excitement, “Look!”

Swish!

The secret technique of boundary spirit floated.

With the urge coming from a world esper, it changed its appearance in the air before finally, a pattern emerged and turned into a 3D shape. Everyone could now clearly see it. It was a dazzling cold dagger, a flawless boundary spirit!

Boom!

The air trembled.

Golden light flashed.

The secret technique of boundary spirit gradually vanished as the dagger was formed. In that man’s hand, a flawless boundary spirit remained there.

“Just like that, and it’s done?”

“One minute?”

Everyone was shocked.

One needs to take note of how long it would take to condense a boundary spirit!

Even if it were a smooth process with no obstacles, it would take a long time to condense a boundary spirit. Plus, the more complex a boundary spirit is, the longer it would take. But now… a complex boundary spirit in the shape of a dagger was formed in just a minute?

Without a doubt, that man had never created such a boundary spirit.

Everything was done by the golden paper.

“Such a terrifying secret technique of a boundary spirit.”

Everyone was ecstatic.

“Can it be passed to others?”

“Doesn’t seem to work.” That man scratched his head, “Because there is nothing to be taught. Those magical powers seemed to be coming from the golden paper itself.”

“Do all the boats have it?” A man suddenly asked.

Everyone was excited and immediately looked around the warship, hoping to find a golden paper hidden within the wreckage. However, at this time, no one noticed that Su Hao, who had been indifferent, finally showed a change of expression when the dagger was formed. This speed, this power… Realization! Su Hao strongly suppressed the shock in his heart.

Damn it.

Wasn’t that realization? It was such a case too when Su Hao condensed Shadowless God Needle, simple and quick. This secret technique of boundary spirit was akin to recording the process of materializing and condensing the boundary spirit. When a Rule Force urges it, it will turn into a brand new boundary spirit.

“Exactly what is happening?”

Su Hao could barely calm down anymore.

Realization!

Except him, there is someone else who mastered this skill too?

No! Because this grade S talent is unique. Su Hao was very sure that no one had mastered realization besides him. If there was someone who mastered it, then he won’t be able to do so. Thus, before he mastered realization, could someone else have mastered this talent?

Who is it?

Why would it be here?

Why would the secret technique of boundary spirit have such a thing?

Su Hao had too many doubts.

Watching everyone anxiously looking for the secret technique of boundary spirit, Su Hao also joined the fun. Maybe the secret technique of boundary spirit could bring him some explanation. Everyone began to look for it. Even Wan Cheng didn’t give up this opportunity. Obviously this was something that can change the tide of a battle.

Every small boat seemed to have one secret technique of boundary spirit.

Just now, how many did they wipe out? A third grade boundary spirit that can be obtained out of thin air, no one would reject such an offer. Moreover, there was no doubt that these boundary spirits were much more complicated and stronger than their own condensed boundary spirits.

Around the flame warship, the slightly raised water surface was full of floating debris.

Carefully picked by everyone, only Wan Cheng went down and ignored the danger that might happen within the lake. With his power to control waves, it was a brisk walk. Except for those secret techniques that got brought down into the bottom lake by the dead bodies, every secret technique was brought up to the ship.

Seventy-two pieces.

This was the final number.

Looking at those seventy-two secret techniques of boundary spirit, everyone was very excited. A total of twenty-two people, on average, one person can get three! If they knew that there was a hidden secret technique on each boat, they wouldn’t have been that violent earlier!

However, having said that…

If they were to know this and hold back, they might end up being wiped out due to greed.

“One person goes and takes three first.” King of Fire glanced at those secret techniques of boundary spirit and said, “As for the six extras, they will be distributed to the one who contributed the most.”

“Alright.”

Everyone nodded one after another.

“Wu Ming, why don’t you go first?” King of Fire generously offered. Su Hao pouted. This guy was pretending to be a good man. Obviously, all of them are the same. Without activating it, one will not know what kind of boundary spirit they obtain.

“Alright.”

Su Hao just glanced at them.

Seventy-two pieces, the same secret technique of boundary spirit, at least on the surface, that was how they looked. Using Synchronize Space’s magnification and total focus, Su Hao’s view was now like a microscope as he analyzed the difference of each secret technique. A moment later, Su Hao’s eyes lit up. This is…

Among the seventy-two pieces, there were three strange ones.

The same golden color and dullness, but they had a trace of seemingly non-existent patterns engraved on the paper. If one doesn’t observe carefully, it’s impossible to notice them!

“These three then…” Su Hao moved his hand.

Although he didn’t know what is special about these three pieces of paper, they are definitely different from the others.

“I should be qualified to get one more right.” Su Hao said indifferently. Everyone nodded one after another. Although Su Hao’s fighting strength was average, he had saved the crowd many times by leading them. Naturally, he had the qualifications. After Su Hao was affirmed, he took those pieces away.

Three unique boundary spirits, they were now in his hand.

Su Hao silently put them away.

“You’re not going to activate them now?” King of Fire was stunned. He actually wished to see what kind of boundary spirit Wu Ming chose.

“I will think about it later.”Su Hao said indifferently, “It’s not like I’m short on boundary spirits.”

Everyone: “…”

Chapter 929 - Outbreak Of A Battle

“Sure enough, it’s none other than that.” Su Hao whispered.

“Elegy of the Undead…” Zheng Tai looked at the scene while muttering to himself, “Can the dead really be resurrected? This talent was just a legend, and it happened to be true?”

“A legend?” Su Hao’s eyes narrowed, “Instead of saying that it is a legend, it would be more appropriate to say that it was erased after the early days of this era’s unrest ended. However, why would it suddenly appear again? Could it be that the esper with that talent in the past didn’t die?”

“That I am not sure.” Zheng Tai shook his head slightly.

“Really?” Su Hao pondered deeply, “Oh yeah, what talent was that buddy of yours who went with Nine Snakes?”

“He?” Zheng Tai scratched his head hard, “Let me think… That guy didn’t have much presence… I really can’t recall it! With my memory, yet I can’t recall much about him, how low was that guy’s presence? Oh, yeah, it seems like a talent related to sound.”

Zheng Tai’s eyes lit up.

“Sound?” Su Hao was amazed, “It’s not Necromancy?”

“Something is amiss.”

“Elegy of the Undead, even if Nine Snakes is able to transform a grade A talent into something like Elegy of the Undead, a grade S talent, it still requires a similar type of talent. Only this can complete the feast of spirits, but if it’s a sound type…”

Su Hao frowned slightly, “Sound…”

“Ah~”

That sad voice was still ongoing.

Su Hao looked pensive, “I think I understand.”

“Huh?” Zheng Tai was stunned for a second, “What do you understand?”

“To complete Elegy of Undead, it requires talent like Necromancy, but what if it’s just a copy? Sound type talent, if some grade S sound type talent is used to copy or record it, wouldn’t it be possible to replay Elegy of the Undead?”

Su Hao analyzed further, “Only this way could that member of your organization be useful!”

“In other words, Nine Snakes completed the Elegy of the Undead, but they needed a person to truly release its full potential. As for your organization’s member, this guy with sound type talent, he’s merely acting as a medium for Elegy of the Undead.” Su Hao indifferently continued.

“Huh?” Zheng Tai was shocked for a moment, “You’re saying, he’s just acting as a loudspeaker?”

“Uh…” Su Hao’s forehead had a few black lines form, “If you insist on describing it like this, then you’re not wrong.”

“No wonder his presence is so weak…” Zheng Tai muttered, “In front of such catastrophic destruction, he actually didn’t even have the opportunity to be the Boss, but a mere trumpet.”

“Hey, hey, that’s not the main point.”

Su Hao wiped his cold sweat. It seemed that Zheng Tai couldn’t even remember the information of the members of the same batch.

“Oh, then what do we do now?”

Zheng Tai looked toward the direction of the Huangliang City’s ruins.

The undead were constantly climbing out while those present were refraining themselves from attacking. Even though they knew that those people were already dead, looking at those familiar faces…

Can you attack without any restraint?

Not to mention with over three million people, how long would it take to kill them all?

“What to do then?”

Su Hao smirked, “Just kill them all!”

“Huh?”

Before Zheng Tai managed to react, Su Hao already shot out a slash of cold light, a purplish moon dashed across the sky, causing countless dark shadows to crash to the ground. They were akin to harvested wheat being cut in half. At the same time, everyone shifted their attention toward Su Hao’s location.

“You…”

“You killed my son!”

“You bastard!”

“You actually attacked without restraint!”

Everyone roared.

Su Hao just retorted with a casual glance, “I will ask you guys one thing. After you die, do you wish to be used to kill your family with the same look, or would you much prefer leaving this world in peace? Think about your feelings. Think about your family again.”

Everyone was shocked.

Many clenched their fists so hard their fingernails penetrated their palms.

One could see blood flowing down from their palms.

“Kill!”

One man closed his eyes and charged forward. The one in front of him was his father. After ten years of struggle, he finally was able to let his family enjoy the blessing of staying in Huangliang City, but now…

“Father, have a safe trip.”

Blood and tears intertwined.

“Kill!”

More people roared to embolden themselves.

The indecisive crowd finally rushed forward, and the sad voice disappeared just like when it quietly appeared at the start.

“Kill!”

Everyone joined in this group fight.

Soon, as the sky turned dark, the ruins of Huangliang City, which was once a glorious land, had now turned into a land stained with blood.

The stimulation from the blood bath was a complex feeling that could make one go mad.

The Elegy of the Undead is a powerful grade S talent. Its solo combat strength was unknown, but its destructive power was unmatched. In the past, there was once during the chaotic period that it managed to create a miracle! He’s just a grade S talent esper but could resurrect world espers.

This…

This fact itself was already unbelievable.

Now, the legend reappeared.

The Elegy of the Undead was strong enough that it could ignore the number of people, ignore cause and effect, and could affect every dead person who ‘hears’ the song. The transmission of that voice was a unique talent, as long as the dead ones were within its range, nothing could escape.

This time, it was a total of three million.

“How long is it needed to kill them all?”

A cold light flashed.

Zheng Tai rubbed his wrists, which were slightly sore.

One dagger in each hand, his poisoned daggers became brighter in his hands. At the same time, his eyes were full of killing intent. In these few minutes, he had lost count of how many people he had killed.

Wrong, it should be undead.

“You should be glad.” Su Hao smiled indifferently, “The Elegy of the Undead only resurrects the undead, and the undead’s strength won’t change. As for Huangliang City’s unique properties, there were not many world espers here. If the Elegy of Undead was in Taihu Territory, hehe…”

Hearing this, Zheng Tai trembled.

Taihu Territory?

The Elegy of the Undead?

Just the thought of such a scene itself was already overwhelming enough.

He had already heard of what Su Hao experienced. Now, it is still unclear how long this Elegy of the Undead is effective; otherwise, if those world espers killed in Taihu Territory were to be resurrected…

This world would truly be over.

Zheng Tai just thought about this scene for a bit, and his heart already turned cold.

“Those lunatics won’t really do this at that place, right?” Zheng Tai was greatly alarmed.

“They won’t. I’m just lying.” Su Hao said indifferently.

Zheng Tai: “…”

“Stop your scared expression. Since they deliberately left the bodies intact, they knew that the Elegy of the Undead needs the bodies to exist. Although those who died in Taihu Territory were powerful, their bodies are long gone. Even if the bodies were there before, with the collapse of Taihu Territory, those bodies would have been reduced to nothing.”

Su Hao shrugged, “What’s there to worry about then?”

“…”

Zheng Tai’s forehead had blue veins twitch. Damn you, since there is no need to worry, why did you even mention it?!

“But…” Zheng Tai suddenly thought of something, “Having said that, these undead seem to be weaker than you.”

“Basically, yeah.” Su Hao calmly said.

This isn’t a joke, although the number of undead in Huangliang City was so large that it terrified one, there was no world esper here. Naturally, they won’t be able to be his opponents!

“Oh, then your Universe Creator…” Zheng Tai suddenly said.

“Don’t even think about it!” Su Hao interrupted him decisively.

Universe Creator?

Universe your head!

Yes, in theory, the Universe Creator could include those who are weaker than him, but…

That was just in theory!

Theory!

Plus, how many of them were here?

Three million!

Forget about everything, just having ten percent of them in Kingdom of Heaven and Su Hao can enjoy watching the show of how Kingdom of Heaven bursts.

“Then what do we do now?” Zheng Tai smiled bitterly, “My hands are already weakening…”

Yes, hands are becoming weak.

Su Hao raised his head and looked at those around him. The murderous intent was still skyrocketing, but the speed of destroying the undead had slowed down a lot. As for those who attacked from the start, they were already approaching their limit.

Too tired to continuously kill for more than ten minutes.

This wasn’t a duel or spar, but constant killing! One slash and ten undead might die in one go! For them, each one had repeated the same action for more than ten minutes! Not to mention, the consumption of origin energy and Rule Force, and the accumulated fatigue in their body.

There were only hundreds of people killing the undead!

But now…

Most of them could no longer fight.

In fact, quite a number of them died while under the siege of the undead. Su Hao observed the battle. Although more humans kept joining the fight, the ones that died were increasing. As for those undead in the distance… they were still endless!

“This is a big problem.” Zheng Tai shook his head and looked at those who were obviously at their limit, “If this is the case, I’m afraid everyone here will be killed in the end?”

“Nope.” Su Hao said indifferently, “At this time, they should be arriving soon?”

“Who?”

Zheng Tai felt strange. Who would come?

Boom!

Boom!

Countless energy aircrafts arrived.

More and more espers arrived. The familiar logo made the crowd’s blood boil, “The Origin Ability Association, it’s the Origin Ability Association’s logo!”

Swish!

Everyone, who was fighting, now felt enthusiastic.

“Kill!”

The members of the Origin Ability Association, who already understood the current situation, came to join the group battle without hesitation. Those who were already tired were allowed to retreat and rest.

The battle continued like before.

“You sent the information to them?”

Zheng Tai was amazed that Su Hao knew that the Origin Ability Association was coming.

Su Hao smiled, “When I was trying to get rid of Nine Snakes, I temporarily formed a team with the Origin Ability Association. Let’s go and take a break. We will join the fight again later.”

“En.”

Both retreated.

Under the control of the Origin Ability Association, the battle quickly developed into a favourable situation. Having the experience in commanding while in the beast domain, it was actually easier to deal with these undead. This three million troop was continuously reduced under such expendable killing. When the undead were about to be wiped out completely…

The situation changed.

“Ah~”

That familiar song could be heard again!
