chapters.title: Chapter 933 - Huangliang Despairs
chapters.body:
Chapter 933 - Huangliang Despairs

Huangliang City.

This gate appeared within the ruins of an abandoned city, only those who stood near where the gate appeared could notice the shimmering light from the gate. For such a gate to appear after a disaster, everyone vaguely guessed what this was. A Great Despair finally revealed itself.

“Huangliang Despairs…”

“One of the legendary Nine Great Despairs!”

“The most mysterious Despair.”

Everyone’s eyes shone.

Having heard what those in Taihu Territory experienced, there should be quite a number of people here who were excited with the appearance of a Great Despair, right?

“Should I go?”

Su Hao looked at the mysterious gate in front of him before shifting his gaze toward Yang Zixi beside him before finally shook his head, “Forget about it, I won’t participate in the fun this time around.”

He didn’t have any interest in the so-called secret technique of boundary spirit.

For him, what he lacked was never boundary spirits but Rule Force. Besides, the most important matter now was to gather more talents and step into the world realm. This trip to Huangliang City alone had allowed him to gather three new talents in a single day, and he had seven more to collect.

At such timing, it was needless to join the fun.

“Then, I won’t go too.” Zheng Tai said in a regretful tone.

He was aware of his own strength. In such a place full of world espers, the dangers were to the extreme. If Su Hao didn’t wish to go, as a domain esper, he had no right to join the fun.

Both agreed and prepared to leave.

However, they didn’t imagine that several members of the Origin Ability Association would approach them and ask Su Hao smilingly, “Wu Ming, we’re sorry, but could you follow us on this trip?”

“Huh?”

Su Hao and Zheng Tai were both stunned for a second.

“Well, after all, you had experience in Taihu Territory and know what might happen in a Great Despair. To guide the way for everyone might be better for everyone.” That man said with a hint of embarrassment, “Plus, I am sure the key members of Nine Snakes would be inside, and I’m afraid we need your help.”

“Yes, that makes sense.”

The others seconded.

“There could be members of Nine Snakes inside. We must not do things half-heartedly.”

“Let’s go together.”

“There are so many treasures inside, don’t you want them?”

“Those people of Nine Snakes, they are full of wickedness. If they’re spared, we can’t imagine what kind of things they might plan next. Maybe in the future, their target would be someone else’s hometown, how dangerous would it be then?”

One after another, everyone tried to change his mind.

“It’s over.”

Zheng Tai, who was beside Su Hao, felt a bit dizzy.

Although these people were stating in a polite manner, it was so clear that they were being intimidated. Each word of theirs carried a soft knife that sounded kind from outside but vicious inside. Su Hao just saved them a moment ago. In front of a Great Despair, they could immediately change their attitude. How could a human act in such a spiteful way?

Moreover, Zheng Tai could be considered as one who knew quite well of Su Hao’s temper.

Wu Ming?

Who is this Wu Ming you’re talking about?!

This wasn’t anyone but Su Hao, who massacred many along his path to reach his current state!

How would he accept such a threat? Zheng Tai could imagine a huge battle is about to erupt. Thinking of this, Zheng Tai subconsciously took out his dagger.

The huge battle, once it begins…

“Alright then.” Su Hao nodded with a smile.

“Puff~”

Zheng Tai almost spat out blood. He actually agreed to their threat?! Such an obvious threat, yet he couldn’t realize it. Perhaps he got tempted? How could he agree to their threat?!

Is this still the same Su Hao?

“Actually, I wish to go too.” Su Hao smiled and looked at Yang Zixi, who was pulling on him, “It’s just that I have to be responsible for this little girl. Can you help me to send her back? She still has an upcoming concert today.”

“Alright.”

Everyone rejoiced.

The Origin Ability Association soon sent someone to send Yang Zixi back home. Of course, before leaving, one could still hear a goodbye from a certain girl to Su Hao, “Don’t forget what you promised me.”

Su Hao shook his head and smiled bitterly.

With the departure of Yang Zixi, those going to enter Huangliang Despairs had basically settled down. With the Origin Ability Association leading the team and the rest consisting of those rogue world espers, what made one shocked was this time around, a total of fifty people participated in the exploration! It was much stronger than the time in Taihu Territory.

Of course, some espers also decided against participating.

The previous exploration in Taihu Territory had resulted in a lot of casualties. After all, some didn’t wish to take the risk.

Soon, those who were supposed to leave had all left. Those remaining here were those who are going to participate in the exploration, and other members of the Origin Ability Association. Those other members were arranged to guard the area and prevent others from stepping in. After everything was done, did this huge exploration team step in front of the gate.

Out of fifty espers, only Zheng Tai alone was a domain esper.

However, he had the guts to join the exploration because he believed in Su Hao, and the other reason was his absolute confidence in his ability to survive. After all, his talent…

Zheng Tai stayed close to Su Hao.

Creakkkk!

The mysterious bronze color door slowly opened.

It was dark inside. With only a faint source of light, everyone walked in carefully. Just as everyone stepped inside, the exploration in this Great Despair officially began. In this endless dimness, only Zheng Tai, who was closest to Su Hao, noticed the cold light in Su Hao’s eyes.

In the end, he was in fact mad.

Zheng Tai came to an understanding.

The other identity he had, Wu Ming was a kind man, helpful, and willing to sacrifice for others. Thus, the Origin Ability Association took advantage of his character for granted. However, no one here would have imagined what kind of act he did in Taihu Territory. How dare they try to threaten him?

“Oh Great Despair.”

Su Hao felt a headache coming.

The role setting of Wu Ming seemed to have been overdone. With how powerful the Origin Ability Association is, they didn’t even bother with Su Hao’s opinion. The legendary Huangliang Despairs revealed itself, and they would never let such a chance slip away. This was why they used all sorts of reasoning to persuade Su Hao to stay. Although they sounded polite…

However, even Zheng Tai could sense the threat, let alone him!

That was nothing but a threat!

They really thought of Wu Ming as one who was kind and could be mistreated?

The moment the Origin Ability Association voiced out, Su Hao already knew he couldn’t hide. If he rejected, that would not meet the character setting of Wu Ming. Moreover, when the time comes, the Origin Ability Association might even resort to underhanded methods to make him stay. If so, that would be troublesome.

Thus, in an instant, Su Hao made his decision.

He would tag along!

Although this was a bit risky, a crisis would always coexist with opportunities. The number of Nine Snakes members that had entered Huangliang Despairs was unknown. If there were seven of them, perhaps he could directly step into the world realm? Not to forget, there were those hidden treasures in Huangliang Despairs too.

This was one of the reasons.

As for the second one, Su Hao still couldn’t get rid of a vague worry.

It was a little vague but always existed. What was the purpose of Nine Snakes? Why did they decide to open Huangliang Despairs with the death of three million souls? Could it be there were hidden things in this Great Despair that they were searching for? Su Hao didn’t think that Nine Snakes would do irrelevant things.

Nine Snakes, there must definitely be a big conspiracy going on!

Except…

What exactly were they plotting?

“Let’s go and have a look then.” Su Hao whispered to himself.

Moreover, if it wasn’t troublesome, he didn’t mind achieving another goal of his while he was at it. Although the Origin Ability Association has always been low-key, having hid for so long, those members seemed to have a strong sense of superiority as if no other force existed. Perhaps, it was the right time now for them to take a hit.

Everyone moved forward slowly.

No one knew in just a blink of an eye, how many times Su Hao changed his mind. If Su Hao’s plan were to be known to the Origin Ability Association, they would probably regret inviting Su Hao. Following the dim light ray, this temporary team finally entered Huangliang Despairs.

A few seconds later, everyone was finally able to adapt to the brightness here.

Each one of them was an esper. The dim light in the scene couldn’t hinder their vision. Glancing around, they noticed this was a spacious underground passage.

As for the floor under their feet, it was made of bluestone tiles.

Surrounding them were heavy rock walls with mysterious lines engraved on them. It vaguely revealed a terrifying aura that no one dared to rush forward and touch them.

To put it in simple words, this was a one-way path.

Tick~

A water drop landed on the ground.

This empty passage was so quiet that the sound of the water hitting the ground seemed deafening.

“A sewer?”

Nope.

Whether it was those bluestone tiles, the surrounding rock walls, or those mysterious lines engraved above, one could tell that this was a place that had been crafted carefully with a lot of effort. Even if it were by a designer, no one would be so bored to build a sewer with such a grand design.

Plus, since when is a sewer this spacious?

“Ah!”

Just when everyone was pondering about it, there was a cry coming from behind.

“What happened?”

The crowd quickly turned around.

“Exit… We can’t leave anymore.”

That cry was from the last man behind. After coming in, when he turned around, he noticed that Huangliang Despairs shut itself after everyone entered!

The crowd subconsciously looked at Su Hao.

“Taihu Territory was also like that.” Su Hao said indifferently, “There was a time limit for the opening of Taihu Territory, and no one is allowed to enter after that. Seems that the case applies to Huangliang Despairs too. Of course, there might be a different scenario. For example, those members of Huangliang Despairs who entered earlier controlled the switch gate.”

Swish!

Everyone shuddered.

Su Hao’s last words scared the hell out of everyone that they had cold sweat.

“Of course, such a possibility is very small.”

Su Hao causally connected the second half of his sentence, which then made them relieved. If Nine Snakes could control the switch gate, what about other places then?

Facing such a dilemma, who wouldn’t be afraid?

Because right now, there was no other route but forward!

Not reaching the end, only death awaited them!

Plus, those peak domain espers of Nine Snakes were already so powerful that it was outrageous. What about those world espers of Nine Snakes then?

Everyone had some regrets. They shouldn’t have come in rashly earlier.

In this quiet underground passage, everyone proceeded more cautiously. Such a scene with so many world espers in a team walking carefully with each step was unimaginable. The passage was very long. What accompanied them was the sound of water dripping, which kept their minds intact in this quiet space.

Crack!

A strange sound interrupted the water droplet rhythm. The crowd instantly became wary and alert. Something is coming here!

Swish!

Swish!

The passage suddenly had the sound of wind.

That thing was getting faster and faster. Everyone could even hear a heavy gasp. Their heart beat violently and, dimly from afar, two lantern-like objects suddenly appeared. It was red like blood, and those were actually two huge eyes!

Chapter 939 - Reaching Heaven In A Single Bound

Boom!

A strange light emerged.

Whether it was Su Hao or the Origin Ability Association members, they were all startled. Zheng Tai’s energy suddenly surged as it was poured into his body through the stone statue.

Poof~

A mouthful of blood spewed out.

Zheng Tai almost passed out.

“What happened?”

“What’s going on?”

Everyone’s expression changed greatly.

“The energy is too powerful, so he can’t withstand it.” Su Hao was also feeling nervous, “After all, he’s a domain esper. Although this energy was copied from Zheng Tai, Rule Force seems to have been mixed in.”

“Rule Force…”

Everyone’s face now turned ugly.

Rule Force was fine for them, but Zheng Tai was still a domain esper!

Could he bear it?

One needs to note how lethal Rule Force is to a domain esper. In the past, Su Hao and the others had experienced it before. Just a trace of Rule Force was sufficient to render them useless.

And now…

Boom!

Yet another wave of energy emerged.

“A 1% concentration of Rule Force.”

Liu Ping quickly sensed it.

Within the energy, 1% of Rule Force was mixed with Zheng Tai’s energy before returning to his body. What an impact Zheng Tai was currently experiencing!

Boom!

Boom!

Wave by wave of energy kept impacting him.

Zheng Tai could hardly hold on, yet he gritted his teeth as if his life depended on it.

Su Hao couldn’t help but feel worried.

Gently clenching his fist, his Universe Creator was ready to be activated at any time. Once Zheng Tai couldn’t support it any longer, he would directly bring Zheng Tai into Kingdom of Heaven without hesitation.

He was the one who brought Zheng Tai here, so he naturally had the obligation to be responsible for Zheng Tai.

Poof~

Yet another mouthful of blood spurt out.

The crowd trembled.

“Keep holding on.”

Su Hao stared at Zheng Tai non-stop.

One second.

Two seconds.

Three seconds.

Zheng Tai’s recovery was beyond everyone’s imagination. Everyone looked at him nervously, and now Liu Ping was the only one standing under the rain. However, he wasn’t bothered about it. Out of forty-eight people present here, only he and Su Hao had the capability to ignore the rain.

“Can he keep holding on?”

Everyone’s gaze was focused on Zheng Tai.

Zheng Tai’s body was already bleeding. This was a sign that he was reaching his limit!

Everyone sighed.

Who would have thought that at the final moment, when everyone was rejoicing, such an incident would occur? A domain esper, it was indeed too much for him.

Bang!

Blood stained the air as Zheng Tai was drenched in it.

“It’s over…”

Everyone sighed secretly. Su Hao was ready to take action. However, his gaze kept praying for Zheng Tai, “Zheng Tai, hold on longer…”

And it was at this time, a new scene appeared.

*****

Huangliang Ruins.

After the army of undead was wiped out, the corresponding reports had already been transmitted.

The Origin Ability Association and Federation, both pinned the blame on grade S talent espers without any reserves, which was in line with their goal to always go against grade S talent espers.

The battle in Huangliang City, that was the work of a legendary evil grade S talent esper.

Such a statement was actually true.

With the deaths of three million civilians in a city, everyone was well aware of the horror of grade S talents. Presumably, from today onward, no one would dare to conceal grade S talent espers from the Federation.

And this was also an explanation to all the people in Huangliang City.

In the Federation’s territory.

The public was quite shocked at the destruction of Huangliang City. If it wasn’t broadcasted by the Federation, who would have thought that this city, which was still fine the other day, would turn into ruins overnight?

With one city wiped out, three million souls accompanied.

The aftermath of the undead battle was even more terrifying. If it wasn’t because of the Origin Ability Association, it wasn’t because of those powerful world espers all over the world, how damaging would that disaster turn out to be?

In the middle of the battle, their National Goddess appeared at the scene and reversed the situation, once again gaining unmatched fame! Because the video recordings were still present!

Although the signal was blocked.

The reporters still accurately recorded the disaster. The video recordings were published later and stunned everyone in the Federation.

This was simply a catastrophe.

Three million lives lost was just a start.

Instead, the army of undead that could even possibly destroy the entire Federation was the true disaster.

If it was not stopped in time, the entire Federation might really fall to the undead army, and each city would turn into ruins. Imagine if even the Origin Ability Association failed to stop the army, who else could stop them? Thus, the battle of Huangliang City decided the peace of the entire Federation.

Who would have thought the opposition was this strong?

The espers of the Origin Ability Association kept wasting energy with the endless resurrected undead, and they could barely hold on anymore. It was a fight destined to lose. At that time, those who watched the video could feel an indescribable sadness. Is it going to end like that?

It was at this crucial moment.

Wu Ming, the esper they thought had abandoned the scene, returned.

Accompanying his arrival was a beautiful song. The voice was familiar to all citizens and became their final hope.

That sweet song suppressed the Elegy of Undead!

When the undead were wiped out under the song, what a glorious scene that was!

Then, during the final moment when all the espers attacked, the beautiful song in the background ignited everyone’s blood.

They won.

The video finally froze.

The figure of Wu Ming, the figure of Goddess Chen Xi, under the glorious halo, it made the spectators fanatical. Today, the Federation had new heroes born.

Since the Federation stabilized, it was already so long since the last heroes in battle appeared.

Chen Xi, she became the true goddess of the entire Federation. Her status was no longer of a pure singer, but the national goddess endorsed by everyone.

The Federation’s ordinary citizens and even a big portion of the espers, they may not know the difference between world espers and domain espers, but that didn’t prevent them from seeing how terrifying the suppressing effect was against the undead when the sound of a piano and the voice matched each other.

Their respect for Chen Xi came from their inner fanaticism.

This was the publicity spread by the Federation.

Because everyone knew one thing, the deaths of three million people in Huangliang City needed an explanation, and there was a need for heroes to complete the story.

Only the existence of heroes could suppress the public’s grief.

No matter what, during this time, the entire Federation would be focusing on Huangliang City, a city that once enjoyed spring all year. Whether it’s to rebuild or save, everyone would be focusing their attention here. As for the world espers and major organizations, they were more concerned about…

Huangliang Despairs!

The world would always be like that.

Ordinary people would only notice one truth, and those more powerful would naturally see another truth. The existence of Nine Snakes and Huangliang Despairs had caused those strong espers to maintain their gaze here. This time around, the Origin Ability Association dispatched Liu Ping, a level three world esper.

This time, there won’t be any problems, right?

However, no one dares to be assured. After all, this a Great Despair!

Thinking of Taihu Territory, even Li Lei, an existence with half a step into being the strongest esper had also fallen. Such a fact made everyone worried even more.

Huangliang Despairs… would they really be fine?

“There shouldn’t be any issues.”

“After they entered, Huangliang Despairs already closed the entrance.”

“This wasn’t the same with Taihu Territory. After years of exploration, we know what is inside and how to exit. Thus, we don’t have to worry much regarding accidents, but Huangliang Despairs…”

“That’s a land where no one has been to before.”

An esper expressed his concern, “They’re exploring new land! No matter what, the mortality rate while exploring a new place is several times higher than normal.”

“I thought Wu Ming went along too?”

“Although Huangliang Despairs is definitely different from Taihu Territory, with him tagging along, at least he could provide some advice and help out.” Someone said.

“That’s true. However, what I am more worried about is Nine Snakes.”

When the conversation came to this, everyone went silent.

Nine Snakes.

This damn organization, no one could feel at ease thinking of it.

Using the 3 million lives in Huangliang City to open up Huangliang Despairs, and then turning those souls into undead to stop interference from others. Those members of Nine Snakes could no longer be described with any word! What they were very sure of was that Nine Snakes definitely entered before the Origin Ability Association.

Otherwise, the entrance of Huangliang Despairs would not have been that easy to find.

And Nine Snakes…

Inside Huangliang Despairs, what would they be doing?

Rather than worrying about Liu Ping and the others, it might be more accurate to say they were worried about themselves. Once Nine Snakes wins, it would be an absolute catastrophe. This can be clearly seen from the incident in Huangliang City.

“Although I hate Liu Ping, I still wish for their victory.”

“Same.”

The others agreed.

It was at this moment, a pleasant sound came, causing everyone’s voice to stop abruptly as they trembled, “This sound…”

Boom!

The melodious bell rang.

“World esper!”

“Someone has broken through into the world realm!”

“It’s coming from Huangliang Despairs!”

Everyone looked toward that direction. No one was surprised by a breakthrough in the Great Despair. Every few days, when a team enters a Great Despair, there would always be someone breaking through. However, how many managed to return safely?

However, what was unique this time was it’s coming from Huangliang Despairs.

“Not right.”

Everyone’s brows were slightly wrinkled, “Breakthrough into the world realm? I thought they were all world espers! Plus, with the ringing of the bell, that indicates the birth of a new Rule Force! In other words, this man’s breakthrough must be having a unique talent, does that mean…”

“Nine Snakes!”

Everyone’s heart skipped a beat.

Those grade S talent espers from Nine Snakes, they could actually break through in Huangliang Despairs? A grade S talent esper with a unique talent…

This was more than a disaster!

Having experienced the battle with Nine Snakes, they had seen personally how powerful the Rule Force of a grade S talent esper was. Seven against fifty, yet none fell, what kind of strength was that?

And now, there was another addition.

This is a huge problem.

“That’s not necessarily true.” One of them suddenly broke the silence, “Based on my information, Liu Ping also had a domain esper within his team. If that esper broke through, that seems to make more sense.”

“Who?”

“Zheng Tai!”

At the same time, within Huangliang Despairs, Liu Ping and all the other world espers opened their mouths wide as they looked at this scene in front of them! No one would have thought that when Zheng Tai was about to fall and die, he actually broke through! He comprehended the Rule Force instilled by the stone statue to him.

Reaching heaven in a single bound, he broke through into the world realm!

Chapter 964 - Shoulder The Sky!

Chapter 964: Shoulder the sky!

Swish!

The scene was horrifying.

Everyone took a deep breath looking at the giant hole that was formed.

What kind of strength was that? Tian Long Court, this place has been strengthened by origin energy countless times! Rumor said that when Wan Cheng was at the peak of the domain realm, he could only produce scratches on the ground.

“What happened?”

“Not sure…”

“However, what a powerful force that was just now.”

Everyone couldn’t help but be frightened.

“Brother?”

Su Ling’s voice was transmitted over. She felt that something was amiss. Even if Yue Xuan was to erupt, the force produced shouldn’t be this powerful!

“It’s just Rule Force.” Su Hao’s eyes narrowed, “Don’t worry. It’s just a guy outside taking action, using his Space Rule Force to transmit the force to Yue Xuan. It seemed like Yue Xuan’s performance, but everything was actually that world esper’s doing.”

“Huh?” Su Ling was confused, “Why?”

“Of course, it’s to force me out.” Su Hao sneered, “If you got injured from being challenged, will I still not appear as your brother?”

“Ah.” Su Ling’s face changed, “Then, brother, you…”

“Don’t worry.” Su Hao said indifferently, “Don’t forget. They want a crippled Su Hao, not someone who already possesses the strength of a world esper. I believe they would be pleasantly surprised when we meet again. However, if you lose, I’m afraid it will affect your graduation.”

“I don’t care.” Su Ling shook her head, “Your matter is more important.”

“My matter is to protect you.” Su Hao leisurely said, “Relax, it’s just a world esper. He’s still not strong enough for me to worry. Since Yue Xuan wants to play, then just accompany him to play around.”

Buzz~

Su Hao’s eyes flashed.

One in red, the other in blue.

Illusion Reality.

Activate!

In the distance, Su Ling, who was evading Yue Xuan’s attack, suddenly stiffened. Her brain felt clearer than before. With the incoming Rule Force, Su Ling actually didn’t dodge at all, causing the crowd to be shocked. It was at this moment that the crowd saw Su Ling attack again. Her figure flashed at an unbelievable angle.

Swish!

Flame slashed across the sky.

Snap!

The Rule Force shook. As the flames vanished, a new pit was formed.

Everyone watching was shocked.

A battle between domain espers actually turned this fierce!

However, after this battle, Yue Xuan proved that he had the strength to compete with Su Ling, right? However, they were most likely not aware that Yue Xuan had long been terrified. One needs to note that the current one battling was his master, a world esper! A world esper who already has four boundary spirits!

Level two world esper!

Even so, Su Ling didn’t fall. What was actually happening?

Swish!

The flames covered the sky.

Boom!

Space shook.

Red and blue light flashed. The crowd spectating this battle was extremely excited, but the actual battle had already changed. The fight between Su Ling and Yue Xuan had turned into a battle between Su Hao and Yue Xuan’s master!

Two powerful world espers were now confronting each other.

With Illusion Reality fully activated, Yue Xuan could forget about hitting Su Ling with his deductions.

However, with the help of Rule Force, Yue Xuan was simply too lazy to bother with evasion and absorption because the origin energy simply couldn’t penetrate Rule Force!

Boom!

The battle continued.

After a long series of exchanges, that world esper finally couldn’t hold his anger.

Swish!

A huge sphere appeared in mid-air.

The rich flashing blue Rule Force stunned everyone. He was simply abusing the fact the no student in the school could recognize Rule Force.

As long as it was warped with Yue Xuan’s force, nobody would recognize it.

“Starry sky, scatter.” Yue Xuan slammed it on Su Ling fiercely.

Su Hao’s eyes revealed a flash of killing intent.

Starry sky, scatter; this move wasn’t strong, but that rich Rule Force angered Su Hao. After all, Su Ling was only a domain esper.

To actually use this much Rule Force to deal with her…

Hehe, are you trying to kill her?

“You’re courting death!” Su Hao muttered to himself.

“Ling Er!”

“Kill!”

Su Hao’s tone was very cold.

“Alright!” Su Ling’s eyes lit up.

Acting like what Su Hao instructed, she charged forward without trying to evade. With the huge flame sword raised, she slashed it at Yue Xuan!

“Ridiculous!” Yue Xuan sounded despiteful. Just mere origin energy, yet you want to compare with the space force of my master?

Meanwhile, Yue Xuan’s master revealed an even more absurd expression. The suspicion he had vanished in an instant. How ignorant was he? Just now, he thought that someone behind Su Ling was interrupting him. When he saw Su Ling charge head-on, he threw away this idea — using origin energy to clash with Rule Force?

Ignorant!

Boom!

A slash was raised up in the sky.

In front of everyone, Su Ling just slashed down like that. Many people had cold sweat for her because everyone could feel the terrifying incoming force that Su Ling was about to face.

However…

Unexpectedly…

Just as Su Ling’s flame sword slashed through it, the terrifying giant sphere was chopped in half! One slash and the terrifying sphere vanished without a trace! Su Ling’s sword once again headed toward Yue Xuan without any interference after destroying the sphere.

“Not good!” Yue Xuan’s expression changed greatly.

As for his master, he was even more shocked because when the sphere vanished, he could vaguely see a shadow flashing there, absorbing his force.

Illusion?

He even thought he had seen incorrectly.

Then, he saw Su Ling cut through the sphere with a sword and claimed one of Yue Xuan’s arms. When the light vanished, everyone was shocked.

Jizzz~

The hot temperature sound effect was still present.

Yue Xuan’s arm actually got melted from the high heat!

“You…”

As soon as Yue Xuan was about to move, he saw Su Ling take one step forward, and her giant flame sword touched his neck, “Be prepared to die if you dare to make any movements!”

Yue Xuan suddenly dared not move.

Yue Xuan’s master frowned. He still couldn’t understand what he had seen in the last scene. If that was true, was someone acting behind Su Ling then?

“It doesn’t matter.” Yue Xuan’s master sneered, “Even if there is a world esper, even if Yue Xuan lost, this result is well within our expectations.”

Thinking of this, Yue Xuan’s master dialed a certain number.

Soon, Zhanzheng College’s instructor came and was shocked to see this scene.

“Su Ling, you…”

“In a private challenge, to hurt a fellow schoolmate, what despicable nature. Su Ling, I’m afraid you have to come with us.” The captain of the law enforcement team said.

Everyone in the scene went into an uproar.

As expected, what Su Ling said was true.

This Yue Xuan, even if he had to sacrifice himself, he would drag Su Ling along! This was simply too brutal, and the crowd present felt upset for Su Ling. However, the law enforcement team had been long prepared and would never allow anyone to stop them. Stepping forward, they were about to take Su Ling away, but Su Ling suddenly retorted.

“What wrong have I done?” Su Ling spoke indifferently.

“Hurting a schoolmate…” The law enforcement team coldly said.

“Are you sure he’s a schoolmate?” Su Ling looked at Yue Xuan and calmly continued, “Just now, I did fight many times and stopped halfway. It was all to identify what your talent is. Now, I have seen it clearly. If I didn’t see incorrectly, your talent should be a legendary grade S talent, right?”

“Or perhaps, you have been recruited into Nine Snakes!”

Boom!

Those statements were akin to throwing an atomic bomb to the crowd, creating a storm.

Grade S talent!

Nine Snakes!

When those two words were heard, everyone’s face changed. After experiencing the disaster in Huangliang City, Nine Snakes had become the evilest organization! How could one be so brutal to the point that they could destroy an entire city for their own benefit? Also, thanks to the undead march, grade S talents also became exposed.

From now onward, any grade S talent esper would be hunted down!

After this order, the existence of grade S talents was revealed to the public, and those espers became the target of everyone’s pursuit. If Yue Xuan is really a grade S talent esper…

He won’t be able to escape from death!

Everyone looked subconsciously at Yue Xuan. This sudden change even made his face paler.

I’m dead!

This was his only thought. He thought that Su Ling would only be able to guess the details of his ability. Never would he have thought that Su Ling even knew that he’s a grade S talent esper!

“I… I…”

Yue Xuan didn’t know what to say.

“Check him!” The captain of the law enforcement team suddenly shouted out loud with strong killing intent. One of those three million lost souls in Huangliang City was his friend! His best friend!

Swish!

The law enforcement team swarmed Yue Xuan and pinned him to the ground.

Soon, the result came out.

Grade S!

Although they weren’t sure what grade S talent it was, the Federation had its own set of methods to detect grade S talents. When the result was out, Yue Xuan’s face became ashen.

“Drag him away!” The captain of the law enforcement team remained cold, “Let Lan Tingxu deal with him.”

“Yes!”

Yue Xuan was taken away.

As for Su Ling, not only did she not do any misdeeds, but she became a hero instead! This scene made Yue Xuan’s master hateful. When he recruited Yue Xuan, it was precisely because he fancied the potential of a grade S talent! As long as such a fact wasn’t mentioned, who would know? By pretending that it is a grade A talent, no one would realize it.

Who would ever think that Su Ling would ruin his plan?

“This is so hateful!” Yue Xuan’s master could barely control his hatred. Just some words from Su Ling, and not only was Yue Xuan destined to die, but his plan to hurt Su Ling was also denied.

Under such a situation, how could he lure Su Hao out?

What to do now?

If he’s to do it in the open, that’s not right.

Yue Xuan’s master’s name is Zhang Tie. He’s a world esper who had been absorbed into the Federation’s force. Being merciless, he looked at his apprentice’s figure that had been dragged away and thought about it.

Since his apprentice is about to die, why not add him to another wrongdoing…

Hehe.

Nine Snakes instructed Yue Xuan to seek revenge, whether to capture or kill Su Ling.

Hmmm, this seems like a good story.

Zhang Tie’s eyes condensed strong killing intent. The moment when Yue Xuan’s identity was revealed, Zhang Tie already gave up on him. Since this disciple is no longer useful, he might as well maximize his remaining worth. However, when he was staring at Su Ling and Yue Xuan, he was unaware of someone watching him closely.

Su Hao also looked toward the center of the court.

However, under Synchronize Space, Zhang Tie’s actions didn’t escape his observation. When Zhang Tie’s eyes were revealing a fierce look, Synchronize Space just turned away silently.

“I have already mentioned this before.”

“This time, I will shoulder this entire sky for Ling Er.”

“Since I’m here, there is no need for you to leave…”

chapters.title: Chapter 971 - A Finger Snap
chapters.body:
Chapter 971 - A Finger Snap

Origin Ability Association.

Currently, the President of the Origin Ability Association looked at the wanted order in his hand for a long time. When one reached old age, not many would join the online community. They wouldn’t even pay attention to Su Hao whether he’s good or bad, because the relationship with them wasn’t huge. What they wanted to do was to capture Su Hao and hand him over to the Federation.

Just that… Just that…

“In the end, it still arrives.”

Luo Zhiping, President of the Origin Ability Association, sighed aloud. When things had reached this stage, shouldn’t he have known about it for ages?

The current situation, how similar was it compared to back then?

The same wanted order.

The same anti-humanity!

Luo Zhiping opened a safe that was already covered in thick dust. From inside, he pulled out a piece of worn paper. That paper was also a wanted order.

Just that, the name above was none other than Su Tiancheng!

Su Hao, Su Tiancheng!

They actually took the same path.

“Federation…” Luo Zhiping sighed.

“Master!” A figure rushed inside the room in a hurry, “Su Hao is now on the wanted list. Master, let me go! I am after all a peak level two world esper. I’ll take Su Hao to receive justice!”

“Shut up!” Luo Zhiping shouted out loud.

The disciple quickly shut up.

He didn’t know why his master was so mad.

“What about Su Hao’s location?”

“We found him. Su Hao didn’t leave at all. He’s still in Zhanzheng College.” The disciple whispered, “I can not go, but this is a golden chance to make a great contribution. Otherwise, Xiao Luo will go too. After all, he’s your son…”

“Who else wants to go too?” Luo Zhiping glanced at him.

“Vice President Yun.” The disciple was somewhat discouraged, “He also noticed this great contribution, so he wished to take a chance at it. What a shameless old man. This is a great opportunity for us, the younger generation. Why does he want to join the fun too? Master, even if anyone can go, never let him do so.”

“Let him go.” Luo Zhiping calmly said.

“What?” The disciple’s eyes formed a circle, “But…”

“Let him go.” Luo Zhiping’s eyes flashed a hint of coldness, “Of course, there is an opportunity to achieve one’s goal, but what if you fail? You need to note this, he’s not just anyone, he is Su Tiancheng’s son…”

“Oh.”

The disciple exited the room without really understanding the words.

He wasn’t sure what his master was trying to convey. However, he felt that it sounded incredible. Could this be like what the internet community always said, not understand but impress?

The disciple left.

Luo Zhiping looked at these two wanted orders again. Su Tiancheng’s was already very old. However, when those two identical wanted orders were put together, it somewhat made him feel an inexplicable warmness.

“That time, the failure of capturing Su Tiancheng, haven’t you learnt any lesson from it?”

“If you bite bones that are too hard, be careful that they might break your teeth!”

*****

The entire Federation was experiencing a gathering storm.

Su Hao had been pushed to the cusp of the storm, yet Su Hao was still busy with his own affairs, completely ignoring these miscellaneous things.

A new face appeared.

After changing his appearance, Su Hao looked around Zhanzheng College and actually managed to find two new talents from the freshmen. Although one of them was only grade B, there was no difference to him. The remaining five talents were perfected once more. Now he only lacked three more talents!

As long as he had three more, he would be able to step into the world realm!

This was Su Hao’s biggest gain in this trip.

As for the matter of him being wanted by the Federation, he didn’t even think much about it. After these few days of sorting out his strength, the aura in Kingdom of Heaven had grown stronger and stronger.

What Su Hao waited for was this moment.

“One more step left…”

Joy flashed within Su Hao’s eyes.

Without destruction, there can never be construction.

Big chances would always be there during life and death moments.

How strong was the current him?

Su Hao knew that very well.

Level two world realm, nothing more than that. Even if he had consumed 108,000 kinds of talents, even if Kingdom of Heaven was perfected to the extreme, even if there are more dark fishes in his body, he would still be stuck at level two world realm. Similarly, Universe Creator wouldn’t be able to pull in those who are stronger than him.

In other words…

Chilian Squad just happened to meet the critical limit of Universe Creator. Any peak level two world esper would force him to face the foe by himself.

Unfortunately for Chilian Squad, they had none of such espers.

Thus, one could say that Chilian Squad was out of luck.

Today, Su Hao was searching for information regarding freshmen in Zhanzheng College. Suddenly a group of people wearing uniforms of the Origin Ability Association arrived. The surrounding people quickly cleared the path for them. All the disciples of Zhanzheng College stayed away and only looked at them from afar, looking at this strange scene.

“Why would the Origin Ability Association come here?”

“Not sure, even the students were driven away. What do they want to do?”

“Look, look. Someone hasn’t left!”

“The Origin Ability Association surrounded him. Could it be they want to catch him?”

Everyone from Zhanzheng College looked at this scene in amazement. A group of powerful espers of the Origin Ability Association actually surrounded a student. What were they actually trying to achieve here?

Everyone from the Origin Ability Association stood still.

A group of eleven men.

Obviously, this was the standard lineup set by the Federation, ten people. As for the one leading the team, that must obviously be a special character and also the captain of the operation itself.

“Let me introduce myself for a bit.”

“I’m Yun Yi, the current Vice President of the Origin Ability Association. You can call me Vice President Yun.”

That middle-aged man said calmly, which caused a sensation. Vice President of Origin Ability Association? He could be described as under one man and above ten of thousands. Such a big shot, why did he come here?

“It seems that you must have known my identity.” Su Hao smiled.

“Not hiding your identity…” Vice President Yun sneered, “Aren’t you just waiting for us to come knocking the door, Su Hao?”

Boom!

The entire Zhanzheng College was mind blown.

Su Hao?

That man who went against humanity?

The so-called genius in the past?

Everyone looked over there one after another. Sure enough, that man’s school uniform disintegrated automatically and was replaced with a set of black clothes. As for that man’s appearance, he gradually looked familiar.

Su Hao, it was really him!

“Since you all know I am waiting for you all, you guys even dare to come?” Su Hao’s mouth flashed a smile, “You need to know that the number of people who died under my hands isn’t little.”

“I am clear of that fact.” Vice President Yun looked solemn, “That Old Luo thought I was a fool coming here for the credit. However, in the past, I had participated in the battle against Su Tiancheng, hehe…”

“So I know you’re extremely strong.”

“For you to single-handedly destroyed the twenty men of Chilian Squad, even I would find it a bit hard!”

“Perhaps that is your confidence.”

“Thus, I came well prepared.” Vice President Yun finished his speech with a big wave hand motion, and the team of ten behind him made their move, surrounding Su Hao suddenly, “This is our Origin Ability Association’s team. Far surpassing the so-called Chilian Squad.”

“They are the strongest ones who survived the process of elimination in life and death situations!” Vice President Yun coldly shouted. The aura around him suddenly erupted, and the rich World Force shocked everyone, “Then, there is me.”

“A level three world esper!”

“With such a lineup, would it be enough to bring you down?”

Boom!

Countless powerful aura locked onto Su Hao.

Everyone in Zhanzheng College had long been shocked. They knew that Su Hao is powerful, and they also knew that the higher-ups placed great importance on him, but they never imagined the moment the higher-ups took action…

A level three world esper would be dispatched!

The Vice President of Origin Ability Association and guys who survived countless times from being eliminated in battles?

Origin Ability Association, this was simply too cruel.

It was a battle with no suspense. Everyone could clearly see that there was no room for this battle. Su Hao could only wait to be captured.

However, was that really the case?

Su Hao looked at the crowd surrounding him before suddenly smiling.

“What are you smiling at?” Vice President Yun looked at him.

For someone like Su Hao, he kept his vigilance at twelve out of ten.

“You’re that confident?” Su Hao looked at him.

“Could it be that you have helpers?” The Vice President replied. He didn’t believe that Su Hao could defeat him single-handedly.

“Nope.” Su Hao shook his head, “But against you, it should be enough?”

“Me?” Vice President Yun smiled, “Wrong, you need to deal with me and also the strong espers from Origin Ability Association.”

“No, only you.” Su Hao revealed a strange smile on his face.

“Huh?”

Vice President Yun’s heart inexplicably skipped a beat.

Only him?

He didn’t believe Su Hao would say so without any reason. However, looking at those strong underlings of his show a puzzled look, they were clueless what Su Hao meant by that.

“Universe Creator?” Vice President Yun suddenly understood, “However, based on our data, Universe Creator is ineffective against those who exceed your strength. Among them, many are peak level two world realm. Your Universe Creator won’t be playing much of a role in this situation, right?”

Yes, peak level two world realm!

Among those who came here today, quite a number of them were in such a realm.

No wonder Vice President Yun was so confident. He wasn’t only confident in himself but also the team he brought along. With such a lineup, what’s there to be afraid of in this battle?

“Universe Creator?”

“It serves no purpose.”

Su Hao just extended his hand.

Raising his right hand.

There was no origin energy, nor any Rule Force in his hand. Just like that, under the attentive look from the Origin Ability Association and all the students of Zhanzheng College, he gently lifted it up.

“What’s he trying to do?”

Everyone was on high alert.

Especially the men of the Origin Ability Association who had become the target of Su Hao, they were staring at him. What Su Hao meant earlier was he would make a move on them. How could they not be paying attention to him? As for Vice President Yun, he frowned even more, not knowing what trick Su Hao was playing.

“So everyone is looking at me now…” Su Hao muttered to himself. Watching everyone’s attention on the fingers of his right hand, he gently snapped.

Snap!

It was a crisp sound.

There was no horrifying trick, no power at all, and yet Su Hao retracted his hand.

Everyone was stunned for a second.

Just like that?

“Trying to act mysteriously?”

Vice President Yun didn’t know whether to laugh or cry. He would have never imagined that Su Hao would actually use this kind of trick. Forget about it, I am not going to accompany him with this nonsense.

At first, he thought Su Hao was a man worthy of respect.

Now, it seemed…

“Go!”

Vice President Yun issued his final order, but he found out that none of his men from the Origin Ability Association made a move when he issued his order!

Those ten men under his wings didn’t move at all!

How could this be?

Vice President Yun was terrified. Remembering what Su Hao said earlier, he suddenly turned to look at his men. Then, he saw ten terrified faces.

chapters.title: Chapter 972 - Big Regret!
chapters.body:
Chapter 972 - Big Regret!

Yes.

Ten terrified faces.

Those ten underlings of his were looking at Su Hao in horror right now. Not being scared to death was already good enough, let alone making a move on him.

“What happened?” Vice President Yun’s hands trembled.

“I have already said that my opponent is only you alone.” Su Hao’s gaze was cold.

He took a step forward, and those from the Origin Ability Association who surrounded him took a step back. Even when they had surrounded Su Hao, they dared not take any action, which caused an uproar.

“What happened?”

“What is actually happening?”

“That snap earlier…”

Everyone in Zhanzheng College was shocked.

They were also clueless about what happened. Su Hao could scare ten strong espers from the Origin Ability Association with a snap of his fingers? Brothers, are you sure you’re not invited here to act? Such a scene was too strange.

What was even more unexpected was that one of those men actually looked at Vice President Yun and said, “Vice President, let’s retreat.”

Retreat!

Retreat!

He actually suggested retreating!

Vice President Yun almost thought that he had heard incorrectly.

What the hell is this?!

Damn!

Today, what had this battle escalated into? If these men weren’t strong espers from the Origin Ability Association, they would have thought these men were actors invited by Su Hao.

“In the end, what is actually happening here?!” Vice President Yun asked in anger.

“We can’t say it out loud.” That man smiled bitterly, “But please retreat. We’re not his opponents.”

Vice President Yun: “…”

Zhanzheng College’s students: “…”

They couldn’t say, but they mentioned they weren’t his opponents?

Are you trying to scam people?

“A bunch of trash!” Vice President Yun coldly spat out those words. As for the one opposite him, Su Hao just casually spectated this scene.

Those strong espers of the Origin Ability Association smiled bitterly.

One could see the sullen expression on their face. However, whenever they planned to attack Su Hao, that horrific scene would replay in their minds.

At this moment, they only knew.

It turned out that…

Su Hao was Wu Ming!

The so-called strong espers from the Origin Ability Association turned out to be those who survived from Huangliang Despairs, the world espers whose strength improved by many times. After their trip from Huangliang Despairs, they naturally became the elites. When they saw Su Hao, they couldn’t remember Su Hao’s message.

However…

When Su Hao snapped his fingers, that sealed memory returned.

The events that happened in Huangliang Despairs.

The memory Su Hao erased came back!

They knew Su Hao’s identity. They knew Su Hao killed Liu Ping. They knew too much, and that included that horrifying scene.

One slash, and he killed a pseudo-emperor!

That glorious light from the sword blinded everyone’s eyes.

No matter how strong Vice President Yun is, could he be any stronger than a pseudo-emperor?

Of course not!

Then, what was the point of continuing this fight?!

Not only did Su Hao set up a method to retrigger the memory, but he had also added a little trick to their consciousness. Whenever they planned to attack Su Hao, that scene would emerge. That terrifying Wolf King, that energetic momentum, and that brilliant slash.

He cut a pseudo-emperor in half with one slash!

As long as they wanted to attack Su Hao, as long as they wanted to say what happened then, this scene would appear. That sword was as if it was aimed at them and had been imprinted in the deepest part of their soul.

At this time, they realized how terrifying Su Hao was.

Unless that sword could be countered…

Unless one could resist that slash…

Otherwise, they simply couldn’t touch Su Hao!

“That devil.”

When they met Su Hao’s eyes, they already felt horrified. The only thing they could do was remind Vice President Yun that this battle couldn’t be fought!

However, how would Vice President Yun listen to them?

When they persuaded him, Vice President Yun insisted on stepping forward, “Since they couldn’t fight, let me do it! I don’t believe your Rule Force can surpass my World Force.”

“Then, I guess you can give it a try?” Su Hao leisurely took a step forward and told those espers from the Origin Ability Association, “Retreat.”

Swish.

Everyone withdrew.

This scene made Vice President Yun’s mouth twitch.

They actually retreated!

Damn you guys!

Are you my men or Su Hao’s men? I asked you guys to come here and help me, not to act cute!

Vice President Yun almost went crazy.

He knew that this scene was definitely related to the snap earlier, but he couldn’t comprehend it. What kind of mystery did that powerless snap contain?

Forget about it.

Vice President Yun took a deep breath.

Since he had reached this step, he couldn’t retreat anymore.

“Su Hao, come.”

Boom!

A brilliant light flashed.

Vice President Yun’s hand had an additional long blade that shone brilliantly, a fourth-level boundary spirit. His fourth-level boundary spirit was indeed a weapon!

Swish!

Xinghe Sword appeared from Su Hao’s hands.

The same fourth boundary spirit!

This scene had also opened the crowd’s eyes. Previously, it was just a rumor, but seeing Su Hao making a move… That was not anything but…

A fourth-level boundary spirit!

“Indeed, you’re Su Hao.”

Vice President Yun no longer uttered any nonsense. Since his men could no longer help, he could only resort to killing Su Hao violently with his full strength. He didn’t believe that he needed to be afraid of Su Hao as a level three world esper! Forget about Su Hao, he had the confidence to behead any peak level two esper!

Boom!

Vice President Yun’s body flashed.

Waving the long blade in his hand, he slashed it down.

Buzz~

Space was shattered, and the reaction seemed so slow that it got cut into two halves, proving how domineering Vice President Yun’s blade was.

Su Hao took a deep breath.

“Mountain Breaker!”

Boom!

Sprinting forward, Su Hao’s Xinghe Sword collided with Vice President Yun. As two weapons collided with each other, a huge roar echoed in the air.

“He blocked it!”

Vice President Yun’s pupils contracted.

As expected, Su Hao blocked it!

One needs to know that Su Hao’s attack was with Rule Force, and he, as a level three world esper, used World Force to create this fourth-level boundary spirit!

With two completely different forces, they were actually even?

A good one, Su Hao.

“Again!”

Vice President Yun’s hands rose sharply, and he slashed again.

“Water Split!”

Su Hao accepted the incoming slash without hesitation.

Buzz~

Huge fluctuations shattered to the surrounding.

Yet another confrontation.

And it was evenly matched!

Su Hao endured the pain in his wrists. A level three world esper was so powerful! Just two moves, two ordinary slashes, and they almost collapsed him!

One needs to know.

A total of five percent of the incoming force was secretly sent to Kingdom of Heaven!

That’s right.

Kingdom of Heaven.

Su Hao was so confident because he transferred a huge portion of the force to Kingdom of Heaven. Now the improved Kingdom of Heaven could already withstand some of the forces. Of course, Su Hao did this for Li Tiantian and the others!

Within Kingdom of Heaven, Li Tiantian, Ping Yang, Xiao Die, Zhang Yating…

Everyone was sitting cross-legged.

They were all comprehending.

In fact, since they obtained the core of Rule Force, they had been maintaining this state, understanding, comprehending, and sprinting toward the ultimate goal. Even some dark fishes in the ocean had gradually become stronger as they also obtained the benefit of the core.

Right now, countless forces radiated from the sky.

That was the World Force belonging to Vice President Yun!

Like thunder and lightning, it was shared within Li Tiantian and the others in order to sharpen them and use the World Force to aid them in breaking through! The World Force was extremely lethal, but after numerous processing by Su Hao, it had been toned down reasonably.

Boom!

Boom!

Each time Vice President Yun attacked.

It was akin to a catastrophic thunderstorm for Li Tiantian and the others.

However, even so, they still clenched their teeth. Under the tempering of World Force, they really did make progress. The realization of the Rule Force’s core was also progressing rapidly. Not to mention, countless influences emerged from the sky and passed on to them.

That was Su Hao’s comprehension!

It was coming from Su Hao’s comprehension of the spiritual fishes when he was in Taihu Territory.

That was after all…

The key to breaking through into the world realm!

Rule Force’s core, with the aid of Vice President Yun from the outside and the memory from the spiritual fish instilled by Su Hao; under such circumstances, the aura of everyone in Kingdom of Heaven became more and more different.

Of course, if Vice President Yun knew this scene, he might vomit blood.

All his hard work was actually helping others breakthrough?

Boom!

Those two clashed once more.

Su Hao skillfully exhibited a set of swordsmanship that he had just learnt. Under the deduction of Illusion Reality, he didn’t fall behind when fighting against Vice President Yun.

This was a confrontation between World Force and Rule Force.

The scene stunned the crowd that they could hardly close their mouths.

Since when could a world esper challenge someone in a higher realm? Forget about a level one world esper challenging a level two world esper, a level two world esper going against a level three world esper?

There was a huge difference in force.

That wasn’t anything but World Force!

Boom!

Boom!

Light and shadow flickered.

Su Hao and Vice President Yun were so absorbed in this battle that nothing could stop them anymore.

It had stunned countless people.

Whether it was those from Origin Ability Association or the ones from Zhanzheng College, all had their mouths open wide. They were shocked by how powerful Vice President Yun was, and even more surprised at how powerful Su Hao was. One needs to note that it was understandable for Vice President Yun to be this powerful. After all, he was a first generation esper who had struggled for over 20 years…

But what was going on with Su Hao?!

He was only 23 year old, right?

He could actually stand on par with a level three world esper?

What had happened to this world?

Everyone was stunned.

Vice President Yun felt more shock the longer he fought.

At this moment, he knew that his previous caution was right. Without using any killer move, Su Hao only used his own force and ordinary moves to fight against him! Not to mention, there was that strange killer move of his!

Thinking of how his ten men were rendered useless instantly, he had a bitter look.

Damn it.

If they were all joining the fight, would this current scene happen?

Was it hypnosis?

But how could a snap hypnotize ten world espers?

Vice President Yun couldn’t understand.

He felt that there was already a huge generation gap between his times and the current era.

Boom!

Red and blue light flashed as the two weapons confronted once more. A red trace of blood appeared on Su Hao’s wrist. The World Force was too strong after all.

“Finally, you could no longer hold on anymore!” Vice President Yun sounded excited.
