chapters.title: Chapter 975 - The Future Master!
chapters.body:
Chapter 975 - The Future Master!

What a great kill that was.

For Su Hao to possess such strength at that age, it was the first time ever the people had hope that the strongest esper may appear! So what if he killed a few wastes?

The contradiction finally broke out completely!

At the same time.

In the Federation industries, countless people went on strike. Rumor said that quite a number of people threw a piece of paper at their boss’s face. If you have the gut, label me anti-humanity then!

Excluding Jianghe City which was the only place that didn’t condemn Su Hao, the credibility of the federal government in other places had fallen to the rock bottom.

All talented students had transferred to private high schools.

As the best ever institution in history, Zhanzheng College actually achieved the highest number of dropouts!

Su Hao was gone.

Su Ling left.

In this operation, the role played by Zhanzheng College made many people unhappy. If the school was like that, what was the point of staying there then? At the same time, the details regarding Su Hao’s hunt were exposed to the public, including the involvement of teachers from Zhanzheng College. Meanwhile, a new topic was born within the online community.

#Clear Su Hao’s name!

Once this topic was released, it broke 100 million hits that day itself!

Everyone was paying attention to this issue.

This time, even if the Federation wished to conceal the fact, there was no longer the need to do so because everything had been exposed. In an instant, the credibility of the Federation had fallen to its lowest point.

A crisis!

This was the biggest crisis ever faced since the establishment of the Federation!

At this moment.

Countless people holding the high positions suddenly came to a realization.

Originally, they thought that they had controlled the majority portion of the territory and no one could shake their position. However, right now, they discovered that their always stable regime was crumbling.

Water could carry a boat but also overturn it at the same time.

This was the truth.

In an instant, countless ambitious families began to threaten their position.

Thanks to the Federation having destroyed the top ten families, otherwise, with this incident alone, Tian family would never miss such a golden opportunity.

However, even under such situations.

Things had become haywire that they couldn’t even cover the incident even if they wished to.

At the Federation’s Strategic Office.

The atmosphere was extremely scary.

For things to escalate up to this point, no one expected it.

Those who had many opinions normally were all dumbfounded. No one dared to speak. That one who sat at the most upfront, his eyes glanced across everyone. Sighing, in the end he could only look at Hai Hun.

“Is there any solution?”

“There is.”

Hai Hun replied indifferently.

Then, he looked at several people who would usually clamour themselves and calmly continued, “However, some people need to be sacrificed.”

Ba-thump!

Now, everyone was panicking.

Hai Hun just smiled like a demon.

****

Soon, the Federation took action.

First, a powerful official was exposed to various crimes and then the Federation immediately highlighted it to change the focus of the citizens. Questions regarding the credibility of the Federation had now shifted into corruption and the interesting thing was the Federation shamefully went silent.

Someone soon wrote a joint letter requesting the Federation not to ignore corruption and be clear of their stand.

In the end, after a period of cooldown, the Federation finally took action on someone and even killed several other corrupt officials. The dirty insider information was exposed and became the largest dark spot of the Federation but the moment it erupted, the Federation had already killed everyone.

As for Su Hao…

Without doubt, he became a hero.

Whether it was his current talent and strength or the past Wu Ming who contributed in Huangliang City, his current status was unshakable!

The storm was finally over.

Although the Federation suffered a terrible defeat, under the swift and violent action by Hai Hun, one could say the Federation was still standing on its feet and regaining back its reputation. Although it wasn’t as good as before, at least, its stability had been restored. This was Su Hao’s first battle since comeback and yet, he already stood at the top in glory.

The worst thing was no one knew that the current Su Hao was just a domain esper.

Ranking among the top powerhouses in the world realm, who could match this glory?

However…

A win is a win but the consequences of the battle were also severe. After all, world espers aren’t ordinary people. At least, even the Su family who supported Su Hao felt heavy in their heart.

This battle was too hurtful!

Not to mention, those twenty world espers…

And six world espers Su Hao killed previously, a total of twenty-six! The forces cultivated by the Federation were destroyed just like that by Su Hao. What if the battle with the beasts started now?

If…

They had too many things to worry.

“Don’t you think your action is a bit too much?”

The Big Elder of Su family looked at Su Hao, “With the fall of top ten families, the Federation was in chaos for a time. It wasn’t that easy to stabilize and yet, it got swept by you again.”

“Then, I can only say the Federation courting its own death.”

Su Hao smirked.

“I know this reasoning.”

Big Elder smiled bitterly, “But the issue is today’s Federation couldn’t be injured anymore. Not to forget, during those two trips in Great Despair, how many people got injured or killed?”

“No worry.”

Su Hao laughed, “First, although there were many casualties in the Great Despair, our overall strength did increase. King of Fire and King of Hell would soon step into the level three world realm. Now that’s the true strength! Using those level one world espers as cannon fodders to get two level three world espers in return, what do you say? Is it worthy or not?”

“Secondly, the battle between beasts and humans will definitely happen but…”

“Are you sure the battle would escalate any further?”

“Huh?”

Big Elder felt a bit confused.

The trip in Great Despair, the advantages outweigh the disadvantages, he could understand the reasoning but what did Su Hao meant by the last sentence. Battle between beasts and humans will happen but it won’t escalate any further?

“The beasts aren’t stupid.”

Su Hao’s eyes shined, “No matter what’s the strength of mankind, once the battle happens, it will be endless. Even if they win, what would be left for the beasts? Not to mention, those high ranking ones among the beasts, are they even interested in participating?”

Without waiting for Big Elder to answer, Su Hao laughed at himself.

“Relax, the thing you worry about will never happen.”

“They…”

“They should have the same doubts as me, I guess?”

“If everything is true, what’s the use even when the world is unified? Thus,they will not take any action until the actual truth is revealed!”

Hearing this, Big Elder felt mystified and sighed.

Once upon a time, the Su Hao who took refuge in Su family had now reached such a height. However, he knew that since Su Hao had long prepared, there won’t be any problem.

Within the Federation.

Questions regarding Su Hao were still spreading like wildfire.

Those fans of Su Hao who had been repressed for years, once again ensured his popularity surged to an unprecedented level again! In addition, Yang Zixi would add the fuel at times. In regards to Su Hao’s current age and strength, he was absolutely the first one in history!

Whether or not he had the chance to become the strongest esper, that had become the topic of concern among the public.

Just 23 years old and he could already defeat Yun Yi!

Then, at what age would he become the strongest esper?

Su family’s old ancestor, Tian family’s old ancestor and even a number of powerful espers, why couldn’t they break through? After analysis, they had obtained the most reasonable cause. It was because their cultivation didn’t come from their own hard work! As the first generation espers, they obtained the blessing from heaven.

When the chaotic era began!

They became the first generation espers.

How could they be compared to those espers who obtained their ability with their own strength?

Even when they reached peak world realm, they couldn’t break through!

If one is to phrase it in another way…

Their chance of breakthrough was extremely low!

Thus, these older generation strong espers would face difficulty to continue their path. Except Tian family’s old ancestor who was willing to try it out, the rest had already given up on the breakthrough.

This world belonged to the young generation of the future after all..

And now.

Su Hao became the top one among the young generation and was showered with a lot of expectations.

His popularity was never seen before!

Su Hao became the most famous man in the Federation. Chen Xi’s fans strongly resisted it but after their goddess posted, “Wow, Brother Su is so great!”, her fans fainted. What was even more scary was at this time, suddenly, the hidden Bai family returned!

Bai family made its comeback!

This event stunned the Federation.

Because they clearly remembered, didn’t Bai family get wiped out?

Unfortunately.

When Bai family returned, they were still at their pinnacle of strength. Also, they had quite a number of world espers who were far from just broke through recently and were already comparable to those old timers. Of course, when Bai family came back, they also brought along news that was enough to collapse the entire federal government.

Bai family joint hands with Su family.

One who is extremely strong and one with unmatched economic power, with the cooperation of Su Hao and Bai Lingfeng, those two quickly united which caused the Federation to be fearful. The Federation was only established when the chaotic era arrived. It took them so many years before they managed to obtain this rare stability.

If this joint force of Su family and Bai family were to add fuel into fire…

Fortunately.

Su family didn’t seem to have such meaning.

Then only did the Federation feel relieved.

They weren’t afraid of Su family and Bai family but if a fight broke out, it wouldn’t be like any previous trifles but the disintegration of the entire Federation.

However, no matter what.

Popularity, prestige, strength, status…

With the return of Bai family, Su Hao became the number one among the young generation in all aspects! At this moment, every sentence of his was more effective than the Federation!

This was an unchallenged right that overridden everyone else!

“The Federation needs stability.”

Su Hao said.

He just sent a warning in the online community and soon, those who had gone on strike all came back to work and major enterprises quickly resumed their operation. The already crumbling Federation restored its stability at the fastest speed and returned back to its former state.

This scene really surprised everyone.

Even Su Hao was secretly shocked.

He didn’t expect how terrifying his current popularity would be!

One need to know.

He wasn’t anyone but a 23 year old level three world esper!

In the eyes of ordinary people and even most espers, the current Su Hao had now become the future strongest esper, the Federation or even the entire earth…

Future master!

chapters.title: Chapter 976 - Crisis: Terrifying Truth!
chapters.body:
Chapter 976 - Crisis: Terrifying Truth!

Blood…

That was a land dyed in red.

It reeked of blood.

Looking around, what filled the vision was nothing but blood-covered land. It looked so abysmal that when one’s hand couldn’t help but touch the land…

Su Hao awakened from his dream again.

“Just now…”

Su Hao was a bit dazed.

He had a dream.

That same dream again!

That bloody land, that sorrowful place…

Why would he always feel like crying?

“Could it be that someone has done something to me without me knowing it?” Su Hao frowned slightly.

He didn’t think that his normal self would suddenly dream of such a mess, and each time it would be that same dream! There was definitely some problem here.

“Rise!”

Light flickered within Su Hao’s eyes.

Model Analysis!

Backtrack!

Swish!

Under the light, Su Hao looked back at what happened last night. After cultivating to his best state, he rested a little. Then, he didn’t know what happened, but he gradually fell asleep and then dreamed of that place again.

Sleepy?

Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

With his current strength, would he still feel tired and sleepy?

Ridiculous!

With Backtrack still activated, Su Hao suddenly reached out his hand and stopped at a scene because he suddenly saw a flash of red light on his body. Then, he became lethargic.

That red light wrapping around him was faintly indiscernible.

“As I expected, something was wrong!”

“Could it be curse force?”

Su Hao speculated it, but that force didn’t give the feeling of an evil aura; rather, it had an unusual familiarity as if he had encountered it before somewhere.

“I have encountered it before?” Su Hao frowned slightly.

“Model Analysis!”

“Deduce!”

Su Hao searched through his memory for a match. Then, after a few minutes, Su Hao found a trace of something familiar within his memory.

The result was beyond his expectations.

“It turned out to be him?”

Su Hao looked stunned.

He thought that would be an enemy, but never would he imagine that it would be that senior.

Li Lei!

That senior left this for me?

Su Hao could sense where the problem was. Those things, it can’t be…

Su Hao suddenly felt horrified.

“No, it’s not.” Su Hao shook his head.

However, no matter how he thought, the possibility he thought earlier grew stronger and stronger as it became clearer in his mind. If everything was like that…

“Forget about it, I won’t think anymore.” Su Hao took a deep breath and said, “Once the ship reaches the bridgehead, everything will be clear.”

However, soon…

Su Hao suddenly realized another problem he had always forgotten.

He was different from others.

He was questioning the world. He knew that something was wrong with this world, but for others, even if they were doubtful, they wouldn’t be that sure like him because…

Those who were so sure of it already died!

The law enforcement wouldn’t sit still!

Then, those he thought were the same like him would be gone by now. Even if some people had doubts, it was a small number. If so…

The purpose of Nine Snakes wasn’t to question the world.

“Nine Snakes are not confirming the problem of this world.”

Su Hao had always thought that Nine Snakes would act so unrestrained because they questioned the world and everything, but now it seemed that this conclusion had been overturned.

Then…

What was their true purpose?

Regarding this, Su Hao had guessed many times, but it would be overturned each time. However, now he felt that he couldn’t wait any longer.

The problem related to the Su family had been solved.

The longer he delayed Nine Snakes’ problem, the more serious it would end up. No one could guess how long they would hide, not to mention if Nine Snakes had some other talents in their possession…

How would Su Hao let it pass?

However, what was it exactly?

“Huh?”

“Aaahhhhhh, damn it!”

Within Kingdom of Heaven, Ping Yang’s cry suddenly came.

“What happened?”

Su Hao was shocked and hurriedly entered Kingdom of Heaven. Then, he saw a scene that turned his face dark. Ping Yang was studying something under the skirt of that little loli, Xiao An…

Seeing Su Hao enter, Ping Yang was startled. Then he pointed at Xiao An in panic and said, “Hair!”

Bam!

Su Hao kicked him into the sea.

Can you be any more vulgar?

“There’s hair on her body!”

Ping Yang covered his ass that got bitten by a dark fish.

Su Hao sneered, “Don’t you grow hair over there?”

“No!” Ping Yang was awakened and then quickly waved his hand, “Her thigh. Something isn’t right, look at it for yourself.”

“Huh?”

Su Hao paused for a moment. He then walked over and gently lifted Xiao An’s skirt. On her thigh, Su Hao finally saw the cause of Ping Yang’s panic.

Hair.

A layer of ice-like hair covered Xiao An’s legs. They looked extremely brilliant. From a distance, Xiao An’s legs were akin to ice crystals.

That was a fascinating beauty to admire.

“So beautiful.”

Ping Yang’s eyes had small stars.

Su Hao just casually stretched out his hand and felt that ice layer.

“Damn it!” Ping Yang was shocked, “My goddess!”

“This feeling…”

Su Hao didn’t have the time to bother with him. Frowning slightly, his brain was processing wildly before he finally obtained a result that made him a bit shocked. Xiao An wasn’t human.

No.

To be more accurate, she’s not a pure human!

There was beast blood in her?

Remembering what Xiao An said last time and her identity, Su Hao quickly came up with a terrifying result… Nine Snakes, the leader of that terrorist organization!

That powerful guy wasn’t a human!

He turned out to be a beast!

“This is going to be troublesome.” Su Hao took a deep breath.

“Has Xiao An woken up before?” Su Hao asked.

“Nope.” Ping Yang shook his head, “She has been sleeping all this time. The outbreak of Art of Rejuvenation was too potent after all.”

“Asleep…” Su Hao’s eyes flickered, “Then I can only resort to using Backtrack.”

His current strength now far exceeded that of Xiao An. Thus, he could easily perform Backtrack on her. However, due to Xiao An’s state, even if he performed Backtrack, he could only get some incomplete fragments of her memory.

“Backtrack!”

Light circulated around Su Hao’s body.

Surrounding Xiao An, layers of illusions emerged that were the fragments of her memory. There were only very few, and many were incomplete. However, Su Hao captured a scene. Within the icy snow, Xiao An left the team as the others marched forward…

Snap.

The scene vanished.

Su Hao left Kingdom of Heaven because he remembered what that place was!

“Yiran?” Su Hao contacted Chen Yiran, “When you cultivated, did you meet anyone?”

“En.” Chen Yiran softly replied, “A few days ago, I met some people who were heading to the extreme north. I didn’t even dare to enter that place. I am not sure where those espers came from…”

Swish!

Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

The extreme north…

Could it be that Nine Snakes’s goal was there?!

Su Hao was finally able to deduce it. If it was there, everything could be explained then. Everything Nine Snakes did, everything planned by Nine Snakes…

It was all to delay!

To put it in words simply, Nine Snakes used Huangliang City to attract the entire Federation’s attention and then secretly carried out their own activities…

For Nine Snakes to be willing to pay such a price just to delay.

There can only be one possibility, one of Nine Great Despairs…

Heavenly Magnetic Despair!

Heavenly Magnetic Despair, listening to the name alone, one might not understand.

But if one is to describe it in other words, everyone will probably know. Among the Nine Great Despairs, there were two that are the most unique. One is in human territory called Heavenly Magnetic Despair, and the other one in the beast domain called Geomagnetic Despair.

Those places were the most guarded among the Nine Great Despairs!

Over there…

It was enough to shake the foundation of the whole earth.

Heavenly Magnetic Despair covered the entire Federation, protecting mankind! All the beasts would be absolutely suppressed for those who dare to invade the human world! While Geomagnetic Despair also protected every beast, suppressing human beings and preventing them from invading the beast domain.

Heavenly Magnetic Despair, and Geomagnetic Despair.

Those were the points of suppression to humans and beasts!

Those two perfectly divided the two hemispheres, and their junction was today’s beast battlefield. Without a doubt, if Heavenly Magnetic Despair was destroyed, the suppression of the beast in the Federation would disappear…

That would definitely invite a disaster!

“Nine Snakes’ leader is so ambitious!” Su Hao’s eyes shone coldly.

He didn’t know how the leader of Nine Snakes crossed the sky, turning into a human that no one noticed his existence. However, Su Hao knew that he must not let them succeed no matter what!

“I’ll go to Heavenly Magnetic Despair!” Su Hao immediately made a decision.

However, just when he did so, Chen Yiran spoke, “Su Hao, I just looked over there just now. There is no way to get through.”

“Can’t get through?” Su Hao froze for a moment.

“En.” Chen Yiran explained, “The entire northern land is sealed. From the place where I train, starting from three kilometers north, it’s a sealed world. Even if Master opens it, it would take time.”

“Sealed?” Su Hao’s heart thumped for a second.

Time!

It was indeed time!

Nine Snakes created three million dead souls to attract everyone’s attention and fought for time! During this time, Nine Snakes didn’t even rush into the Great Despair but instead laid a net. Even if a peak world esper goes there, if one is to open the seal, Nine Snakes’s goal would be accomplished!

“Damn it!”

Su Hao forced himself to calm down.

There must be a way…

There must be!

Su Hao put his right hand on the table and tapped it unconsciously. The familiar sound made him think more clearly. Nine Snakes’s goal was crystal clear.

It was to destroy Heavenly Magnetic Despair!

Without a doubt, this move of Nine Snakes was planned with extreme caution. Even if the Su family’s old ancestor is to rush there, he would be at his wits end. Even if the seal is removed, he wouldn’t be able to catch up to them.

Then…

There could only be one other way.

Su Hao stood up.

Under this crisis of life and death, whether or not mankind could survive, everything will be revealed soon.

He thought that the fight between beasts and humans is inevitable, but never would he thought that this battle would start so suddenly, and that he was the one initiating it.

“A war, huh?” Su Hao smiled sinisterly, “Nine Snakes, I will satisfy what you want! However, will things move forward like what you thought?”

“Let us wait and see!”

chapters.body:
Chapter 982 - The First Conference Of Beasts And Humans…

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

On the internet, an extremely absurd virtual meeting was held.

Both sides consisted of the strongest humans and beasts, with the chairperson of the meeting being the Heavenly Emperor who existed in legends.

No one knew how the conference went.

For all humans and beasts, what is more of a concern was the result. After a full month of discussion, the result of the conference was finally out.

Humans and beasts had made peace.

Yes.

They managed to reach an agreement together.

Mainly it was due to the destruction of the suppression that humans were able to see the full picture of the situation in the beast realm. Similarly, the beasts also had countries and systems. Ordinary beasts were indistinguishable from humans. In fact, they even copied the Federation’s laws. The so-called bloody killing path only happened to a few extreme beasts.

Humans were developing, and the beasts were no exception.

No creature would stay in primitive society forever.

Let humans and beasts enjoy the same treatment. One had to admit that the Federation was excellent in this aspect. In minutes, countless regulations were freshly released. Of course, for the beasts here, the rules were to regulate enlightened beasts.

Beasts were only considered normal after enlightenment.

Only by enlightenment could they be regarded as a truly intelligent lifeform.

As for those still uncivilized?

Isn’t that just like any wild monster?!

Since the beasts themselves weren’t polite to those communities, how could human beings be polite?

In the Federation’s words, you beasts better not let out those beasts with low IQ; otherwise, they will just lower your standards. If mankind really thinks that you beasts are all of that level of IQ, that would be troublesome. Regarding this, the beasts were angry but had to accept it.

After all…

They had to consider the beasts’ face, right?

Having said that, a discussion is a discussion. Regarding the conditions, both sides had been arguing for a long time. The reason was very simple. The beast battlefield was literally the largest land in the world!

Since the battle couldn’t continue anymore, who owns the battlefield?

The beast battlefield surrounded the entire world, and its area was about one-quarter of the humans’ populated land! With twenty years of killing there, it was the best place to cultivate!

Thus, who would own it?

Rumor said that during the discussion, there were a lot of quarrels, and Wang Ru nearly went into a fight with a beast.

In the end, they managed to agree with a conclusion.

Fight!

Since humans and beasts were treated equally, the beast battlefield should belong to the strong, the true geniuses. In this regard, both humans and beasts were equally dissatisfied.

Thus, the final decision was to decide using a competition.

The young geniuses of mankind and beasts would compete in a one-on-one duel to see who is the strongest in the future between the beasts and humans! The victors would then control the beast battlefield.

This point won unanimous praise from both sides.

This game had also successfully diverted the attention of humans and beasts. Using this method, they could vent all those years of hostility.

During this time of sudden peace, this competition will be the best diversion point.

Both humans and beasts had suffered heavy casualties for many years before finally deciding to conclude the victor in a peaceful manner. Naturally, everyone would agree.

Of course, the attribution of the beast battlefield wasn’t permanent.

After consideration by both parties, this kind of competition would be held every three years. Even if you obtain the rights to the battlefield, other races can still borrow it for cultivation. Of course…

You would need to fork out valuable resources.

This was the balancing strategy.

Of course, these resources weren’t what they valued for humans and beasts because, after this competition, they would only pay attention to one point.

Glory!

Turning all the worries and tensions of the war from previous years into the glory of the race!

However, after the competition was finalized, a group of beasts protested strongly against the name of the battlefield and competition. They claimed that this was racial discrimination by the humans!

What do you mean by beast battlefield?

What is a beast competition?

Can’t you give it a nicer name? Can’t you name it sacred beast, holy beast, or something along the line?

The beast powerhouses, who had long mastered human culture, were naturally unwilling to suffer such disrespect. In the end, a new name was settled.

Glory battlefield.

And the name of the competition would be called Battle of Glory!

The humans and beasts’ glory!

In addition, they also quarreled for a long time regarding some trivial things. Rumor said that thanks to the issue regarding the beasts’ social insurance and housing fund, Wang Ru and Hydra almost had another fight. Of course, in the end, only a beast that has a certain social contribution to humanity can enjoy a perfect life.

In short, after this battle without gunpowder lasted for a month, the first conference of beasts and humans finally ended without issue.

After everything was finalized, the news was released to the world.

The entire world was shocked.

Whether it was a beast or human, when they saw this news, they were stunned.

They managed to reach a conclusion?

Just before they digested the news, the Battle of Glory was already introduced, stunning all humans and beasts.

Battle of Glory?

No, no, no.

Everyone knew that this was the end of the two decades of war!

When they were still digesting the news, Bai Group, the group that Bai Lingfeng belonged to finally released the first holographic online game. This virtual simulation had always appeared in special places such as the natural selection class, and Zhanzheng College had finally spread it all over the world!

Holographic simulation!

A worldwide online network!

This meant that human science and technology had once again leaped to another stage and formally entered the era of holography!

One had to admit that Bai Lingfeng had chosen the right time as the espers were full of anger and had nowhere to vent it! This included those who returned from the battlefield; this would be their holy land.

And Bai Lingfeng’s main theme was peace!

For the peace of mankind and beasts, for your family to not be endangered by war, please migrate the battle from reality to the virtual world, a world that is almost the same as reality.

Here is your brand new future.

This advertisement swept across all the humans and beasts, winning unanimous praise. For the beasts with no entertainment, a holographic online game?

That was something they didn’t even dare to imagine!

Then, the Federation contacted Bai Group to put the upcoming game on this holographic game stage, which signified the start of the national fighting game.

In one day, all sorts of big news made the public dizzy. Although they were still dizzy and unable to digest it all yet, everyone knew that…

A brand new era had arrived!

This was no longer the era of turmoil, or any dark era that they imagined, but the so-called legendary peace that was beyond everyone’s imagination.

Even the Federation didn’t think of this.

After the news was issued, the dissent from the Federation and beasts actually got suppressed by Bai Lingfeng’s holographic online game! Especially those who were deeply poisoned by the taste of war. Both humans and beasts were all ready to participate in the Battle of Glory to win a spot.

At this moment, the beast battlefield, oh no, it should be called the glory battlefield now.

The war had stopped completely!

The surviving people cried in joy. No one would have thought that in their lifetime, they would be able to witness this scene. The era of peace was finally here.

This day was destined to go down in history.

Not to forget that the public remembered this name even more, Su Hao.

Everyone realized that it was precisely because he destroyed the beast suppression point that this day could arrive. Otherwise, mankind wouldn’t even be qualified to negotiate with the beasts, let alone ushering in a new era of peace.

The master of the future.

These five words were said so well.

At this time, everything seemed to return to peace. The war had stopped, and even the legendary Heavenly Emperor had revealed himself. Is there any reason not to stop?

At the beginning of the official launch of the holographic online game, everyone only paid attention to one thing!

The Battle of Glory, which would be held one month later!

Soon, many virtual devices were delivered all over the world. Anyone below 30 could participate in the Battle of Glory. This time…

It would probably be a real confrontation on a global scale, right?

Su family’s residence.

Su Hao was thinking.

He didn’t believe that this matter ended like that.

Damn!

This wasn’t a fairy tale where everyone ended up reunited and had a happy ending.

The only certainty was that the war had stopped.

War or whatever, they were all just a process. What he really cared about was the result. If you want to achieve something, one doesn’t have to go to war. Thus…

For Heavenly Emperor Mingguang to resort to this, what was his goal?

Could it be there was something he had overlooked?

He couldn’t think nor figure it out.

Su Hao shook his head and wanted to discuss it with someone for a bit. Just as he entered Kingdom of Heaven, what surprised him was that Ping Yang, who had always been lazy, was actually reading a book with extreme earnestness.

“What’s with this situation?”

Su Hao got a closer look, and his face instantly turned dark.

Title: Biography of White Snakes

“I want to learn from Senior Xu Xian.”

With a solemn expression on his face, Ping Yang glanced at Xiao An for a second before reimmersing himself in the book, “He’s a senior who dares to take on a snake.”

“…”

“Senior?”

“What the hell is that?”

“Hold on…”

Su Hao seemed to have thought of something. Xiao An seems to be the daughter of Hydra, right?

In other words…

Xu Xian…

Su Hao wiped his sweat off. Looking at the blue crystals shining on Xiao An’s thighs, he gave Ping Yang a surprised look before finally sighing with emotion, “A virgin’s grievances are too scary…”

After mocking Ping Yang for a moment, Su Hao returned to reality. Then, he saw Big Elder rush in excitedly, “Clan Head! Clan Head! The head of Tian Long Court is here!”

“Senior Wang Ru?”

Su Hao’s mind moved.

Wang Ru, he had met once. Wang Ru seemed like the kind of upright for someone of an older generation. He’s also a peak world esper. To find him at this time…

Could it be about the Battle of Glory?

While pondering about it, he hurried to the hall. Never did he think that just as he stepped past the door, he saw Wang Ru come forward and put a hand on his shoulder, saying earnestly.

“Su Hao, I can see you are handsome with an amazing physique and are extraordinary with a domineering spirit between your eyebrows. As for the task to save mankind, I will leave it to you.”

Su Hao: “…”

chapters.title: Chapter 983 - A Defrauded Competition
chapters.body:
Chapter 983 - A Defrauded Competition

Chapter 983: A defrauded competition

“Battle of Glory?”

Su Hao could roughly guess what Wang Ru was here for.

“En.” Wang Ru nodded, “Actually, the problem regarding Battle of Glory isn’t very big, but this is the first time that humans and beasts actually face off against each other in public.”

“So, we mustn’t lose!”

“First place! We must obtain it!”

Su Hao nodded.

These were within his expectation. Although he didn’t think he was invincible in this world, he should still be able to give a good fight among the younger generation, right?

First place?

It’s within his grasp!

“No, you don’t understand.” Wang Ru said seriously, “We are well aware of your strength. So how could the beasts not be aware of it? Although you have all sorts of achievements, such as killing a pseudo-emperor with a slash and scaring off Yun Yi, your true strength is still at the level two world realm. This point, you should be well aware, right?”

“En.”

Su Hao was helpless.

That was the case. The reason he could defeat Yun Yi was by relying on the breakthrough of Ping Yang and the others.

“Let me ask you one question.” Wang Ru took a deep breath, “The strength you had when defeated Yun Yi, can you do it a second time?”

“Nope.” Su Hao shook his head.

“I knew it would be like this.” Wang Ru smiled bitterly, “For a forbidden technique to be able to make you burst out with the strength of a level three world realm from a level two world realm, it must be a one-time usage.”

“What’s wrong?” Su Hao finally realized the problem.

“The strength of beasts and humans are equal in some aspects. For example, you see, this holographic online game would never happen on the beast’s side. Human technology is far beyond the reach of the beasts. However, at the same time, the beasts also have something that we can’t match.”

Wang Ru’s tone was a bit low.

“What thing?”

Su Hao’s heart skipped a beat.

We humans have an online community, where interaction and evaluation are why we can understand other people’s every move. However, thanks to that, the beasts have a clearer understanding of our strength, and this was why they could repeatedly target human geniuses successfully.”

“As an exchange of deal, humans popularize virtual devices to the beasts while similarly, the beasts have to pay the same price. The list of their strength deductions has been revealed.” Wang Ru’s face looked solemn.

“A list of strength deductions?” Su Hao’s eyes narrowed.

“Yes.” Wang Ru nodded, “A list of geniuses created by a pseudo-emperor who’s not good at combat. All people under 30 are eligible to be listed. The accuracy rate is close to 99%. Both humans and beasts are listed there. Based on the strength, the top one hundred is identified.”

“Then, where am I?” Su Hao realized something.

“Seventy-two.” Wang Ru smiled bitterly.

Su Hao’s hand trembled.

Seventy-two!

Are you trying to tease me?

Su Hao’s eyes widened immediately.

Although he didn’t think he was first, he was also aware that there are many geniuses in the beast’s side, but he should still be able to remain within the top ten, right? What’s with this seventy-two?

“Let me have a look.” Su Hao sounded angry.

Wang Ru showed the data on the virtual screen.

___________

Name: Su Hao

Age: 23

Strength: Level two world realm

Evaluation: Killing a pseudo-emperor with a single slash, defeated a level three world esper, Yun Yi, entered into Nine Great Despairs many times, destroyed Geomagnetic Despair alone, and has a high reputation in the human world. Based on the deduction, Su Hao might be using a one-time forbidden technique that can’t be repeated again in life. So, his combat evaluation didn’t consider this.

Ranking: 72

___________

Su Hao’s eyes narrowed.

Level two world realm, seventy-two?

Looking up the list, Su Hao saw Wan Cheng in front of him.

___________

Name: Wan Cheng

Age: 26

Strength: Level two world realm

Evaluation: Became a world esper while in Taihu Territory, has his own talent Rule Force, possess a fourth-ranked boundary spirit, exceptional talent, amazing fighting power

Ranking: 68

___________

“This list…”

Su Hao finally became serious. What was even more frightening was in the top ten list, all of them were beasts. All of them were at level three world realm! The list issued by the beast had been converted to the world realm as an indicator to allow humans to have a better understanding.

“Impossible!” Su Hao’s eyes widened.

This was a list for those under 30! Why were there so many beasts at level three world realm? Su Hao looked at Wang Ru in disbelief.

“This is the problem.” Wang Ru smiled bitterly, “This is the difference between beasts and humans. Humans rely on talent, while the beasts rely on their bloodline. However, talent couldn’t be inherited, but the bloodline…”

“Have you seen someone who’s already a domain esper when he was born?”

“Domain esper?” Su Hao took a deep breath after hearing those words, “You’re trying to say…”

“Yes, you’re right.” Wang Ru pointed at the first ranked name, “His father is a pseudo-emperor!”

___________

Name: Mo Ling

Age: 22

Strength: Peak world realm

Evaluation: The child of a pseudo-emperor with an amazing bloodline. Being blessed since birth, he was already a domain esper from the time he was born. Now, he’s at the peak world realm. The beast with the highest hope of being an emperor-ranked beast!

Rank: 1

___________

The child of a pseudo-emperor!

A domain esper the moment he was born!

Su Hao felt like cursing.

Bloodline!

Human genetics would, at most, provide grade A talents for newborns. If the parents have amazing talents, the children may also be espers with amazing potential. As for the beasts, they were more extreme! The inherited bloodline could make them formidable.

This was the part that surpassed humans.

Su Hao looked through the list. The later part was still fine. From the 100th to 300th ranking, nearly half of them were occupied by humans, but…

Among the top 100, very few were humans!

Wan Cheng, 68th…

Su Hao, 72th…

Then, in the 80s and 90s, a few more names appeared that included Zheng Tai and the others. Out of the top 100, only 10 were humans!

One-tenth?

Su Hao was extremely unhappy.

“How do you feel after looking at the list?” Su Hao looked at Wang Ru.

“The evaluation of human strength is very fair.” Wang Ru smiled bitterly, “However, the geniuses among the beasts…”

“The gap shouldn’t be so big, right?” Su Hao was doubtful.

“In fact, humans and beasts are similar, but thinking about it, most strong humans are over 30 years old. As for the beasts…”

“Damn it! Are there any beasts before the origin ability era?!”

Wang Ru couldn’t help but vent out his frustration.

“Damn it!”

Su Hao finally understood.

Before the era of origin ability, most of the beasts were just animals. How long could they live? Some were even just born as the origin ability era began. The beasts rose rapidly, and even if the past were to be included, the beasts would only be thirty years old! Except for the real old-timers like Hydra…

The beasts didn’t exceed thirty years old, making up the majority!

To put it in simple words.

They got defrauded!

“You old foxes actually couldn’t trick them?” Su Hao looked at Wang Ru in amazement.

Wang Ru’s face was gloomy, “The one who negotiated with us at that time was a beast transformed from a fox.”

Su Hao: “…”

Battle of Glory.

The age limit of 30 years old actually ended up handicapping the Federation?

What was there to fight then?

“Plus.” Wang Ru pointed at Mo Ling, “This first ranked guy is a real evildoer, just like you all!”

“Really?”

Su Hao looked at the list and said nothing.

In the room, only the sound of his fingers tapping the table could be heard.

“Has the details regarding Battle of Glory been announced?” Su Hao asked suddenly.

“I am still communicating with the Bai family. After all, a holographic device is required. However, the rules are the same as the past. Every human and beast can participate. After one round of screening, the true global strength will be released. In addition to the champion of Battle of Glory, ninety-nine more people would be elected.”

“The beasts are trying to monopolize all 100 places.”

Su Hao smiled, “How long will the game last?”

“Three months. Elimination round in the first month, preliminary round in the second month, and the top 16 matches in the final month.”

“What about the reward then?”

“The inheritance from the Heavenly Emperor.”

“What?!” Su Hao stood up in shock.

“Heavenly Emperor Mingguang said that the first rank represented the true genius of a new era and is qualified to accept his inheritance. He will teach the secret of breaking through to the Emperor-rank.” Wang Ru’s face twitched, “To be honest, even us old-timers are interested in joining the fun.”

“Damn that fox beast!”

Obviously, Wang Ru was still unwilling to be tricked by the fox beast by using the age limit, but what shocked Su Hao was the plan of Heavenly Emperor Mingguang.

Inheritance of Heavenly Emperor…

Wouldn’t it be fine to pass it to Chen Yifeng?

What was he planning to do?

Countless thoughts flashed in Su Hao’s mind at this moment, which included the time needed for Heavenly Emperor Mingguang to restore his strength and so on…

Su Hao didn’t have a good impression of this guy.

Anyway…

He would never let this guy’s plan succeed!

Su Hao smirked.

He couldn’t guess Heavenly Emperor Mingguang’s plan, and he didn’t want to guess. What he thought of was pretty straightforward. Anyway, no matter what you want to do, I won’t let you succeed.

One month later, the competition would begin!

One month for elimination, and one month for preliminary; when he meets Mo Ling, it will be three months later. With this period of time as a buffer, it wasn’t like there wouldn’t be any hope for victory.

Su Hao looked at Kingdom of Heaven.

7/10.

“Three more to go!”

“Once I obtain three more talents, I can definitely enter the top ten!”

Su Hao made a decision.

“Then, what’s the purpose of senior finding me today?” Su Hao looked at Wang Ru suspiciously. He didn’t believe that after seeing the power of Mo Ling, these old guys thought that he would win. Thus, for him to find Su Hao right now…

“Hehe.” Wang Ru rubbed his hands and said awkwardly, “There is no Chen Yifeng in the list.”

“Oh?” Su Hao just remembered something, and suddenly understood their intention, “Senior wants Chen Yifeng to act on behalf of humans?”

“En.” Wang Ru sounded a bit embarrassed.

As a disciple of Heavenly Emperor Mingguang, Chen Yifeng may be able to defeat Mo Ling. This might be the only chance for mankind to win.

“Heavenly Emperor Mingguang is also a beast.” Su Hao glanced at him lightly.

Wang Ru then realized. For Heavenly Emperor Mingguang to not act, that’s already good news. For his disciple to represent humans to suppress the beasts? These old guys of the Federation, had their brains become deformed?

“I feel dizzy.” Wang Ru patted his head.

“But to be in the top ten, it’s not like there isn’t a method.” Su Hao suddenly smiled.

“Oh?” Wang Ru’s eyes lit up.

He did not want humans to lose that badly. If there is someone in the top ten, it will look better.

“Promise me two conditions.” Su Hao said decisively, “And I will help you break into the top ten.”

chapters.title: Chapter 988 - How Shameless Are You?!
chapters.body:
Chapter 988 - How Shameless Are You?!

Chapter 988: How shameless are you?!

A cobra?

Su Hao looked at the beast in front of him and was a bit surprised.

This beast was about the size of a human. Although it had assumed a human figure, Su Hao felt that its body was a bit flat… Are you sure you’re a beast and not an ET?

Su Hao was too speechless to curse.

There were all sorts of strange results when beasts changed into a human appearance, but this was the first time he had seen someone become an ET.

“Hiss~”

That snake-shaped beast looked at Su Hao coldly.

As a 16th ranked character in the genius list, to suppress 72nd ranked, the so-called future lord of the world, this was simply a godsend opportunity.

Kill him, and that would be enough for it to become famous in one battle.

Swish!

A shadow flashed.

That snake-shaped beast rushed up suddenly.

“It’s here.”

Su Hao looked cold as he threw what was in his hand out without any hesitation.

“Shadowless God Needle!”

Swish!

Swish!

Hundreds of Shadowless God Needles flashed, and everyone waited with eyes enlarged. One needs to know that Shadowless God Needle had killed countless people in seconds with this one trick. Would it still be effective against that strong snake-shaped beast?

Time seemed to have slowed down at this moment.

Su Hao’s Shadowless God Needles were quick, shooting densely at the snake-shaped beast. However, when the silver needle struck that beast’s skin, something strange happened! The needles that were supposed to pierce through the snake suddenly experienced a shift to a certain extent.

Swish!

Swish!

The Shadowless God Needles brushed past the beast.

Hundreds of Shadowless God Needle, they all failed to hit their target.

An uproar happened in the audience.

Just like Mo Ling’s obliteration, Shadowless God Needle’s Shadowless God Needle was a headache to countless beasts, but this time, they missed and rendered completely ineffective! Not only did that beast easily avoid Su Hao’s Shadowless God Needle, it even shifted its body and charged toward Su Hao.

“What a great cobra.”

Su Hao had long been prepared.

Rule Force, distortion!

This was the beast’s Rule Force. After all, the penetration property of Shadowless God Needle was limited. It would be impossible to penetrate the Rule Force of the beast!

Swish!

A red light ray flashed.

Swish!

Snap!

Su Hao’s figure was torn into pieces on the spot before he reappeared at another spot, causing an exclamation. That dodge just now was extremely thrilling.

“What the hell was that?”

Su Hao turned around to take a look and suddenly felt sick.

Tongue…

The long tongue of the cobra.

That redlight with killing intent up to the sky turned out to be the spit of the beast. The place on the ground hit by the red light had changed its form.

That snake spit was highly poisonous.

“What a terrifying guy.”

Su Hao was on high alert.

The beasts were similar to humans. To be a world esper, they need boundary spirits, and the beasts’ boundary spirits generally depend on their physical body. For example, tongue…

Su Hao was very sure.

The tongue of that beast must have the strength of a fourth grade boundary spirit!

Boom!

Su Hao flashed sideways.

A piece of the ground was shattered again, which triggered another exclamation from the audience.

Su Hao frowned slightly.

If it was any other, he could rely on his powerful physical body to charge forward, but that tongue… it was so disgusting no matter how he thought of it!

Swish!

Swish!

That beast’s tongue was very flexible.

Su Hao shot another two Shadowless God Needles, but they were easily swept away.

This was terrifying!

“Hahahaha, the so-called future lord, aren’t you just so-so?”

That beast laughed wildly, “It turned out that the so-called Shadowless God Needle can only deal with those level one world espers. Why do you look so scared now?”

“Hmmpphh!”

Su Hao let out a cold snort.

Boom!

Xinghe Arrow was shot out!

Snap!

An arrow appeared.

That long tongue of the beast once again moved, engulfing the incoming Xinghe Arrow shot by Su Hao. With a crash, Xinghe Arrow burst!

That tongue wasn’t harmed at all!

This guy…

Everyone couldn’t help but be frightened.

What a terrifying tongue!

At this time, even the audience could see that the strongest part of that beast was its tongue. On the contrary, its body was relatively fragile. Su Hao tried to attack its body several times, but it was easily intercepted with its unusually flexible tongue. Combined with its distortion force, Su Hao could just forget about getting close to it.

Swish!

Swish!

Two more Xinghe Arrows were shot out!

“Ignorant human.” That beast grinned, “Do you think the same attack can break my defense? No, you’re wrong. Your arrows couldn’t even break my defense!”

“Really?”

Su Hao didn’t bother to exchange words with it at all.

Buzz~

The void flashed.

Su Hao’s fingers trembled for a bit before the familiar arrows flashed.

Ten arrows aimed at the heart!

Swish!

Swish!

Swish!

All the arrows burst out.

This time, Su Hao didn’t attack that beast’s body at all but aimed at its tongue instead. Ten powerful Xinghe Arrows tried to pin its tongue to the ground. From the base to the tip of the tongue, those ten Xinghe Arrows hit the target perfectly.

Ding!

Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

At this moment, that beast realized something was amiss. Its powerful Rule Force flashed, and the distortion force twisted the ten Xinghe Arrows.

Clang, clang!

Only three arrows hit its tongue, and the remaining seven exploded.

“Such a pity.”

Su Hao said to himself.

If those attacks didn’t cripple its tongue, the attempt would be futile. Sure enough, the power of three Xinghe Arrows was only enough to make the beast’s tongue a little numb before quickly recovering back to normal. That beast would never give him another chance!

“Go and die.”

That angered beast rushed up.

Swish!

Su Hao shot another thing.

Swish!

The tongue swept.

That thing that was supposed to blast the beast’s body was easily swept away by the soft tongue. The beast grinned for a second, “What a joke, such a thing…”

“Huh?”

The beast was suddenly shocked.

Because it only discovered at this moment that the thing its tongue held on seemed to be ringing?

Di,di~

Di,di~

Di,di~ Di,di~

That beast lowered its head and saw a flashing indicator light and a tube. Also, not to forget the horrified eyes of the surrounding audience.

Boom!

Bright fireworks rose into the sky.

Everyone was dumbfounded.

Humans were dumbfounded, and so were the beasts.

Just now…

Was it a hallucination?

Had they seen incorrectly?

What the hell was that!

If they guessed right, Su Hao threw out what seemed to be a nuclear weapon. Since when can a nuclear weapon be brought into the virtual fighting stage?

The entire scene was filled with smoke and dust.

The entire stage was flattened…

That lofty mountain range changed from an E to A shape, and the blood spattered on the ground seemed to have proved that there was a terrifying, powerful beast standing there earlier.

And now…

Countless beasts swallowed their saliva for a bit.

The other day, when they were still in peace, the Geomagnetic Despair also had such a firework rise and completely awakened everyone. Now…

The same scene appeared again!

It was really him!

That fearful human!

Is Wan Cheng strong?

Of course.

Is Chen Yiran strong?

Of course.

However, if the beasts were to judge the most terrifying human, they would definitely choose Su Hao. The scene in Geomagnetic Despair just happened not long ago, and now, another one appeared!

Damn!

To use a nuclear weapon during the match?

Can you be any more shameless?

In Kingdom of Heaven.

Ping Yang looked sluggish. He had thought of Su Hao using all sorts of abilities to win, but never would he have thought about this. This shameless bastard threw a nuclear weapon…

His mind still recalled Su Hao’s words from the other day.

What would you do if the other party broke the rules?

Flip the table…

Flip the…

Flip…

But now?

That beast was certainly hateful, but had it broken any rules?

No!

Yet this Su Hao gorgeously destroyed the field. The table was flipped completely, but it was before the chess match was over! Wasn’t it too shameless to flip the table now? Others were clueless, but Ping Yang knew clearly. That nuclear weapon was something prepared by Su Hao earlier…

“Cheating!”

“This is cheating!”

The match turned silent for two minutes before an angry voice came from the beasts’ side.

“How is this possible?!”

“How can there be a nuclear weapon in the virtual reality?!”

They couldn’t bear it anymore!

Damn it.

If it was in reality, forget about it, but in a virtual reality?

Wasn’t this an act of bullying?!

This was akin to someone holding a wooden stick and struggling for life, yet you violently brought an AK and rushed toward the crowd. Who would dare to fight you then?

Wasn’t this literally using cheats?!

Regarding this, the beasts made a serious protest.

The match was forced to stop.

Then, the beasts and humans conducted an urgent investigation and found out that all the data was normal, which is to say, Su Hao’s nuclear weapon belonged to an origin technique!

“Impossible!”

“A combat origin technique?”

Everyone’s eyes widened. Each one of them couldn’t believe it.

Since when did nuclear weapons become an origin technique?

In desperation, the officials found Su Hao for an explanation. Su Hao just casually replied, “My Rule Force is Realization.”

“Realization!”

Everyone was shocked.

With that one word, everything was clear now.

What is Su Hao’s talent?

Model Analysis!

Many people were aware of how Su Hao built models to disguise himself, but now that Su Hao truly used Realization, they understood what was the most terrifying strength of Su Hao! It wasn’t any boundary spirit or transformation, but…

Realization!

At this time, the beasts were shocked to realize the reason behind the destruction of Geomagnetic Despair.

No wonder that place would be shattered inexplicably. The space channel would be too unstable to carry a nuclear bomb through it as it would be easily destroyed. It turned out that bringing Su Hao alone was enough.

Ten nuclear weapons.

Such a crude and simple way!

Buzz~

The explosion of a nuclear weapon only took a few seconds.

Su Hao appeared in a leisure manner.

On the ground, ashes could be seen.

But this time, no one questioned him anymore. Those looking at Su Hao were full of fright. Realization, what kind of force is that? Damn it, even a nuclear weapon could be brought out! What should they do next time if he created a super-energy particle reactor and threw it onto the stage?

Of course, many beasts seemed to be rejoicing. Fortunately, the humans had made peace with the beasts, or else…

Hehe.

During the war between both sides, when there was a guy who could cross the space channel at any time into the deeper regions of the enemy base to throw a nuclear weapon…

What was there to continue the war then?!

“Su Hao, victory.”

A few huge words appeared.

They shined brilliantly.

The match was over.

Su Hao became the fourth human to qualify within the top 32, shocking everyone.

Chapter 990 - Brother Wealth Distributor’S Grievances

Chapter 990: Brother Wealth Distributor’s grievances

___________

Name: Wan Cheng

Spotlight: Killing a level two world esper with a slash

Grade: Pay extra attention!

___________

Name: Chen Yiran

Spotlight: One drop of water to kill a level two world esper

Grade: Pay extra attention!

___________

Name: Li Xin

Spotlight: Three consecutive bye rounds, unpredictable

Grade: Pay extra attention!

___________

Name: Su Hao

Spotlight: Expert in throwing nuclear weapons.

Grade: Pay extra attention!

___________

In one round of matches, only four people managed to enter the top 32. However, it frightened the beasts that, in addition to Wan Cheng, the other three obviously showed terrifying abilities that surpassed their strength on the surface!

And the scariest part was…

No one managed to crack their trick!

Whether it was Su Hao’s nuclear weapon or Chen Yiran’s water droplet, if one couldn’t work out a counter, they likely could forget about winning the next round.

Even if one can’t suppress those moves, you should know how to defend, right?

As for Li Xin…

This guy was too strange to be considered.

If one needs to counter, there needs to be a move to begin with. Li Xin hasn’t even taken any action, how could they counter him?

It was unknown.

In a competition where it was obvious that beasts had an absolute advantage, the beasts suddenly felt a little worried. If such rhythm was to proceed, wouldn’t they lose?

Soon, it was the humans’ tenth match.

This was a world esper who controlled a unique Rule Force. Under Su Hao’s guidance, he managed to defeat his opponents and won with a slight advantage. However, this time, in front of a beast that was an unknown times stronger than him, he only managed to resist three moves before tapping out.

The difference in strength was too huge.

Yet another loss.

Everyone sighed secretly.

Out of fourteen people, only four managed to make it into the top 32! With four humans remaining, how many could qualify? Just as everyone sighed, one person walked up the stage.

Zheng Tai appeared with strong killing intent.

His opponent, who was also a level two world esper, had reached the peak and stabilized.

This should have been a battle without suspense.

Within the audience, even that beast who lost to the young man earlier felt itchy again and started to provoke him, “Hehe, you still dare to bet?”

“How much?” That young man sneered.

“Forty thousand! You dare or not?!”

“Come then, who’s afraid of whom?!” That young man shouted.

“Brother!”

His companions were a step too late. When they dragged him away, 40,000 virtual coins had already been thrown in, “Aaaaaa, brother, are you mad? Didn’t you see the difference between these two contestants’ strengths?”

“What’s there to be afraid of?!” That young man curled his lips, “This daddy really can’t stand that beast’s arrogant look.”

His companions: “…”

“Hehe.”

That beast glanced at him contemptuously. Was the human’s intelligence really as high as it imagined? Just a little push and they got triggered, it was simply too easy to fool them.

So what if it lost 30,000?

Soon, it would earn everything back!

On the stage. an endless starry sky fell.

The audience watching from the auditorium saw an unprecedented battle with their own eyes. Everyone was surrounded, but you will never know where your seat is. Somehow, it felt like you were floating in space.

After all, this was virtual reality.

Otherwise, how could hundreds of millions of people be accommodated around a match?

Boom!

Endless brilliance fell.

The match began.

Just as mentioned earlier, this should have been a battle without any suspense. Zheng Tai recently broke through into the world realm. How could he confront a peak level two world esper?

In this battle, the humans didn’t expect much.

Swish!

As soon as the match started, Zheng Tai disappeared quietly.

The beast didn’t panic but calmly surrounded the stage from a distance with its force. Finally, it managed to oppress all the places that Zheng Tai could hide within a five-meter radius.

A head-on battle was inevitable.

Zheng Tai couldn’t hide anymore.

“He’s about to lose.”

“There is no other way. After all, they are not from the same level.”

“Sigh, Zheng Tai is too young.”

“This beast didn’t leave him any flaw. This time, Zheng Tai really encountered his nemesis.”

Everyone sighed.

The beast hadn’t shown any flaws until now. Even though it could force Zheng Tai’s figure out any time, it still proceeded to fight cautiously as it slowly approached its target.

It was until Zheng Tai’s aura loomed that it prepared its attack.

However, just as the beast was about to attack, a cold light flashed in the dark night. Zheng Tai was forced to attack.

“Finally you show yourself.”

That beast remained silent and had already prepared a thunderous blow.

Poof~

A cold light flashed from behind.

That punch from the beast hit empty space. With blood spurting out from its back, its entire body was cut into two pieces! When a master took action, it would only be for a moment, a single hit!

“You…”

The eyes of the beast were very huge before its death.

It died?

The audience was in an uproar!

What did they just see?

One hit kill!

Zheng Tai killed the beast with a single blow.

What was even more frightening was that Zheng Tai had always been outside of the beast’s search range, but even so, he wasn’t agitated at all. Instead, he followed the beast’s pace until it thought that it had forced Zheng Tai into a corner; only then did he make his move.

One attack, instant kill.

Zheng Tai.

He won.

“So amazing!”

“Haha, Zheng Tai is really strong.”

“The glory from that year’s college entrance exam is still here. He’s indeed our youngest world esper!”

“What powerful strength.”

Everyone was shocked.

How strong was Zheng Tai’s one blow kill move?

Thinking about Liu Ping, who got killed by him in the past, Liu Ping was a level three world esper. He let down his guard and was killed by Zheng Tai. Let alone, that level two world esper? Having gone through the transformation of power in the Great Despair, Zheng Tai was no longer that same young man after mastering the essence of his Rule Force.

The humans cheered.

As for the beasts, their face turned blue because there was no doubt there would be one more on the list of their focus, the assassin Zheng Tai.

“This little guy…”

“Yet another one-hit kill!”

“These few humans look pretty amazing?”

There was a lot of discussion going on between the beasts.

In the audience.

“Brother Wealth Distributor?”

That young man sounded very kind when he called that beast. After all, in just a blink of an eye, he made 80,000 from 10,000. How could he not be kind to this beast? This was the wealth distributor after all.

“Hehe.”

One word popped out from the gritting teeth of the beast.

Its face looked pale.

It really couldn’t understand why when the gap of strength was that huge, the human still won. This was simply too strange! Among the beasts, the difference would be severely suppressed since when they could challenge those of a higher realm? Then, after two more matches among the beasts, it was the 12th human’s turn, Zhao Feng.

That beast glanced and saw the young man with a smirk beside it. Finally, it gave up on the idea of betting.

This Zhao Feng…

It seemed like his talent was also strange.

In the last battle, Zhao Feng fought a strong level one world esper, but he didn’t even come to his opponent at all. Just a wave of his hand wiped out his opponent. His strength and degree of strangeness made everyone afraid. Even on the surface, he didn’t look strong, but no one dared to take him lightly.

“Zhao Feng seemed to be very strong?”

Wang Ru felt a bit relieved.

With Zhao Feng’s ability, reaching the top 64 was already quite a pleasant surprise. As for the top 32, it would be great if he could fight for it. After all, Zhao Feng won the last match too easily. That weird penetration talent of his, combined with Su Hao’s command and pre-battle training, the battle couldn’t be any easier.

“This time, he’s going to lose.” Su Hao sighed inexplicably.

“Why?” Wang Ru was shocked. Before the match began, Su Hao already declared his loss?

Just as he pondered about it, he saw Zhao Feng appear on the stage. Opposite him, another person also appeared from the beast’s side. When Wang Ru saw that person, he instantly shut up.

Zhao Feng’s opponent was a strange beast.

The main point was…

Everyone present knew this beast; ranked second in the genius list, second only to that evildoer Mo Ling. One really had to note that Zhao Feng’s luck was simply too…

Boom!

The battle came fast and ended quickly.

In just a few moves, Zhao Feng was killed on the spot, turning into countless particles and dissipating.

This battle.

Zhao Feng lost.

The gap was too huge for any tricks.

Someone who just stepped into the world realm went against a level three world esper?

There was no room for any leapfrog challenge! Expect Su Hao, this inhumane pervert, it was simply impossible for others to win!

His luck…

There wasn’t even a tiny fraction of Li Xin’s?

“I lost.”

Zhao Feng was a little ashamed when he returned to the audience.

“Don’t worry about it.” Su Hao smiled bitterly, “Even if I am to meet that guy now, I will most likely lose too.”

“The top ten among the beasts are indeed abnormal.” Wang Ru sighed, “By the way, the next contestant, do you know him?”

“I don’t.” Su Hao was also puzzled, “Of our fourteen participants, I only haven’t seen two of them before. Right now, this 12th one is one of them.”

“A powerhouse from the wild!”

In the audience, that young man said with an annoyed look, “I lost.”

The corner of the beast’s mouth twitched for a bit. Damn it, why would it lose when it bet? Then, when it stopped betting, it will win? Damn it… Ah, yes, the next one was said to be unknown among humans. Just an ordinary level two world esper, should I go for another round?

At this time, it saw a sneer at the corner of that young man’s mouth.

“Damn it.”

“This is simply unbearable.”

“Grandson, come here. I want to bet with you.”

That beast was raged.

“Ridiculous.” That young man sneered, “Do you still have any money left?”

“Rest assured.” That beast gritted its teeth. It indeed had enough funds. However, there was a sign of hesitation on its face before it finally took it out, “80,000 virtual coins, this daddy will go all in.”

“Come then.” That young man disdainfully said, and both put in the money.

Without knowing why, the beast always felt something was wrong. After thinking for a bit, it patted its thigh and looked at the young man’s companions, “Why didn’t you stop him this time?”

“What’s there to stop?” His companions sighed faintly, “He’s going to fight there himself. Can we stop him?”

“What?” That beast’s eyes widened suddenly. Then it saw the young man whom it had always despised leisurely disappear from the auditorium and reappear in the arena.

The 13th match of the humans.

Wang Jun!

“Hehe.”

“What a cunning human.”

chapters.title: Chapter 992 - The Domineering And Boundless Su Tiancheng
chapters.body:
Chapter 992 - The Domineering And Boundless Su Tiancheng

Chapter 992: The domineering and boundless Su Tiancheng

Boom!

Dazzling violet light escaped.

That strange scene shocked countless people.

The thin Zi Dian grabbed the beast at its collar with one hand and gently lifted it up! Countless lightning struck down from the sky, and violet thunder blasted down!

There was literally lightning enveloping the audience!

Zi Dian destroyed the opponent with one hand.

Like a demon!

The violet light lasted for a long time until everyone already turned dull watching this scene.

Snap.

Zi Dian threw the charred beast away.

Zi Dian won.

“He… He won?”

“Who said that Zi Dian is an esper in the wild? A useless one?”

“Unbelievable!”

Everyone was terrified.

What kind of strength was that?

That was…

Thunder?

At this time, there was no doubt that the Rule Force mastered by Zi Dian is a thunder type! However, his strength remained unexposed completely. This was a tough guy who still hadn’t exhausted all of his cards.

Humans…

Sure enough, they also had powerful young espers!

After a little surprise, the human beings screamed wildly.

Wan Cheng, Li Xin, Chen Yiran, Su Hao, Zheng Tai, Wan Cheng, and Zi Dian, out of fourteen humans, only seven managed to proceed to the top 32. However, the strength of these seven people still shocked everyone! One needs to note that according to the genius list, the entire human representatives would be wiped out!

How could there be the current glory enjoyed by humans?

These seven unbelievably strong humans!

Today, it was destined to be one hell of a festival.

The rounds for 64-32 ranking just ended, and the matches within the top 32 would begin within a week. Expect those who played the game, everyone left.

Returning to reality, Su Hao directly went to the Federation’s preparation site and pulled out Zi Dian.

“Damn you!”

“I knew it was you!”

Su Hao gave this guy a hug. At this time, Zi Dian also removed his disguise. Zheng Tai, Zhao Feng, and the others were all equally surprised.

Zhou Wang!

It turned out to be him?

“Long time no see.” Zhou Wang grinned a little too hard that it sounded dry.

“Where have you been all this time?” Su Hao sounded worried.

Zhou Wang felt warmness in his heart.

This is what a friend is. Whether or not he’s strong, his friend would care about him.

“After that day, I went to look for the ruins my master mentioned.”

Zhou Wang went silent for a moment before continuing.

That day…

It was a huge blow to both Su Hao and Zhou Wang! Li Tiantian, Blue Dream Butterfly, Xiao Die, many people fell on that day!

Even with the destruction of the Tian family, it still couldn’t save the lost lives.

Zhou Wang hated it.

He hated himself for not being strong enough, which was similar to the past Su Hao!

It was just that after Su Hao became stronger, he managed to awaken Li Tiantian and the others. As for Zhou Wang, he was still immersed in the penance of becoming stronger!

What kind of momentum was that?

Even Zhou Wang was clueless!

Eating and cultivating, after cultivating, he went to bed to sleep before getting up for a meal. His life had been like this in recent years, all in order to become stronger!

“I succeeded.” Zhou Wang squeezed his fists.

“Although I didn’t master everything… at least I won’t be trashed by others that easily. Even if I lose, I have the qualification to make them die together. I will never let anyone hurt people around me again!” Zhou Wang said seriously.

Wasn’t that the case with his past self too?

Resentment.

Darkness.

Hopeless.

What kind of feeling was that?

If it were not for the faint hope to return everything to normal, he would have collapsed long ago.

Su Hao patted Zhou Wang’s shoulder, “Why do you look so bitter and hateful? You are referring to Li Tiantian and the others, aren’t you? Well… they are having good days.”

“Huh?” Zhou Wang was a little surprised.

“You know my force is Realization right? Then…” Su Hao smiled indifferently. Flicking his wrist slightly, a virtual projection gradually formed, and a figure appeared. It was Li Tiantian!

“Huh?”

“Zhou Wang?”

Li Tiantian was also quite frightened when he saw Zhou Wang, “Why are you looking more bitter than before?”

“How are you…” Zhou Wang’s eyes opened wide.

“Ah, you mean me?” Li Tiantian looked at his current appearance, “Oh, my body is gone. It’s not a big deal. I just can’t appear in this world.”

“It’s just…”

Zhou Wang went silent.

The body had disappeared, leaving behind only the soul attached to Su Hao. What kind of sadness was that?

“Eh, it’s not that bitter.” Li Tiantian shrugged for a second. Unable to find the words to explain, he shook his head helplessly, “It’s just two different worlds. In this other world, we are living exactly the same as before. So…”

“You don’t have to feel guilty.”

“Alright.”

It took quite a long time for Zhou Wang to digest this information. In Kingdom of Heaven, Ping Yang wasn’t familiar with Zhou Wang, but he knew who Zhou Wang was. This time, he came closer, “Huh, isn’t this Zhou Wang? Long time no see, I thought you died being beaten by monsters. Finally, you’re willing to show up and help?”

After removing the knot in his heart, Zhou Wang finally felt a bit angry.

At this moment, Su Hao thought of a question.

“Why do you call yourself Zi Dian (Dictionary)?”

“At first, I wanted to call myself Zi Dian (Violet Lightning), but the system prompted that the name had been taken.”

Su Hao: “…”

Everyone: “…”

They were all registered by the Federation, so how would they know Zhou Wang’s bitterness? Then, beside them, a passing young man heard the words and hurriedly came to grab his hands.

“Brother, we’re soulmates!”

“I am Wang Jun.”

Wang Jun said as if he was familiar with them.

“Although the Federation doesn’t restrict names, they still didn’t allow participants with the same name. So, my name wasn’t allowed. If it wasn’t for me having to send a hacker to that guy and having a friendly discussion with him to give up the name, I can’t imagine what I would be called now.”

Wang Jun casually complained of a crime he did that could take him to the Federation’s prison in minutes.

“Cough, cough.”

Wang Ru coughed, pretending he did not hear anything and left.

At this time, those still remaining in the match could be considered as acquainted with each other. Without any surprise, the seven of them would have final training, and the goal was without doubt to reach the top 16!

…..

Su family’s residence.

Cold light flashed, and a figure appeared quietly like a ghost.

Surprisingly, Su Zhengwen and everyone else in the Su family did not discover this figure! It was different from the previous Yin Ling, and the shadow was out of sight without any traces.

Swish!

Swish!

Two steps.

Two instant flashes.

A flash without any Rule Force.

A flash without any origin energy.

Everything was so hidden. Unless someone is here, you would never find out there is a person here! In such an open manner, this person walked into the Su family’s residence.

“Huh?”

Su Zhengwen, who was in his room, pondered.

He felt that something was amiss.

Swish!

Su Zhengwen walked outside instantly.

There was no one.

“No one?”

Su Zhengwen was a little confused.

“Sister Li?” Su Zhengwen simply knocked on the door, “Did Su Hao come back?”

“Ah, no.” Li Xiaoru smiled, “Would you like to come in and wait?”

“There’s no need for that.” Su Zhengwen shook his head.

If there was nothing wrong, great then…

Could it be his imagination?

Su Zhengwen’s Rule Force dissipated. Except for the Su family members, no one else was seen in the surrounding. After using the communication device to view the recording, he still couldn’t find any strangers.

“Recently, it has been quite suspicious.” Su Zhengwen smiled bitterly.

Turning around and returning to the place where Li Xiaoru was, he arranged a layer of Rule Force to detect any abnormalities. Only then was he relieved.

However…

No one noticed!

The figure that entered the Su family had never moved.

He had been standing at the door openly under the scorching sun. However, Su Zhengwen kept passing by him countless times but never saw him.

Not even a slight sense!

Who is this person?!

Swish!

That figure flickered.

That terrifying figure headed through Su Zhengwen’s Rule Force and easily entered Su Hao’s house. In the empty living room, there was only one person.

Under Su Zhengwen’s surveillance, it was as peaceful as ever.

Li Xiaoru was cooking lunch now. Suddenly, she had a pause. Turning around, she looked into the empty living room and frowned slightly before shaking her head in a daze.

“Have I been hallucinating lately?” Li Xiaoru laughed mockingly.

Turning around, she continued to cut vegetables, but she halted her actions instantly.

Because at this time, a cold dagger was placed on her shoulder. A cold aura appeared behind her with biting coldness with a dream-like sound.

“Li Xiaoru?”

“Who are you?” Li Xiaoru put down the kitchen knife and slowly turned around.

It was still empty with a dagger suspended in the air. Such a scene was inexplicably strange.

“It’s you…” Li Xiaoru seemed to remember, “You’re the one who followed Brother Cheng back then.”

“Brother Cheng, so sweet, hehe…”

The figure of that man gradually appeared, revealing a hideous color, “I thought that the person who could make him fascinated would be so stunning, but it turned out to be an ordinary woman.”

“So?” Li Xiaoru asked calmly, “What are you going to do?”

“Sure enough, you’re Su Tiancheng’s woman.”

That man sneered, “To remain calm even when in front of a crisis, you must have a lot of experience. Unfortunately, this time, there will be no Su Tiancheng to save you.”

“Go to hell!”

Snap!

The cold dagger was drawn out, and a bloodstain bloomed like a lotus.

It was scarlet in color.

…..

Somewhere in the Federation, a lean man was being taught by his master.

“Master, why did Su Tiancheng give up on destroying the world?”

“Although I shielded my memory, I still know that there are problems in this world, and Su Tiancheng naturally would not give up that easily.”

That lean man was puzzled.

“It’s an evil fate.”

That old man sighed, “Do you know how many people were aware of this matter in the past, but how many of them still remain? Su Tiancheng, Heavenly Emperor Mingguang, and even me had to seal those memories…”

That lean man nodded.

However, this was just something in the past. How was it related to Su Tiancheng?

“Do you know how they died?” That old man seemed to know what his disciple meant and asked.

“They got killed by the law enforcer.” That lean man affirmed.

“The law enforcement officers came out all that time. Whenever they passed, the place turned into sorrow. Even Heavenly Emperor Mingguang failed to escape the crisis. The only one who escaped it, the one and only…”

That old man said in some admiration.

“Su Tiancheng?”

That lean man turned excited, “How did he escape?”

“Ordinary people who saw the law enforcer would only end up killed or arrested, but Su Tiancheng…”

That old man sounded so in awe when he spoke until here. The lean man raised his ears and was ready to listen to a passionate battle, but the old man’s next sentence almost made him vomit blood on the spot.

“Only Su Tiancheng…”

“Went on top of her.”
