Chapter 994 - A Terrifying Opponent

Chapter 994: A terrifying opponent

“Li Xin couldn’t avoid it?”

Wang Ru was stunned.

He would have never imagined that Brother Good Luck would actually run into a powerful opponent who’s at the level three world realm. He was literally on the verge of losing.

“There is no other way.” Su Hao smiled bitterly, “This is already the limit.”

“Why not let those of the top ten confront each other?” Zheng Tai pondered.

“To change our path and alter the beasts’ path, the consumption of energy isn’t the same.” Su Hao shook his head, “This is already extremely good. Plus…”

“Li Xin, are you afraid?” Su Hao looked at his friend.

“Afraid your head!” Li Xin said disdainfully, “I want to be the strongest man ever!”

“Look at him…”

Su Hao spread his hands, causing everyone to turn speechless.

Since the list of the matchup was finalized, the matches would begin soon. The first one up was Zhou Wang. What was even more surprising was his opponent, an anorexic-looking young man with pale skin. It was a beast who didn’t reveal much of its ability.

Its strength wasn’t strong.

Being able to enter the top 32 was entirely thanks to its realm as a peak level two world esper. It didn’t have any powerful strength itself. Thus, when the opponent of Zhou Wang was known, everyone felt relieved and hoped that humans could secure this first victory. However…

When the battle began, everything changed.

“You’re Zi Dian?”

“Or should I call you Zhou Wang instead?”

Tha beast narrowed its eyes while looking at Zhou Wang.

“You know me?”

Zhou Wang’s expression remained unchanged.

“I don’t know, but we will soon know each other.” That beast smiled, “It’s an honor for me to be able to defeat one of the seven human geniuses.”

“You’re that confident?”

Zhou Wang frowned a little.

“Of course.”

The beast ruminated, “In order to show my respect, I will use my strongest strength to defeat you and let you ignorant humans witness the horror of beasts!”

Swish!

A light ray flashed.

The beast was shrouded in a ball of light and after it dissipated, a shadow appeared.

“This is my original body.”

Zhou Wang’s eyes suddenly widened. He finally knew where the beast’s confidence came from because what appeared before his eyes was a legendary spectre.

Swish~

A shadow hovered.

“A ghost!”

“No, it’s not a ghost! This is a spectre!”

The audience went into an uproar.

Everyone’s eyes widened.

Ghosts were the souls of dead human beings, but they were always regarded as superstitions among the people. At present, even in this era of origin ability, they had never really come into contact with ghosts. However, spectres… or to be more precise, they were just another form of living beings that exist between Heaven and Earth in the form of spiritual bodies.

To sum it up, it was different from the human race.

The specture’s strength was generally not strong, but it still scared everyone because it had a terrifying characteristic! Any normal attack would be rendered invalid! The normal attacks…

Includes all common powers!

“This is a big problem.”

Everyone’s face turned a bit ugly.

Boom!

Zhou Wang’s quick lightning blasted down.

The blooming violet lightning illuminated the entire sky, but what shocked the audience was that terrifying lightning didn’t cause any harm when it hit the spectre!

Snap!

Yet another bolt of lightning passed through.

“Hehe.”

The spectre sneered, “I have already said that your power can’t defeat me.”

Buzz~

A dazzling black glow was shot out.

Zhou Wang suddenly retreated.

Swish~

Cold wind blew past.

A few hairs on Zhou Wang’s forehead were blown off. Everyone felt a chill seeing this scene. Damn, Zhou Wang couldn’t beat the spectre, but can the spectre defeat Zhou Wang?

How could he continue the fight?

If it were a special forbidden technique, that would still be fine, but when the spectre revealed itself, it actually shattered everyone’s fantasy because the original appearance was fake, the previous state was the forbidden technique that had consumption. This ghost-like state was what the other party really looked like.

“There is actually such a thing?”

At the Federation’s audience stand, Wang Ru and the others smiled bitterly when they saw this scene.

It was such a hard thing to avoid the top ten geniuses, but so what? No one would have thought that even the rest of the people had such terrifying strength. Facing this spectre would be even scarier than those in the top ten! Nonsense, how could it not be scary when you can’t even hit it?

“Isn’t that spectre invincible then?” Li Xin was puzzled.

“Not really invincible.” A flash appeared in Su Hao’s eyes, “Based on my guess, there are two possibilities. First, the spectre just stored its actual body in a different space and then mapped it into a projection in reality. Thus, ordinary forces wouldn’t be able to touch it at all. If it were this, it would still be fine since Zhou Wang will always find a way through.”

Hearing this, everyone nodded.

If it were them, they would also look for a way to counter it, and breaking the space would be the best solution. As long as the same space and frequency could be detected, it would be sufficient to defeat this spectre!

“What about the second one then?”

“The second one would be the spectre itself is a trait.” Su Hao’s expression was undoubtedly serious, “At the moment, it is its own body! Without any mapping, everything is just a state of its existence. This also means that to defeat the spectre, only its restraining force could do so.”

“Restraining…”

Everyone smiled bitterly. Who would know the restraining force against a spectre.

This thing was something rare after all.

Even in the available data, there was only the fact that any ordinary force wouldn’t be able to hit it at all. Moreover, even if they knew, so what? Zhou Wang didn’t have that force!

At least, Zhou Wang’s lightning had no effect on the spectre.

“He’s about to lose.” Wang Ru sounded helpless.

“Not necessarily.” Su Hao narrowed his eyes slightly, “Only Zhou Wang can think of a solution to deal with the spectre since he’s fighting it now. Whether or not he will win, that will depend on his quick thinking…”

“I believe in him.”

“After all, in the legend of history…”

Boom!

A bolt of lightning struck again without causing any harm to the spectre. The spectre didn’t even move at all from its spot, allowing Zhou Wang to bombord it freely.

“Hahahaha, so this is the strength of humans?”

The spectre laughed out loud.

“Hmmpphh!”

Zhou Wang gave a cold snort.

“Congeal!”

Stretching out his hand into an empty space.

Lightning struck down from the air.

It was a terrible beam of lightning that then condensed into hundreds of thousands of faint lightning bolts with different colors. However, it was that beam of lightning that gave people a kind of indescribable heart palpitation.

Boom!

One strike passed down.

The spectre’s face changed slightly.

Snap!

A bug sized hole appeared on the ground, the spectre… it was still safe and sound.

“Scared the hell out of me.”

The spectre looked at the huge hole on the ground and exclaimed, “With such a big momentum, I thought you were going to counterattack! It turned out to be nothing more than this. Oh-my!”

This guy…

The beast laughed.

The audience in the human camp had already been long angry, but Zhou Wang couldn’t be blamed at all. After all… it’s a spectre! They didn’t dare expect a victory. They all wished for Zhou Wang to be defeated peacefully instead of constantly being humiliated by that damn spectre.

“Damn it.”

“What a lowly bastard.”

“This daddy isn’t a world esper, or else I will go up there and beat it up!”

The spectre successfully provoked everyone’s anger.

But then…

So what?

Zhou Wang still couldn’t win. After all, this was his battle.

Boom!

Zhou Wang struck with another huge lightning beam that was condensed from thousands of tiny lightning bolts. The spectre completely ignored it, and a black light flashed that Zhou Wang failed to dodge.

Poof~

A bloodstain appeared on Zhou Wang’s face.

“Hehe…”

“Can this be considered as disfigured?”

The spectre added yet another sentence. This was simply a total humiliation.

Both sides of the audience had blown up.

On the beasts’ side, upon seeing this scene, several powerful beasts looked at each other and saw their fellow beasts’ emotions. They just smiled indifferently, “Let them vent, after all they had been holding back for 20 years. No matter what, they have to let it out somewhat, right?”

“Hehe, since the human himself is weak, how could he blame others?”

Poof~

Another bloodstain floated in the air.

Zhou Wang missed his attack and got hit instead.

“It’s over…”

Everyone could see it.

The battle had been completely lost.

This…

It was an enemy that Zhou Wang couldn’t defeat at all!

Whether or not it is strong, at least you need to be able to hit the opponent, right? Even when facing a level three world esper, at least he had the chance to attack, but now…

This was a spectre!

“Give up!”

It wasn’t known who shouted it.

Countless people in the human camp also followed along, shouting the same chant. Fortunately, both participants were in the match, or else that might have affected their state of mind.

Give up.

This was the thought of all humans.

They really couldn’t understand.

Obviously, he was destined to lose, but why do you continue to fight? Why do you want to bear the humiliation from the beast? Was it all just for his own poor self-esteem?

Everyone was extremely dissatisfied.

In their opinion, this was no longer glory, but an opportunity to be humiliated by the other party! Especially those who couldn’t understand Zhou Wang originally, they now looked even uglier than before.

“Why doesn’t he admit defeat.”

“That’s right, that spectre is obviously too strong.”

“He couldn’t win. Why the need to keep acting, could it be by acting, he will win?”

“He’s too selfish.”

Many people said one after another.

However, as they were allowed to express their dissatisfaction, Zhou Wang was still clashing with the spectre as stable as Mount Tai. Attacking it each time, thousands of lightning bolts of different colors appeared.

Boom!

Boom!

Countless lightning strikes.

However, the end result presented to Zhou Wang was still invalid!

The spectre is a form. No matter how many times he attacked, it would be useless. On the contrary, each time he attacked, the spectre would find a chance to draw a trace of blood on his face.

“Ridiculous.”

The spectre knew what Zhou Wang was thinking, “Hehe, you think that I am a projection so you kept trying? It’s such a pity, hahahaha. This is my body after all!”

“Or do you think that my body has a limit?”

“Ignorant human.”

Zhou Wang ignored him.

In fact, Zhou Wang seemed to have sunk into the demonic temptation right now.

He kept attacking again and again.

Each time, he would bring countless scars on himself. When his body was already stained in blood, turning his clothes completely red, no one laughed at him anymore.

What people felt was infinite respect.

This is what Zhou Wang truly was.

Boom!

Another lightning strike.

Suddenly, the spectre’s body trembled for a bit.

chapters.title: Chapter 997 - A Counterfeit Nezha
chapters.body:
Chapter 997 - A Counterfeit Nezha

Chapter 997: A counterfeit Nezha

Quick.

That was too fast.

From start to finish, only two minutes passed!

After Ya Yan tested the might of his light beam against Wang Jun’s defense, he didn’t hesitate to use his killer move, resorting to such a brutal and cruel way to kill Wang Jun in seconds!

Victory?

Counterattack?

It was merely a joke.

Especially that nine light cluster burst in the final moment, it was even more horrifying. Suspending in the air, Ya Yan had purplish light scattered around it, which was full of an enchanting aura…

As for Wang Jun?

He died without even a corpse remaining!

His boundary spirit had already scattered, how could he still be alive?

The human audience turned silent while the beasts were excited.

“Indeed Ya Yan is worthy of his name.”

“When Zhou Wang won, I thought that humans are that powerful.

“But now, it seems like it’s just certain individuals only.”

The beasts sneered.

There were only 7 humans in the top 32, and the beasts already had an absolute advantage! They were scared by Zhou Wang before, but now they were qualified to say these words…

However, was that really true?

Ya Yan suddenly felt that something was amiss.

Hmmm…

What’s wrong?

Oh, the system didn’t declare his victory yet.

Why then?

Swish.

Under Ya Yan’s foot, the broken sword moved.

It was a swift and decisive move!

It stunned everyone present.

No one would have imagined that the shattered shield fragment and the broken sword would suddenly burst with energy, flashing like lightning.

Poof~

Ya Yan couldn’t move, and the broken sword passed through his chest.

Quick.

It was too quick!

Ya Yan lowered his head and looked at the blood on his chest. He couldn’t believe it. This… How is this possible?

“This…”

The audience went into an uproar.

What happened?

Wang Jun was obviously dead, but that sword…

Could it be a kamikaze move?

Everyone seemed to have thought of something. Some moves could indeed be activated after death. After all, in reality, one could die together. However, this is a virtual environment!

The system only had one kind of judgement!

Whoever dies first will lose.

Thus, even if Wang Jun died first and Ya Yan followed closely, the winner would still be Ya Yan.

“Hmmm, playing such a trick, what use would it have?”

“Hehe, this is merely a virtual world.”

“However, this guy is indeed quite powerful.”

“Nonsense, if this is reality, Ya Yan would never be this relaxed.”

The beasts had a heated discussion.

“Cough, cough.”

Ya Yan spat out mouthfuls of blood.

Swish!

He dissipated into particles and vanished.

At this time, the long-lost system announcement finally came.

“Wang Jun, victory.”

Boom!

There was an uproar among the crowd.

Both the beasts and humans stood up abruptly and looked at the arena in disbelief. Wang Jun won? He was dead; what’s with this victory?

Buzz~

The broken sword was floating.

The audience noticed that the broken sword was still there.

“What happened?”

Everyone was shocked.

At this moment, the broken sword flickered and gradually turned larger before returning to a human figure. Wang Jun! He was still alive!

That broken sword… turned out to be Wang Jun?

“This is impossible!”

There were screams from the beast camp.

“This is definitely not a metal Rule Force!”

“How could he defeat Ya Yan?”

As for the humans, they just smiled disdainfully and immediately shouted Wang Jun’s name. Humans won again, two consecutive victories! Wang Jun secured the second victory!

“This rule…”

Wang Ru, that old man, had long been scared off, “This is definitely not a metal Rule Force.”

“Of course, it’s not a metal Rule Force.” Su Hao shrugged and sounded emotional, “This guy, although I was able to guess a bit, I didn’t expect him to win in such a rough method.”

“What’s his actual talent then?” Wang Ru still sounded shocked.

“Did you see the final scene?” Su Hao leisurely said.

“He possessed a weapon?”

Wang Ru thought for a moment.

“Possessed? Did you see any weapon remaining?” Su Hao smiled. Then, he calmly continued, “He’s the weapon itself! If I guess correctly, Wang Jun’s boundary spirit is himself!”

“Indeed, you’re worthy of your fame, Su Hao.” Wang Jun’s figure fell on the audience, and his single sentence was a response to Su Hao’s guess. Zhou Wang and the others also opened their eyes in amazement.

It was really true!

“So, your talent…”

“Ah, becoming a weapon.” Wang Jun scratched his head, “Various weapons.”

“Damn, you’re so strong.” Li Xin’s eyes lit up, “Seventy-two changes, you can change into anything?”

“Uh, any normal weapon should be fine.” Wang Jun couldn’t stand Li Xin’s enthusiasm.

“Wow, you don’t even need to bring a toilet when you go out. This is simply amazing.” Li Xin excitedly said.

Wang Jun, “Hehe.”

“Ah, by the way, can you transform into that long thing, the one that can vibrate?” Li Xin asked excitedly.

Everyone: “…”

Leaving aside Su Hao’s circle, mankind once again won a magnificent victory that led to cheers from the audience felt all over the world. In the beast camp, they felt an unprecedented crisis. Top 32, 7 humans, how small was the chance of victory? They could basically overlook the humans!

However, the result?

Two wins!

Zhou Wang and Wang Jun happened to be humans who aren’t that famous!

What about the rest then?

Wan Cheng, Su Hao, and the others still hadn’t made their appearance yet!

“Lord, based on my observations, although humans won, they all utilized a strategy. The first match, Zi Dian, no I mean Zhou Wang and the spectre, it was the spectre itself that courted its own death. Obviously it could have won, but it kept trying to humiliate humans. This was simply the standard karma for being a villain!”

An alpaca reported to the beasts.

Obviously, this beast had been deeply poisoned by human TV dramas.

“Look, if it didn’t toy around with Zhou Wang from the start, how could Zhou Wang have the opportunity to slowly get it? My analysis makes sense, right?”

“So, the first loss was because it courted its own death!”

“It’s not like we beasts are weak.”

“En…”

The beasts nodded secretly.

“As for the second match.”

The alpaca beast touched its long beard, “Ah, that Ya Yan. I had to admit that Ya Yan learnt the lesson from the first match and decided to defeat the opponent in the simplest and ruthless way. However, he still lost. Why? The reason was very simple, strategy!”

“Damn that human, disguised himself as a weapon and using a broken sword for a sneak attack at that!”

“It’s hard to guard against that.”

“This was the reason why Ya Yan ended up losing even when his strength far exceeded the opponent. Thus, I think the most important thing to defeat the opponent isn’t strength, but strategy! The only way to protect yourself when attacking the enemy is not to be fooled. Don’t underestimate human beings, and we can secure our victory.”

The alpaca beast made a final summary.

“In general, humans already have something that we need to look up to. We must absolutely not be careless!”

“Alright, we will listen to you.”

“Ah, yes. Who’s the next one?”

“Let me take a look… Hmm, there are two matches between us, and then the upcoming third match would be between us and humans. The one representing mankind would be Chen Yiran!”

“Chen Yiran? That woman?”

“Yes.”

“Has her droplet been cracked?”

“It has been cracked, and the information has already been passed to the participant. If she didn’t use her water droplet, that’s fine. If she uses it, she will definitely die without knowing how it happened.”

“Good. Then we shall wait and see.”

The beasts were analyzing.

At the same time, on the human side, they were also analyzing the strength of the other party. There was a gap for the next match, which gave humans a rare moment to breathe.

“What is this?”

Li Xin pointed at the beast in front and was dazed.

One couldn’t blame him for that, but the way that beast looked was too eye-catching.

Six hands, three heads…

“Three heads and six arms, Nezha.”

Su Hao thought of a character.

“Where?”

Li Xin took a closer look, and then shook his head seriously, “You’re wrong, Nezha doesn’t look that ugly.”

Everyone rolled their eyes.

_______________

Name: Na Tuo

Age: 26

Strength: Peak level two world realm

Ranking: 19

Description: A nameless beast, accidentally picked up a mutilated Buddha image handed down from humans and gained three heads and six arms. The Buddha image had the incomplete character Na Tuo. Being influenced by the human myths and stories, it renamed itself to Na Tuo and turned into a powerful beast from the myth.

_______________

“En…”

After reading this, everyone looked at each other, “Seems that it’s related to Nezha.”

“A knockoff.” Zhou Wang said.

“It’s not exactly a knockoff.”

Su Hao pondered for a moment before looking embarrassed, “Obviously this is the product of a Nezha statue that mutated, but I guess the name of Nezha was engraved incompletely on the statue.”

“How do you read this thing then?” Li Xin blankly pointed at the word Tuo.

“Same sound as taking off.”

“Oh, that Tuo (Taking off).” Li Xin understood and then cursed, “This is simply a name with a strong sense of counterfeit.”

“Alright then.”

“Counterfeit isn’t the problem now. The problem is the strength of this guy…”

Su Hao opened a copy of the Federation’s information, which was far more detailed than the one in the list. “With the information I have, this guy’s strength is a bit heaven-defying.”

“What do you mean?”

“Have a look yourself and you will know what I meant.”

Su Hao played a clip. Everyone blankly watched until the end and became dumbfounded.

In one clip, Na Tuo killed two world espers with a red scarf.

In the other clip, Na Tuo killed two world espers with a wheel.

There was even a clip showing Na Tuo using a steel ring to trap a peak level two world esper!

This Na Tuo really wanted to be Nezha himself. That red scarf, wheels, and rings, they were all boundary spirits made by itself!

And the might of these boundary spirits were unimaginable!

Especially those burning flames on the hot wheels, those were definitely Chen Yiran’s nemesis.

“There shouldn’t be any problem, right?” Su Hao sounded a bit worried.

Chen Yiran mainly relied on her water droplet, but since it had appeared once, it wasn’t known whether the second time would be effective or not.

“I will know when I give it a try.” Chen Yiran didn’t dare guarantee anything.

After exchanging information regarding Na Tuo’s battle, it was soon their turn. Chen Yiran and Na Tuo against each other. When they watched Na Tuo stepping on the fire wheels, all the humans turned dull. Apart from that ugliness, this was simply a rebirth of Nezha!

The match began amidst the noise.

And no one expected how Chen Yiran’s attack would turn out to be after stepping into the stage.

chapters.title: Chapter 998 - Domineering Rhythm!
chapters.body:
Chapter 998 - Domineering Rhythm!

Chapter 998: Domineering rhythm!

Buzz~

Unsurprisingly, Chen Yiran started using her water droplet the moment she appeared.

That crystal clear, powerful water droplet that could instantly kill a level one world esper appeared again. However, it seemed like Na Tuo had long prepared for it. Throwing his ring to trap the water droplet, the Rule Force was distorted with the surging flame. This method developed by the beasts forcefully cracked it.

“Gone?”

Under everyone’s watchful eyes, the water droplet vanished.

“It really got countered.”

Everyone was on high alert.

With her biggest killing move rendered ineffective, could Chen Yiran still win?

“It turned out to be the purest water source. No wonder it was so powerful.” Na Tuo sneered, “Too bad, since we already know what it is, that’s sufficient to resolve your move.”

Na Tuo just said these before he began his assault.

With the death experience from the previous two seniors, he dared not utter any more nonsense at all. Even though his strength is much better than Chen Yiran, he still had to obtain his victory using his full strength!

Having failed twice in a row, the beasts couldn’t tolerate any more failures.

Boom!

Several weapons appeared in his hands.

Streams of light were heading toward Chen Yiran. The explosive strength coming from the six hands was far beyond people’s imagination!

Swish!

Chen Yiran raised her hand.

The sky was filled with icy snow as the entire scene instantly became covered in windy snow. Everything except Chen Yiran began to slow down as an iceberg rose from the ground, blocking the streams of light. Although it was broken from the blast, Chen Yiran easily avoided the slow attack.

Boom!

The windy snow suddenly turned violent.

A blizzard instantly hit.

A biting cold wind, the thick snow blew across people’s faces, and no one could see clearly. Forget about Na Tuo; even the crowd watching this virtual fight from the audience seemed to be able to feel the chill with their body.

Buzz~

Na Tuo threw out his rings.

He didn’t move rashly. The soft light coming from the rings protected him within it as stable as Mount Tai that the windy snow couldn’t approach at all! Let alone harming him.

Boom!

The blizzard intensified by a notch higher.

Chen Yiran stretched out her hand. The already violent blizzard poured like a torrential rain as it mixed with the ice, it fell on the ground with constant popping sounds.

Dang, dang, dang~

That was the sound of the windy snow hitting the rings.

“Humph.”

Na Tuo sneered.

Forcing me to clash head-on?

Too bad! How long can you ensure such a large-scale attack?

Boom!

Seeing that he didn’t move, the blizzard escalated higher again.

The violent windy snow turned into hail and rain, and it would occasionally be mixed together with snowflakes. Crystal clear water droplets fell down like a waterfall, mixing with the terrifying hail and pouring in front of Na Tuo.

Dang, dang, dang~

That crisp sound was still echoing.

Even with such a powerful attack, it was still impossible to breach through Na Tuo’s defense.

With the experience from the first two matches, Na Tuo would not rush forward rashly. Even if he were confident that he could break through the blizzard, he would still not go.

He needs to be stable in his fight.

This battle must be won.

The situation had been completely reversed.

In the previous two fights, the beasts had an absolute upper hand. Humans only had a little bit of hope, but they would reverse the situation and win successfully during the last moment. This time, it was the human enjoying an absolute advantage in offense as Na Tuo’s figure looked very small in the storm.

However…

Everyone could clearly see it.

Na Tuo’s defense was as stable as Mount Tai. There was no damage to it at all!

“Rise!”

Chen Yiran gritted her teeth.

It seemed that the windy snow’s power had increased again, and this time… it was an icy storm!

Boom!

Windy rain hit.

Under such a violent wind, even the way it fell became complicated.

With the windy rain coming from the sky, the wind was unimaginably strong but the rain could obviously be seen reducing. Everyone could see that Chen Yiran had reached the end of her means.

Just like he guessed at the start, could she sustain such a large-scale attack?

“She’s finished.”

Na Tuo’s eyes lit up.

However, thinking of the experience from those two seniors, he calmed himself again.

Perhaps…

Was this the human camouflage tactics again?

One needs to know that those damn humans are extremely good in this aspect. According to what the elders said, one needs to maintain his composure while getting closer to victory.

When she was really out of gas completely, he would then begin his offense.

None had to mention that Na Tuo had no weakness to exploit.

Whether it was Zhou Wang or Wang Jun before, if they were to meet him, they won’t even have any chance of winning. However, facing Chen Yiran this time, no one noticed that the surrounding falling rain…

A few drops seemed to be a bit different.

Dang, dang, dang~

The light emitted from the rings bore thousands of raindrops every second. Who would pay attention to a few of them?

Just as it was a windy rain storm, a drop of water fell.

Within the endless windy rain storm.

Dang~

The raindrop collided with the light of the rings and formed a crack.

Dang~

Yet another drop landed.

A crack appeared within the rings.

Dang~

Yet another drop landed.

The rings shattered!

Three droplets in a row, it was too quick that one couldn’t imagine it.

“Not good!”

Na Tuo finally understood something.

Swish!

Swish!

His red scarf and wheels were collectively used to defend. The blizzard that had been ignored began to show its full power when the rings vanished. It was very short as it slowed down Na Tuo for less than a second, but in that split second…

A few drops of water fell like thunder.

Such a stormy attack, can a boundary spirit that was hastily summoned be able to defend against it? In less than a breath, all his weapons were completely destroyed.

Swish!

The last drop of water passed by.

A blood rose dyed Na Tuo’s chest. It was so vividly beautiful in the rain.

Na Tuo died.

Buzz~

Countless light particles floated up as Na Tuo disappeared into thin air.

The blizzard suddenly stopped.

The sky turned clear, and it was a sunny day again.

Chen Yiran…

She won.

All the beasts and humans were in a daze.

She won?

Humans actually won again!

Chen Yiran’s attack was so violent and quick from start to finish. She didn’t even give Na Tuo much of an opportunity to attack before forcefully destroying him! Although the audience was worried that Chen Yiran would exhaust her strength and give Na Tuo the chance to counterattack and kill her during the process, that scene didn’t appear even when the battle had ended.

Chen Yiran won.

Looking at the scene earlier, one could see how joyous it was!

What a fast pace this battle was!

From beginning to end, he was suppressed!

“This is simply awesome!”

“Rejoice!”

“Too cool, to suppress him the entire time!”

“The goddess is so powerful!”

Countless people cheered.

Those worries were only present for strong espers.

For ordinary people and even those weak espers, all they saw was that this battle was a total suppression from beginning to end. Chen Yiran squeezed this fake Nezha like a dog before finally succeeding in killing him. This fact was even something Zhou Wang and Wang Jun failed to achieve. This was simply an absolute victory!

Humans…

They gorgeously won the third victory!

Chen Yiran entered the top 16.

On the other side of the auditorium, when Su Hao and the others saw the last scene, they already understood what was going on. The water droplet, it was still the same water droplet.

Although the beasts had thought of a way to resolve it, how would they know how many droplets of water Chen Yiran had?

All of Chen Yiran’s attacks were to pave the way for those final droplets. The blizzard, storm, etc. were all for the gradual transformation into rain!

It was all in order to make Na Tuo forget about the initial water droplet.

Is Chen Yiran strong?

Not really.

In fact, if she was to confront Na Tuo head-on, she would not have any chance of winning.

However, what was unexpected was that the battle was under her control from the get-go. Whether it was the rhythm or battle plan, a battle with a clear contrast of strength and weakness turned into the weak defeating the strong.

One had to admit that it was a funny result.

“Great.”

Zhou Wang and the others quivered.

They usually saw the soft spoken Chen Yiran, but never did they expect her to be so brutal in a fight!

“This kind of water droplet…” Wang Ru seemed to have remembered something.

“I remember seeing someone used it before. Ah yes, Su Wan!”

Wang Ru slapped his thigh, but quickly revealed a wry smile, “This kind of droplet is indeed terrifying, but I remember one needs to cultivate it for a long time and it’s a one-time use consumption. Each droplet is precious, and Chen Yiran had used so much. I am afraid she can only admit defeat next time.”

Everyone thought about it. That seemed to be true.

No matter how powerful the water droplet is, it was consumable.

Chen Yiran won gorgeously this time, but… it was just that.

After all, this was her biggest hidden card! Not only was her biggest card exposed, but also completely vanished. What else could she use to win?

“To be able to enter the top 16, that’s already amazing itself.”

True.

Everyone agreed.

Wasn’t their initial goal to be in top 16?

As for the top 8…

This was a battle between beasts and humans, so there was a rigid rule stating that humans and beasts must fight with one another when the conditions are met! In other words, if two humans are left, there wouldn’t be a situation where they both went against each other and one easily advanced.

The humans’ opponents would always be beasts!

Unless the humans are far superior to the beasts, there would be a situation when two humans fighting each other just like the current beasts.

Thus, if there was no accident…

Their next match would be against level three world espers!

The top 16 was already strong enough.

“You all forget one fact.” Su Hao leisurely slipped in a sentence, “This is not reality.”

Everyone suddenly lit up. Oh yeah! Each time they enter virtual reality, it will sync with their strength in reality. In other words…

Chen Yiran would still have ten drops next round!

Although there was still a risk of it being cracked, it was still much better than it disappearing. In that case, Chen Yiran’s victory was almost perfect.

“Phew, I hope everyone can enter the top 16.” Wang Ru said excitedly.

Being able to achieve this kind of result already made him feel happy.

“Ah, by the way, who’s next?”

“Let me take a look… It looks like…”

“Li Xin?”
